news.title: 三星代工据报与 Anthropic 就定制 AI 芯片制造初步达成协议
news.summary: 据韩国媒体报道，三星代工已与 Anthropic 就其定制 AI 推理芯片制造初步达成协议，采用 2nm 制程；双方均未官方确认此次报道。

news.title: 三星代工完成特斯拉AI5芯片流片，德州Taylor 2nm工厂年底启产
news.summary: 三星晶圆代工于德州Taylor完成特斯拉AI5芯片2nm制程流片，进入量产冲刺；工厂预计2026年底启动初步生产，2027年全面商业化，标志三星代工赢得重要AI大单。

news.title: 三星将龙仁芯片工厂量产节点提前至2029年，加快AI存储供给扩张
news.summary: 三星电子确认将龙仁半导体园区首座晶圆厂量产时间提前至2029年，较原计划早约1-2年；此举在韩国总统主持的政企会议上达成共识，旨在匹配全球AI芯片供给缺口。

news.title: 三星代工部门将4nm/5nm报价上调约15%，AI需求推动进入新定价周期
news.summary: 三星晶圆代工部门将4nm与5nm先进制程报价上调约15%，主要适用于新增客户；受AI芯片订单激增驱动，先进制程产能持续供不应求，三星同步台积电涨价节奏重构代工业务利润结构。

lite.name: Lumentum
lite.oneLiner: 光模块的「卖铲人」——1.6T 时代关键 EML 激光芯片的量产者。
lite.oneLinerEn: The "picks-and-shovels" of optical modules — a volume maker of the EML laser chips key to the 1.6T era.
lite.subcategory: EML 激光芯片 / 光器件
lite.role: 光模块上游 · 卖铲人
lite.business: 激光器、EML/光芯片与光器件。目前少数能量产 200G/lane EML（1.6T 光模块核心元件）的厂商，另有大额光交换(OCS)订单。2026 营收高速增长。
lite.businessEn: Lasers, EML/photonic chips and optical components. One of the few able to volume-produce 200G/lane EML (the core part of 1.6T optical modules), plus large optical-circuit-switch (OCS) orders. Revenue is growing fast in 2026.
lite.description: Lumentum(新飞通)是光通信器件的关键供应商,是光模块产业链里典型的「卖铲人」——它做的不是光模块整机,而是光模块里最核心、最难做的光芯片和光器件,尤其是 EML(电吸收调制激光器)等高速激光芯片。在 800G、乃至下一代 1.6T 高速光模块里,发光的激光芯片是决定性能与产能的关键瓶颈,而能稳定量产高端 EML 激光芯片的厂商屈指可数,Lumentum 正是其中的核心供应者之一。AI 数据中心对高速光互联需求爆发,而高速光模块又受制于上游激光芯片的供给,这让 Lumentum 的高端激光芯片供不应求、价值凸显。除数据中心外,它在电信、3D 传感(如手机人脸识别)等领域也有布局。作为高速光模块背后关键光芯片的量产者,Lumentum 是 AI 光互联产业链上游一个卡位极佳的受益者。
lite.descriptionEn: Lumentum is a key supplier of optical-communications components, a classic "seller of shovels" in the optical-module chain — it makes not finished modules but the most core, hardest-to-build optical chips and components inside them, especially high-speed laser chips like EMLs (electro-absorption modulated lasers). In 800G and next-gen 1.6T high-speed modules, the light-emitting laser chip is the decisive bottleneck for performance and capacity, and few makers can reliably mass-produce high-end EML laser chips, with Lumentum a core supplier among them. Exploding AI-data-center demand for high-speed optical interconnect, with high-speed modules constrained by upstream laser-chip supply, makes Lumentum's high-end laser chips sold out and highly valued. Beyond data centers, it has positions in telecom and 3D sensing (like phone face recognition). As the mass-producer of the key laser chips behind high-speed optical modules, Lumentum is a well-positioned beneficiary upstream in the AI optical-interconnect chain.
whyItMatters: 光通信器件关键供应商,光模块产业链「卖铲人」
做光模块里最核心的光芯片,尤其高速 EML 激光芯片
1.6T 时代激光芯片是关键瓶颈,能量产者屈指可数
AI 光互联需求爆发,高端激光芯片供不应求

products.name: EML 激光芯片
products.description: 1.6T 时代关键的高速激光芯片,能量产者屈指可数。

products.name: 光模块器件
products.description: 高速光模块所需的核心光学器件。

news.title: 获英伟达 20 亿美元投资,建设美国本土新光学晶圆厂
news.summary: 2026 年 3 月英伟达宣布与 Lumentum 战略合作并投资 20 亿美元,支持其研发、扩产与美国新晶圆厂建设,深化 AI 数据中心光互连布局。

news.title: FY2026 Q2 营收 6.66 亿美元创纪录,同比增长 65%
news.summary: 第二财季营收 665.5 百万美元创新高,受超大规模云客户对激光芯片与光模块的强劲需求驱动;OCS 光交换机订单积压超 4 亿美元,公司提出 2028 财年 80 亿美元营收目标。

news.title: EML 激光芯片供不应求,产能积极扩张
news.summary: 1.6T 时代 EML 是关键瓶颈,Lumentum 扩产仍供不应求;云厂商直接锁定产能,业绩强劲回升。

aaoi.name: 应用光电
aaoi.oneLiner: 2026 涨幅最猛的光模块股之一，800G/1.6T 收发模块放量。
aaoi.oneLinerEn: One of 2026's hottest optical-module stocks, ramping 800G/1.6T transceivers.
aaoi.tagline: 为数据中心提供光连接
aaoi.taglineEn: Optical connectivity for the data center
aaoi.business: 数据中心光收发模块(800G/1.6T)。2026 完成 800G 放量并拿下 1.6T 大单，全年营收指引超 10 亿美元。
aaoi.businessEn: Data-center optical transceivers (800G/1.6T). In 2026 it ramped 800G to volume and won large 1.6T orders, guiding full-year revenue above $1 billion.
aaoi.description: 应用光电(Applied Optoelectronics,AAOI)是光收发模块与光器件的美国厂商,业务覆盖数据中心、电信和有线宽带用的光模块。它和 AI 的连接点非常直接:AI 数据中心需要海量高速光模块做 GPU 之间的光互联,对 400G、800G、乃至 1.6T 高速收发模块的需求爆发式增长。AAOI 具备从激光芯片到光模块的一定垂直整合能力,随着它切入高速数据中心光模块供应、并放量出货,业绩预期大幅改善,股价在 2026 年成为涨幅最猛的光模块股之一。当然,光模块行业竞争激烈、技术迭代快,AAOI 需要在与中际旭创、新易盛、Coherent 等强手的竞争中持续拿下订单、提升良率。作为 AI 数据中心光互联需求爆发的美股受益标的之一,应用光电是这条高速光模块赛道里弹性很大的公司。
aaoi.descriptionEn: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) is a U.S. maker of optical transceiver modules and optical components, spanning modules for data centers, telecom and cable broadband. Its link to AI is very direct: AI data centers need vast high-speed optical modules for optical interconnect between GPUs, with demand for 400G, 800G and even 1.6T transceivers exploding. AAOI has some vertical integration from laser chips to optical modules, and as it enters high-speed data-center module supply and ramps shipments, its earnings outlook has improved markedly, with its stock becoming one of the hottest-gaining optical-module names in 2026. Of course, the optical-module industry is fiercely competitive with fast technology iteration, and AAOI must keep winning orders and improving yield against strong rivals like Innolight, Eoptolink and Coherent. As one of the U.S.-listed beneficiaries of exploding AI-data-center optical-interconnect demand, Applied Optoelectronics is a high-beta company in this high-speed optical-module space.
whyItMatters: 美国光收发模块与光器件厂商
AI 数据中心 400G/800G/1.6T 光模块需求爆发
有从激光芯片到光模块的一定垂直整合能力
2026 涨幅最猛光模块股之一,弹性很大

products.name: 800G / 1.6T 光模块
products.description: 高速光收发模块,2026 涨幅最猛光模块股之一。

news.title: 800G 放量+1.6T 突破,重返光模块第一梯队
news.summary: 与微软等云厂签长期供货协议,800G 收发模块规模出货、1.6T 送样;美国本土产能成为差异化优势。

cien.name: Ciena
cien.oneLiner: 相干光网络与高容量路由设备龙头。
cien.oneLinerEn: A leader in coherent optical networking and high-capacity routing gear.
cien.tagline: 连接彼此,推动世界前行
cien.taglineEn: Connecting everything to move the world forward
cien.business: 相干光传输、路由与网络自动化软件，连接 AI 数据中心之间的长途 / 城域网络。
cien.businessEn: Coherent optical transport, routing and network-automation software connecting AI data centers over long-haul and metro networks.
cien.description: Ciena(赛恩纳)是相干光网络与高容量传输、路由设备的全球龙头。互联网的骨干、海底光缆、以及数据中心之间的长距离连接,都靠光把数据以光速、超大带宽传输,而 Ciena 的核心技术 WaveLogic 相干光引擎,能在一根光纤上塞进极高的容量,是长途与城域光传输的顶尖玩家。AI 给它带来结构性利好:大模型训练与推理让数据中心之间(DCI,数据中心互联)需要传输的数据量暴增——训练要在多个数据中心间同步海量数据,分布式的 AI 集群更是把带宽需求推到新高,直接拉动对 Ciena 高容量相干光设备的需求。作为「数据中心之间那条高速公路」的关键供应商,Ciena 是 AI 从「单机房算力」走向「跨机房、跨地域大规模互联」这一趋势里的核心网络受益者之一。
cien.descriptionEn: Ciena is a global leader in coherent optical networking and high-capacity transport and routing equipment. The internet backbone, submarine cables and long-distance connections between data centers all rely on light to transmit data at light speed with huge bandwidth, and Ciena's core WaveLogic coherent optical engine packs extremely high capacity onto a single fiber — a top player in long-haul and metro optical transport. AI brings it a structural tailwind: large-model training and inference cause data volumes between data centers (DCI, data-center interconnect) to surge — training must sync massive data across multiple data centers, and distributed AI clusters push bandwidth demand to new highs, directly driving demand for Ciena's high-capacity coherent optical gear. As a key supplier of "the highway between data centers," Ciena is one of the core network beneficiaries of AI's shift from "single-room compute" to "large-scale interconnect across rooms and regions."
whyItMatters: 相干光网络与高容量传输、路由设备全球龙头
核心技术 WaveLogic 在一根光纤塞进极高容量
AI 让数据中心互联(DCI)数据量暴增
「数据中心之间高速公路」的关键供应商

products.name: WaveLogic 相干光
products.description: 在一根光纤塞进极高容量的相干光引擎,支撑数据中心互联。

products.name: 路由与交换
products.description: 高容量 IP 路由与传输设备。

news.title: 数据中心互联(DCI)需求爆发,AI 拉动相干光订单
news.summary: 云厂商跨数据中心训练带动 WaveLogic 相干光设备需求,订单能见度改善,AI 成为增长叙事核心。

nok.name: 诺基亚
nok.oneLiner: 电信级网络基建巨头，光网络与数据中心互联业务增长。
nok.business: 移动 / 固定网络基础设施、IP 路由与光网络，正向 AI 数据中心互联延伸。
nok.oneLinerEn: A telecom-networking infrastructure giant with growing optical and DCI business.
nok.businessEn: Mobile/fixed network infrastructure, IP routing and optical networking, extending into AI data-center interconnect.
nok.description: 诺基亚(Nokia)如今是电信级网络基础设施巨头(已不再做手机),为全球运营商和企业提供移动网络(5G)、固定宽带、IP 路由和光网络等设备与方案。它和 AI 的连接点主要在网络传输:AI 数据中心之间要传输海量数据(数据中心互联 DCI)、云和边缘要高速联网,这带动了对高容量光网络和 IP 路由设备的需求,而这正是诺基亚的核心业务之一。2025 年诺基亚收购了光网络专业厂商 Infinera,大幅增强其光传输实力,更好地卡位 AI 驱动的数据中心互联与光网络扩容需求。此外它也在电信设备领域与爱立信、华为竞争。作为全球电信与光网络基础设施的主要供应商之一,诺基亚是「AI 让数据在数据中心之间和网络里流动量激增」这一趋势的网络侧受益者。
nok.descriptionEn: Nokia is now a carrier-grade network-infrastructure giant (no longer making phones), providing mobile networks (5G), fixed broadband, IP routing and optical-network equipment and solutions to operators and enterprises worldwide. Its link to AI is mainly network transport: AI data centers must move massive data between each other (data-center interconnect, DCI), and cloud and edge need high-speed networking, driving demand for high-capacity optical-network and IP-routing equipment — a core Nokia business. In 2025 Nokia acquired specialist optical-network maker Infinera, greatly strengthening its optical transport and better positioning it for AI-driven data-center interconnect and optical-capacity expansion. It also competes with Ericsson and Huawei in telecom equipment. As one of the world's main telecom and optical-network infrastructure suppliers, Nokia is a network-side beneficiary of the trend that "AI causes data flows between data centers and across networks to surge."
whyItMatters: 电信级网络基础设施巨头(已不做手机)
提供 5G/宽带/IP 路由/光网络设备
AI 数据中心互联(DCI)带动高容量光网络需求
2025 收购 Infinera 增强光传输,卡位 AI 光网络扩容

products.name: 5G / 光网络设备
products.description: 电信级网络基建,光网络受益 AI 数据中心互联,收购 Infinera。

news.title: 收购 Infinera 完成,光网络卡位 AI 数据中心互联
news.summary: 约 23 亿美元收购 Infinera 大幅增强光传输实力;数据中心互联(DCI)成为电信设备商的新增长故事,并获英伟达入股合作 AI-RAN。

mu.name: 美光
mu.oneLiner: 美系唯一存储大厂，HBM 供不应求、订单排到明年。
mu.oneLinerEn: The only U.S. memory major — its HBM is sold out with orders booked into next year.
mu.taglineEn: Transforming how the world uses information to enrich life
mu.business: DRAM、NAND 与 HBM 高带宽显存。作为三大 HBM 供应商中**唯一的美系厂商**，美光的 HBM3E 已导入英伟达并供不应求、产能提前售罄；本土属性使其在美国「芯片自主」政策下额外受益。
mu.businessEn: DRAM, NAND and HBM high-bandwidth memory. As the **only U.S.-based** maker among the three HBM suppliers, Micron's HBM3E is already designed into NVIDIA and is sold out with capacity pre-committed; its domestic footprint gives it extra upside under U.S. "chip self-sufficiency" policy.
mu.description: 美光(Micron)是美国唯一的存储芯片大厂,与韩国三星、SK 海力士并列全球 DRAM/NAND 三巨头,也是这轮 AI 浪潮里存储环节最受益的公司之一。AI 的关键瓶颈之一是「内存墙」——GPU 算力再强,如果喂数据的内存跟不上,算力也发挥不出来。而训练大模型必需的 HBM(高带宽内存)正是解药:把多层 DRAM 芯片垂直堆叠、以极高带宽紧贴 GPU 供数据,每颗英伟达 AI GPU 旁边都要配大量 HBM。美光的 HBM3E 等高端产品供不应求,产能被提前锁定、订单能见度排到很久之后,推动其业绩与股价大幅回升。作为美国唯一的本土存储龙头,美光在 HBM 竞赛和半导体供应链安全(美国本土制造)上都具战略地位,是 AI「算力 + 存力」双轮里不可或缺的一环。
mu.descriptionEn: Micron is the only major U.S. memory-chip maker, one of the world's three DRAM/NAND giants alongside South Korea's Samsung and SK Hynix, and one of the biggest beneficiaries of the memory link in this AI wave. A key AI bottleneck is the "memory wall" — no matter how strong a GPU's compute, if the memory feeding it data can't keep up, that compute is wasted. HBM (high-bandwidth memory), essential for training large models, is the remedy: stacking multiple DRAM chips vertically to feed data to the GPU at extremely high bandwidth, with every NVIDIA AI GPU needing lots of HBM alongside it. Micron's high-end products like HBM3E are sold out, with capacity locked in advance and order visibility stretching far out, driving a strong rebound in earnings and stock. As the only homegrown U.S. memory leader, Micron holds strategic importance in both the HBM race and semiconductor supply-chain security (domestic manufacturing) — an indispensable part of AI's "compute + memory" dual engine.
whyItMatters: 美国唯一存储大厂,全球 DRAM/NAND 三巨头之一
AI 瓶颈是「内存墙」,HBM 是解药
HBM3E 供不应求,产能锁定、订单能见度极远
美国本土存储龙头,HBM 竞赛与供应链安全战略地位

products.name: HBM3E
products.description: 供不应求的 AI 关键内存,紧贴 GPU 供数据,产能被提前锁定。

products.name: DRAM / NAND
products.description: 全球三大存储厂之一,美国唯一本土存储大厂。

news.title: 美光上调美国本土投资计划至 2500 亿美元，纽约晶圆厂提前破土
news.summary: 美光将美国本土投资计划上调至 2035 年超 2500 亿美元，纽约晶圆厂提前破土；另拨 30 亿美元强化国内供应链，长期目标实现 40% DRAM 在美生产。

news.title: Q3 FY2026 营收创纪录达 415 亿美元,同比增 346%
news.summary: 美光 2026 财年三季度营收 414.6 亿美元,同比大增 346%,非 GAAP 每股收益 25.11 美元,毛利率 84.6%,并指引下季营收 500 亿美元。

news.title: HBM4 已为首要客户批量出货,12H 样品带宽超 2.8TB/s
news.summary: 基于 1-beta 工艺的 HBM4 已为首要客户平台大批量出货,并向多家终端客户送出认证样品;HBM4 12H 样品带宽超 2.8TB/s、引脚速率超 11Gbps。

news.title: HBM 等 AI 内存年收入达 100 亿美元,同比增逾五倍
news.summary: HBM、高容量 DIMM 与 LP 服务器 DRAM 合计收入达 100 亿美元,较上一财年增长逾五倍;多年期固定价格协议锁定 AI 需求红利。

fn.name: Fabrinet
fn.oneLiner: 全球光模块/光器件代工龙头。
fn.business: 为 Lumentum、Cisco、NVIDIA 等代工光模块与精密光机电组件，是光通信中游的隐形巨头。
fn.oneLinerEn: The world's leading optical-module contract manufacturer.
fn.businessEn: Contract-manufactures optical modules and precision optoelectromechanical assemblies for NVIDIA, Cisco, Lumentum and others.
fn.description: Fabrinet 是全球光模块与光器件的代工龙头,总部在泰国,是精密光电制造领域的隐形巨头。它专门为各大光通信厂商代工制造高精度的光模块、光器件、以及各类需要极高精密度和洁净环境的光电与精密组件——这些产品制造工艺复杂、良率要求高,很多知名光通信和网络设备公司(如英伟达相关的光互联产品、思科、Coherent 等)都把制造外包给 Fabrinet。在 AI 时代,数据中心对高速光模块(400G、800G、1.6T)的需求爆发,而这些高端光模块的制造正是 Fabrinet 的核心业务,让它成为 AI 光互联浪潮背后关键的制造受益者之一。凭借顶尖的精密光电制造能力和深厚的客户关系,Fabrinet 卡位在光通信产业链的制造环节。作为光模块/光器件代工龙头,Fabrinet 是 AI 数据中心「光互联」需求爆发下确定性很高的制造端受益者。
fn.descriptionEn: Fabrinet is the global leader in optical-module and optical-component contract manufacturing, headquartered in Thailand — a hidden giant in precision optoelectronic manufacturing. It specializes in manufacturing high-precision optical modules, optical components and various optoelectronic and precision assemblies requiring extreme precision and clean environments for major optical-communications firms — products with complex processes and high yield requirements, and many well-known optical-communications and networking companies (NVIDIA-related optical-interconnect products, Cisco, Coherent) outsource manufacturing to Fabrinet. In the AI era, data-center demand for high-speed optical modules (400G, 800G, 1.6T) explodes, and manufacturing these high-end modules is exactly Fabrinet's core business, making it a key manufacturing beneficiary behind the AI optical-interconnect wave. On top-tier precision optoelectronic manufacturing and deep customer relationships, Fabrinet is positioned in the manufacturing link of the optical-communications chain — a high-certainty build-side beneficiary of exploding AI-data-center optical-interconnect demand.
whyItMatters: 全球光模块与光器件代工龙头,总部泰国
专为各大光通信厂商代工高精度光模块/光器件
英伟达相关光互联、思科、Coherent 等外包给它
AI 高速光模块需求爆发,关键制造端受益者

products.name: 光模块 / 光器件代工
products.description: 为各大光通信厂商代工高精度光模块与光器件。

news.title: 光模块代工满载,英伟达 1.6T 世代主力制造伙伴
news.summary: 承接英伟达高速光模块/有源光缆制造,泰国产能持续扩建;800G/1.6T 出货爬坡带动业绩创新高。

csco.name: 思科
csco.oneLiner: 企业与数据中心网络设备龙头，光网络的下游买家。
csco.oneLinerEn: A leader in enterprise/data-center networking gear and a downstream buyer of optical networking.
csco.business: 交换机、路由器、网络安全与协作软件；自研硅光与光模块，是光通信下游主力。
csco.businessEn: Switches, routers, cybersecurity and collaboration software; it makes its own silicon photonics and optical modules and is a major optical-networking buyer.
csco.description: 思科(Cisco)是全球企业与运营商网络设备的老牌龙头——路由器、交换机曾是「让互联网互联」的基础设施,思科一度是全球市值最高的公司。如今它的版图横跨网络硬件、网络安全(收购了 Splunk 等)、协作软件(Webex)与可观测性。在 AI 时代,它一方面是光模块、连接芯片等的下游大买家,并自研硅光与网络芯片,推出面向 AI 数据中心的高性能网络方案,与 Arista、英伟达在「谁来连 GPU 集群」上竞争;另一方面把 AI 用于自家的网络运维与安全产品。相比增长凶猛的新贵,思科更偏「稳健的网络与安全基本盘 + AI 化升级」,是企业 IT 基础设施里体量最大、最稳的一极。
csco.descriptionEn: Cisco is a veteran global leader in enterprise and carrier networking equipment — its routers and switches were the infrastructure that "connected the internet," and Cisco was once the world's most valuable company. Today its footprint spans networking hardware, cybersecurity (it acquired Splunk and others), collaboration software (Webex) and observability. In the AI era, it is both a major downstream buyer of optical modules and connectivity chips and a maker of its own silicon photonics and networking chips, offering high-performance networking for AI data centers and competing with Arista and NVIDIA over "who connects the GPU clusters"; it also applies AI to its own network-operations and security products. Compared with fast-growing upstarts, Cisco leans toward a "steady networking-and-security base + AI upgrade," the largest and steadiest pole of enterprise IT infrastructure.
whyItMatters: 全球企业/运营商网络设备老牌龙头
横跨网络硬件+安全(收购 Splunk)+协作(Webex)
AI 数据中心高性能网络,与 Arista/英伟达竞争
稳健网络与安全基本盘 + AI 化升级

products.name: 网络设备 / Silicon One
products.description: 企业与数据中心交换/路由,自研 Silicon One 网络芯片。

news.title: AI 订单加速,自研 Silicon One 进攻数据中心网络
news.summary: AI 基础设施订单持续放量,网络设备+安全(Splunk)双线;Silicon One 芯片争夺超大规模客户。

accelink.name: 光迅科技
accelink.oneLiner: 国产光器件与光模块老牌厂商。
accelink.business: 光芯片、光器件与光模块全产业链，国产光通信骨干。
accelink.oneLinerEn: A veteran Chinese maker of optical devices and modules.
accelink.businessEn: Optical devices and modules across chips, components and modules — a state-linked Chinese optical veteran.
accelink.description: 光迅科技(Accelink)是中国老牌的光电子器件与光模块厂商,背靠武汉邮科院(信科集团),是国内光通信产业链里技术积累最深、产品线最全的公司之一。它从最上游的光芯片、光器件,一直做到光模块整机,垂直整合能力强,是少数掌握部分核心光芯片自主能力的国产厂商——这在追求供应链自主可控的背景下尤为重要。AI 数据中心对高速光模块(400G、800G)需求爆发,叠加国产替代趋势,给光迅带来成长机遇。相比新易盛、中际旭创等更聚焦光模块的厂商,光迅的特点是「从芯片到模块」的全产业链布局和国资背景下的技术底蕴。作为国产光通信的老牌代表,光迅科技是 AI 光互联与光芯片自主这两条主线上的重要中国力量。
accelink.descriptionEn: Accelink is a veteran Chinese optoelectronic-component and optical-module maker, backed by the Wuhan Research Institute of Posts and Telecommunications (China Information and Communication Technologies Group) — one of the domestic optical-communications chain's companies with the deepest technical accumulation and most complete product line. It spans from the most upstream optical chips and components all the way to finished optical modules, with strong vertical integration, and is one of the few domestic makers with some in-house core optical-chip capability — especially important amid the drive for supply-chain autonomy. Exploding demand for high-speed optical modules (400G, 800G) in AI data centers, plus the domestic-substitution trend, brings Accelink growth opportunities. Compared with module-focused makers like Eoptolink and Innolight, Accelink is distinguished by its "chip-to-module" full-chain layout and state-backed technical depth. As a veteran of domestic optical communications, Accelink is an important Chinese force on both the AI optical-interconnect and optical-chip-autonomy fronts.
whyItMatters: 中国老牌光电子器件与光模块厂商,背靠武汉邮科院
从光芯片、光器件到光模块整机,垂直整合强
少数掌握部分核心光芯片自主能力的国产厂
AI 高速光模块需求+国产替代带来成长机遇

products.name: 光器件 / 光模块
products.description: 从光芯片到光模块整机,少数掌握部分核心光芯片的国产厂。

news.title: 国产光模块加速出海,800G 批量交付
news.summary: 800G 光模块批量供货,硅光与相干技术布局完整;国产算力建设(智算中心)带来国内需求增量。

tianfu.name: 天孚通信
tianfu.oneLiner: 光器件配套龙头，光模块「卖铲人」。
tianfu.business: 光器件、陶瓷套管、光引擎等配套，深度绑定头部光模块厂。
tianfu.oneLinerEn: A leader in optical-component subassemblies — the picks-and-shovels of optical modules.
tianfu.tagline: 为光模块提供精密器件
tianfu.businessEn: Optical passive/active components and subassemblies — a high-margin "picks-and-shovels" supplier to optical-module makers.
tianfu.description: 天孚通信是中国光器件配套的龙头,是光模块产业链里典型的「卖铲人的卖铲人」。光模块由许多精密光器件组装而成——陶瓷插芯、透镜、隔离器、光引擎、封装外壳等,天孚专注做这些上游的无源光器件与配套件,供给中际旭创、新易盛等下游光模块大厂。AI 数据中心需要海量高速光模块做 GPU 互联,这直接拉动上游光器件需求,天孚作为核心配套厂「水涨船高」,且因其在多个关键器件上的领先地位,盈利能力和成长性都很突出。相比整机竞争激烈的光模块环节,天孚卡位在壁垒高、格局好的器件环节。作为 AI 光互联产业链上游的关键一员,天孚通信是 AI 基建投资中受益明确、质地扎实的中国光通信标的之一。
tianfu.descriptionEn: T&S Communications (Tianfu) is a leader in China's optical-component supply, a classic "seller of shovels to the shovel-sellers" in the optical-module chain. Optical modules are assembled from many precision optical components — ceramic ferrules, lenses, isolators, optical engines, packaging housings — and Tianfu focuses on these upstream passive optical components and parts, supplying downstream module makers like Innolight and Eoptolink. AI data centers need vast high-speed optical modules for GPU interconnect, directly driving demand for upstream optical components, and as a core supplier Tianfu "rises with the tide," with standout profitability and growth thanks to its lead in several key components. Compared with the fiercely competitive module-assembly stage, Tianfu is positioned in the higher-barrier, better-structured component stage. As a key upstream member of the AI optical-interconnect chain, T&S is one of the clear beneficiaries and solid Chinese optical-communications names in AI-infrastructure investment.
whyItMatters: 中国光器件配套龙头,「卖铲人的卖铲人」
专做插芯/透镜/隔离器/光引擎等上游无源器件
供中际旭创/新易盛,AI 光互联拉动上游需求
卡位高壁垒器件环节,盈利与成长突出

products.name: 光器件配套
products.description: 插芯、透镜、光引擎等上游无源光器件,光模块「卖铲人」。

news.title: 光引擎与无源器件量价齐升,业绩高增长
news.summary: AI 光模块放量带动上游器件需求,高速光引擎(用于 CPO/光模块)成为新增长点,产能持续扩张。

yuanjie.name: 源杰科技
yuanjie.oneLiner: 国产高速光芯片(激光器)代表。
yuanjie.business: DFB/EML 激光器芯片，国产替代上游光芯片的关键力量。
yuanjie.oneLinerEn: A representative of domestic high-speed optical chips (lasers).
yuanjie.taglineEn: Breaking through in domestic optical chips
yuanjie.businessEn: Domestic high-speed laser chips (DFB/EML) — the most upstream part of optical modules.
yuanjie.description: 源杰科技(Yuanjie)是国产高速光芯片(激光器芯片)的代表厂商,专注做光模块里最核心、也最难国产化的发光元件——激光器芯片(如 DFB、EML 等)。光模块负责数据中心的光电转换,而其中把电信号变成光的「激光器芯片」长期被海外厂商主导,是国产光通信产业链上最需要突破的「卡脖子」环节之一。源杰专注自研高速激光器芯片,推动这一关键上游器件的国产替代。AI 数据中心对高速光模块(400G、800G 乃至 1.6T)需求爆发,而高速光模块又受制于上游激光器芯片的供给,这让高端光芯片供不应求、价值凸显,给源杰这样的国产光芯片厂带来成长机遇。作为国产高速光芯片的代表,源杰科技处在 AI 光互联产业链最上游、且国产化最迫切、壁垒最高的激光器芯片环节。
yuanjie.descriptionEn: Yuanjie is a representative maker of domestic high-speed optical chips (laser chips), focused on the most core and hardest-to-localize light-emitting element in optical modules — laser chips (like DFB and EML). Optical modules handle opto-electronic conversion in data centers, and the "laser chip" that turns electrical signals into light has long been dominated by overseas makers, one of the most "chokepoint" links in the domestic optical-communications chain needing breakthrough. Yuanjie focuses on in-house high-speed laser chips, advancing domestic substitution of this key upstream component. Exploding AI-data-center demand for high-speed optical modules (400G, 800G, 1.6T), constrained by upstream laser-chip supply, makes high-end optical chips sold out and highly valued, bringing growth opportunities to domestic optical-chip makers like Yuanjie. As a representative of domestic high-speed optical chips, Yuanjie sits in the most upstream, most localization-urgent, highest-barrier laser-chip link of the AI optical-interconnect chain.
whyItMatters: 国产高速光芯片(激光器芯片)代表厂商
专注光模块里最核心、最难国产化的激光器芯片
激光器芯片长期被海外主导,「卡脖子」环节
AI 高速光模块需求爆发,高端光芯片供不应求

products.name: 高速光芯片 (激光器)
products.description: 国产 DFB/EML 等高速激光器芯片,光模块最上游卡脖子环节。

news.title: 国产高速激光器芯片突破,受益光芯片国产化
news.summary: 100G EML 等高速激光器芯片验证突破,数据中心客户导入;国产光芯片替代空间打开。

leadership.name: 张欣刚 (Zhang Xingang)
leadership.title: 创始人、董事长兼总经理

mtsi.name: MACOM
mtsi.oneLiner: 高速模拟与光电芯片(激光驱动器/TIA)供应商。
mtsi.oneLinerEn: A supplier of high-speed analog and optoelectronic chips (laser drivers/TIAs).
mtsi.tagline: 为光与射频提供关键器件
mtsi.subcategory: 高速模拟 / 光电器件
mtsi.business: 光模块用的激光驱动器、跨阻放大器(TIA)与高速模拟/射频芯片，光通信上游关键器件。
mtsi.businessEn: Laser drivers, transimpedance amplifiers (TIAs) and high-speed analog/RF chips for optical modules — key upstream optical components.
mtsi.description: MACOM(MTSI)是高速模拟与光电半导体的重要供应商,专注在光通信、射频与微波、以及高速数据传输等对性能要求极高的领域。它和 AI 的连接点在光模块:数据中心里做「光电转换」的高速光模块,内部需要激光驱动器、跨阻放大器(TIA)等模拟/光电芯片来驱动激光、放大微弱光信号,MACOM 正是这类高速模拟芯片的关键供应商。AI 数据中心对 400G、800G 乃至 1.6T 高速光互联需求爆发,直接拉动对这些底层高速模拟/光电芯片的需求。除数据中心外,MACOM 在国防雷达、卫星、5G 等射频微波领域也有深厚积累。作为光互联产业链里「模拟/光电芯片」这一关键但常被忽视环节的供应商,MACOM 是 AI 网络提速背后的隐形受益者之一。
mtsi.descriptionEn: MACOM (MTSI) is an important supplier of high-speed analog and photonic semiconductors, focused on demanding areas like optical communications, RF and microwave, and high-speed data transmission. Its link to AI is optical modules: the high-speed optical modules that do "opto-electronic conversion" in data centers need analog/photonic chips like laser drivers and transimpedance amplifiers (TIAs) to drive lasers and amplify faint optical signals, and MACOM is a key supplier of such high-speed analog chips. Exploding AI-data-center demand for 400G, 800G and 1.6T high-speed optical interconnect directly drives demand for these underlying high-speed analog/photonic chips. Beyond data centers, MACOM has deep expertise in defense radar, satellite and 5G RF/microwave. As a supplier of the key-but-often-overlooked "analog/photonic chip" link in the optical-interconnect chain, MACOM is one of the hidden beneficiaries behind AI networking speed-ups.
whyItMatters: 高速模拟与光电半导体重要供应商
光模块内的激光驱动器/TIA 关键供应商
AI 400G/800G/1.6T 光互联爆发,拉动底层模拟/光电芯片
另有国防雷达/卫星/5G 射频微波深厚积累

products.name: 激光驱动器 / TIA
products.description: 光模块内驱动激光、放大光信号的高速模拟/光电芯片。

news.title: 数据中心光电芯片需求强劲,业绩稳步增长
news.summary: 激光驱动器/TIA 随 800G/1.6T 光模块放量,国防射频与卫星通信同步景气。

smtc.name: Semtech
smtc.oneLiner: 光模块信号芯片与 LoRa 物联网。
smtc.oneLinerEn: Optical-module signal chips plus LoRa IoT.
smtc.tagline: 连接万物的模拟与混合信号
smtc.taglineEn: Analog and mixed-signal that connect everything
smtc.business: 光通信 CDR/PMD 信号芯片、模拟混合信号 IC 与 LoRa 物联网，受益 AI 数据中心光互联。
smtc.businessEn: Optical CDR/PMD signal chips, analog/mixed-signal ICs and LoRa IoT — benefiting from AI-data-center optical interconnect.
smtc.description: Semtech 有两块主要业务。一是光通信/数据中心的信号芯片——如时钟数据恢复(CDR)、物理介质相关(PMD)器件与各类模拟混合信号 IC,用于把高速信号在光模块、铜缆里可靠地收发;它收购 Sierra Wireless 后也拓展了连接业务,并推出面向 AI 机柜内铜缆的 CopperEdge 等方案。二是 LoRa——一种低功耗广域物联网无线技术,Semtech 是 LoRa 芯片的核心供应商,广泛用于智慧城市、农业、资产追踪等 IoT 场景。AI 数据中心对高速互联的需求让 Semtech 的信号芯片业务受益,而 LoRa 则提供物联网侧的长期增长。
smtc.descriptionEn: Semtech has two main businesses. First, signal chips for optical communications/data centers — such as clock-data recovery (CDR), physical-medium-dependent (PMD) devices and various analog/mixed-signal ICs used to reliably transmit and receive high-speed signals in optical modules and copper cables; after acquiring Sierra Wireless it expanded connectivity, and it offers solutions like CopperEdge for in-rack AI copper cabling. Second, LoRa — a low-power wide-area IoT wireless technology for which Semtech is the core chip supplier, widely used in smart cities, agriculture and asset tracking. AI-data-center demand for high-speed interconnect benefits Semtech's signal-chip business, while LoRa provides long-term IoT-side growth.
whyItMatters: 光通信 CDR/PMD 与模拟混合信号芯片
收购 Sierra Wireless,推 CopperEdge 等 AI 铜缆方案
LoRa 低功耗广域物联网核心供应商
AI 高速互联 + IoT 双轮

products.name: 光模块信号芯片 / LoRa
products.description: 光模块用信号芯片(CDR/DSP)与 LoRa 物联网芯片。

news.title: 光模块 CDR/DSP 芯片受益 AI 光互联放量
news.summary: CopperEdge/FiberEdge 切入 800G/1.6T 光模块与有源铜缆,数据中心业务高增长,LoRa 物联网稳定。

jnpr.name: 瞻博网络
jnpr.oneLiner: 数据中心与电信网络设备商（已并入 HPE）。
jnpr.oneLinerEn: A data-center and telecom networking vendor (now part of HPE).
jnpr.tagline: 由 AI 驱动的网络
jnpr.subcategory: 路由 / 交换 / AI 运维
jnpr.business: 路由器、交换机与 AI 驱动的网络运维(Mist)，光模块的下游买家。
jnpr.businessEn: Routers, switches and AI-driven network operations (Mist); a downstream buyer of optical modules.
jnpr.description: 瞻博网络(Juniper)是老牌的数据中心与电信网络设备商,做高性能路由器、交换机与网络软件。它的一大差异化是 Mist——用 AI 做「网络运维」(自动发现故障、优化 WiFi 与网络性能),主打「AI 原生网络」。作为网络设备商,Juniper 是光模块、连接芯片等的下游买家,也直接受益于 AI 数据中心对高速网络的需求。2025 年 7 月,慧与(HPE)以约 140 亿美元完成对 Juniper 的收购,把两家的网络业务合并,一举让 HPE 的网络规模翻倍、补强 AI 网络组合。Juniper 从此并入 HPE 体系。
jnpr.descriptionEn: Juniper Networks is a veteran data-center and telecom networking vendor making high-performance routers, switches and network software. A key differentiation is Mist — using AI for "network operations" (auto-detecting faults, optimizing WiFi and network performance), branded "AI-Native Networking." As a network-equipment vendor, Juniper is a downstream buyer of optical modules and connectivity chips and benefits directly from AI-data-center demand for high-speed networking. In July 2025 HPE completed its ~$14 billion acquisition of Juniper, merging the two companies' networking businesses to roughly double HPE's networking scale and strengthen its AI-networking portfolio. Juniper is now part of HPE.
whyItMatters: 老牌数据中心/电信网络设备商
Mist 用 AI 做网络运维,「AI 原生网络」
光模块/连接芯片下游买家,AI 网络需求受益
2025.7 被 HPE 约 140 亿美元收购,并入 HPE

products.name: 网络设备 / Mist
products.description: 数据中心与电信网络设备,AI 驱动的 Mist 网络,已并入 HPE。

news.title: 并入 HPE 完成,Mist AI 网络成整合核心
news.summary: HPE 以约 140 亿美元完成对瞻博的收购,AI 驱动的 Mist 网络平台成为 HPE 网络业务的核心。

leadership.name: Rami Rahim
leadership.title: HPE 网络业务执行副总裁兼总经理（原 Juniper CEO，2025 年被 HPE 收购）

eric.name: 爱立信
eric.oneLiner: 全球电信网络设备巨头。
eric.taglineEn: Making the limitless connected world possible
eric.business: 5G/电信无线与传输网络设备，光传输是其重要一环。
eric.businessEn: 5G/telecom radio and transport networking equipment, with optical transport as an important piece.
eric.description: 爱立信(Ericsson)是全球电信网络设备三巨头之一(与诺基亚、华为并列),核心是给运营商建 5G/4G 移动网络——基站、无线接入网(RAN)、核心网与传输网。它是移动通信基础设施的支柱级供应商。在 AI 语境下,爱立信一方面把 AI 用于网络自身(智能优化、节能、自动化运维),另一方面随着 AI 把海量数据推向网络边缘、以及「电信级 + 卫星」融合,它的传输与网络能力也被重新重视;它还与超大规模云厂合作、开放网络 API 探索新模式。相比纯 AI 弹性标的,爱立信更偏「稳健的通信基建」一极,是 AI 时代连接层的重要一员。
eric.descriptionEn: Ericsson is one of the world's big-three telecom-equipment vendors (alongside Nokia and Huawei), centered on building 5G/4G mobile networks for operators — base stations, radio access network (RAN), core network and transport. It is a pillar supplier of mobile-communications infrastructure. In the AI context, Ericsson applies AI to the network itself (intelligent optimization, energy saving, automated operations), and as AI pushes vast data toward the network edge and "telecom + satellite" converges, its transport and networking capabilities gain renewed importance; it also partners with hyperscalers and explores open network APIs. Compared with pure AI-elasticity names, Ericsson is more the "steady communications-infrastructure" pole — an important member of the connectivity layer in the AI era.
whyItMatters: 全球电信设备三巨头之一,给运营商建 5G
基站/RAN/核心网/传输,移动基建支柱供应商
把 AI 用于网络优化/节能/自动化运维
AI 推数据到边缘、电信+卫星融合,连接层重要一员

products.name: 5G / 电信网络设备
products.description: 全球电信网络设备巨头,与诺基亚、华为竞争。

news.title: 5G 企业专网与 AI 网络自动化寻找新增长
news.summary: 电信资本开支疲软下转向企业市场与 AI 运维自动化;与运营商探索 AI RAN(无线接入网智能化)。

leadership.name: Börje Ekholm
leadership.title: 总裁兼 CEO（2026-09-30 卸任，继任者 Per Narvinger）

ceg.name: Constellation
ceg.oneLiner: 美国最大核电运营商，直接给 AI 数据中心供电。
ceg.oneLinerEn: The largest U.S. nuclear operator, supplying power directly to AI data centers.
ceg.business: 核电为主的无碳电力生产，与微软等签署数据中心长期供电协议（含重启三里岛）。
ceg.businessEn: Mostly nuclear carbon-free power generation, with long-term data-center supply deals such as Microsoft's (including restarting Three Mile Island).
ceg.description: Constellation Energy(2022 年从爱克斯龙 Exelon 分拆)是美国最大的核电运营商,掌握全美最大的无碳发电机队。核电的独特价值在于「24 小时稳定的基荷电力」——这正是 AI 数据中心最需要的。它与微软签下 20 年供电协议、重启三里岛 Unit 1(更名 Crane 清洁能源中心、约 835MW,预计 2028 年并网、专供微软 AI 数据中心),成为「AI + 核电」叙事的标志性事件。稳定的无碳电力 + 与科技巨头绑定的长期合约,让 Constellation 从传统公用事业股变成 AI 电力的核心标的。
ceg.descriptionEn: Constellation Energy (spun off from Exelon in 2022) is the largest U.S. nuclear operator, with the nation's biggest carbon-free generation fleet. Nuclear's unique value is 24/7 stable baseload power — exactly what AI data centers need most. It signed a 20-year supply deal with Microsoft to restart Three Mile Island Unit 1 (rebranded the Crane Clean Energy Center, ~835MW, expected online in 2028, dedicated to Microsoft's AI data centers), a landmark of the "AI + nuclear" story. Stable carbon-free power plus long-term contracts tied to tech giants have turned Constellation from a traditional utility into a core AI-power name.
whyItMatters: 美国最大核电运营商,最大无碳发电机队
核电 24 小时基荷,正是 AI 数据中心刚需
微软 20 年协议、重启三里岛专供 AI
「AI + 核电」叙事标志性玩家

products.name: 核电运营
products.description: 美国最大核电运营商,直接为 AI 数据中心提供无碳基荷电力。

news.title: 完成 164 亿美元收购 Calpine，坐拥核电+燃气近 60 GW 发电资产
news.summary: Constellation 于 2026 年 1 月 7 日完成对 Calpine 164 亿美元的收购，将美国最大核电机队（32.4 GW）与 Calpine 约 26 GW 现代燃气及全球最大地热综合体 The Geysers 合并，强化对 AI 数据中心的供电能力。

news.title: 与 Meta 签 20 年核电协议,为其伊利诺伊数据中心供电
news.summary: Meta 自 2027 年起采购 Constellation 旗下 Clinton 核电站的无碳电力(扩产 30MW);Meta 同期还与 Vistra、TerraPower、Oklo 签约,合计最高 6.6GW 核电,支撑其 Prometheus 超算集群。

news.title: 签约为 CyrusOne 德州新数据中心供电 380 MW，2026 年 EPS 指引 …
news.summary: 完成 Calpine 收购后不久，公司宣布一项 380 MW 供电协议，服务 CyrusOne 在德州的新数据中心；管理层确认 2026 全年调整后运营每股收益指引 11.00-12.00 美元，同比提升约 20%。

vst.name: Vistra
vst.oneLiner: 综合电力生产商，核电 + 燃气 + 储能。
vst.oneLinerEn: An integrated power producer spanning nuclear, gas and storage.
vst.subcategory: 核电 / 燃气 / 储能
vst.business: 发电与零售电力，收购核电资产受益 AI 用电激增。
vst.businessEn: Power generation and retail electricity; its nuclear acquisitions benefit from surging AI electricity demand.
vst.description: Vistra 是美国的综合性电力生产商,拥有多元化的发电资产组合——核电、天然气发电、以及正在扩张的储能(它是美国最大的电池储能运营商之一),既发电也向零售市场卖电。它精准踩中了 AI 时代的电力主题:AI 数据中心用电激增,让电力(尤其是稳定、清洁的基荷电力)变得炙手可热,而 Vistra 手握核电(无碳基荷)和燃气(灵活调峰)等宝贵发电资产,价值凸显。它还收购核电资产、并探索为数据中心直接供电等模式,业绩和股价随「AI 用电」预期大幅上涨。相比纯可再生或纯化石的发电商,Vistra 的核电 + 燃气 + 储能组合让它能同时提供稳定基荷和灵活调节,更契合 AI 数据中心对可靠电力的需求。作为综合电力生产商,Vistra 是「AI 推动用电激增、优质发电资产稀缺」这一主题下最直接的电力受益者之一。
vst.descriptionEn: Vistra is a U.S. integrated power producer with a diversified generation portfolio — nuclear, natural-gas generation and expanding storage (it's one of America's largest battery-storage operators) — generating power and selling it to retail markets. It precisely hit the AI era's power theme: surging AI-data-center electricity use makes power (especially stable, clean baseload) hot, and Vistra's valuable assets in nuclear (carbon-free baseload) and gas (flexible peaking) stand out. It has acquired nuclear assets and explores models like directly powering data centers, with earnings and stock rising sharply on "AI power" expectations. Compared with pure-renewable or pure-fossil generators, Vistra's nuclear + gas + storage mix lets it provide both stable baseload and flexible adjustment, better fitting AI data centers' need for reliable power. As an integrated power producer, Vistra is one of the most direct power beneficiaries under the theme of "AI driving surging electricity demand and scarce quality generation assets."
whyItMatters: 美国综合电力生产商,核电+燃气+储能多元组合
AI 用电激增让稳定清洁基荷电力炙手可热
手握核电(无碳基荷)与燃气(灵活调峰)宝贵资产
探索为数据中心直接供电,业绩股价大幅上涨

products.name: 核电 / 燃气 / 储能
products.description: 多元发电组合,为 AI 用电激增提供稳定与灵活电力。

news.title: Vistra 探索为数据中心直接供电，核电加燃气资产随 AI 用电预期大涨
news.summary: AI 数据中心用电激增让稳定清洁的基荷电力炙手可热，Vistra 手握核电与燃气资产并收购核电、探索为数据中心直供电，业绩和股价随「AI 用电」预期大幅上涨。

oklo.name: Oklo
oklo.oneLiner: 先进核裂变 / SMR 新锐，Sam Altman 押注。
oklo.oneLinerEn: An advanced fission / SMR upstart backed by Sam Altman.
oklo.business: 小型模块化反应堆(微堆)，瞄准数据中心专属供电。
oklo.businessEn: Small modular (micro) reactors aimed at dedicated power for data centers.
oklo.description: Oklo 成立于 2013 年,是先进核裂变的明星新锐,主打 Aurora「微堆」——一种小型快中子反应堆,可就地为数据中心等提供长期、无碳、稳定的专属电力,还能用核废料再利用作燃料。它采用「自建自营、卖电而非卖堆」的商业模式(签长期购电协议 PPA)。公司由 Sam Altman 长期支持(曾任董事长),通过 SPAC 上市(NYSE: OKLO),踩中 AI 对专属电力的渴求而备受追捧。2026 年其 Aurora 在爱达荷的首堆推进 NRC 许可、力争实现临界,是「AI 专属核电」最受关注的标的,但也面临监管周期长、尚未商业化发电的风险。
oklo.descriptionEn: Founded in 2013, Oklo is a star advanced-fission upstart built around its Aurora "powerhouse" — a small fast reactor that can provide long-term, carbon-free, stable dedicated power on-site for data centers and others, and can even reuse nuclear waste as fuel. It uses a "build-own-operate, sell power not reactors" model (signing long-term PPAs). Long backed by Sam Altman (a former chairman), it went public via SPAC (NYSE: OKLO) and has been sought after as AI's hunger for dedicated power grows. In 2026 its first Aurora in Idaho advanced through NRC licensing toward criticality, making it the most-watched "AI dedicated nuclear" name — though it faces long regulatory timelines and is not yet generating commercially.
whyItMatters: Aurora「微堆」为数据中心就地供专属核电
自建自营、卖电(PPA)而非卖堆的商业模式
Sam Altman 长期押注,踩中 AI 专属电力需求
2026 推进 NRC 许可,但尚未商业化、监管周期长

products.name: Aurora
products.description: 小型先进裂变微堆,Sam Altman 押注,面向数据中心供电。

news.title: Groves 试验堆获 DOE 最终安全批准,目标 2026 年 7 月首次临界
news.summary: 首个在私有土地、全商业化燃料/设备的先进反应堆获 DOE 文件化安全分析批准;Aurora 电站在爱达荷国家实验室亦获初步批准;并与英伟达、洛斯阿拉莫斯合作推进核燃料验证与「核能 AI 工厂」。

smr.name: NuScale
smr.oneLiner: 小型模块化反应堆(SMR)先行者。
smr.business: 首个获 NRC 认证的 SMR 设计，面向数据中心等专属电力需求。
smr.businessEn: A pioneer of small modular reactors (SMRs) with an NRC-certified design, targeting data-center and utility power.
smr.description: NuScale Power 是小型模块化反应堆(SMR)的先行者,也是美国首个获核管会(NRC)设计认证的 SMR 公司。SMR 的思路是把核反应堆做小、模块化、工厂预制,再运到现场组装,以求更安全、更快、更灵活地建核电。NuScale 曾有一个旗舰示范项目(UAMPS),但因成本超支在 2023 年取消,一度受挫;此后随着 AI 数据中心对无碳基荷电力的渴求,SMR 重新受追捧,NuScale 转向数据中心等新客户寻求订单。作为最早拿到设计认证的 SMR 公司,NuScale 技术领先,但也和整个 SMR 行业一样,面临「从设计认证到真正建成发电」的落地考验。
smr.descriptionEn: NuScale Power is a pioneer of small modular reactors (SMRs) and the first U.S. SMR company to win NRC design certification. The SMR idea is to make reactors small, modular and factory-prefabricated, then assembled on site, for safer, faster, more flexible nuclear power. NuScale had a flagship demonstration project (UAMPS) that was cancelled in 2023 over cost overruns, a setback; since then, as AI data centers crave carbon-free baseload power, SMRs are sought after again, and NuScale has pivoted toward data-center and other new customers. As the earliest SMR company with design certification, NuScale leads technically, but — like the whole SMR industry — faces the test of "from design certification to actually building and generating power."
whyItMatters: SMR 先行者,美国首个获 NRC 设计认证
反应堆做小、模块化、工厂预制
旗舰项目 2023 取消受挫,后转向数据中心客户
技术领先,但面临「认证到建成发电」落地考验

products.name: NuScale Power Module
products.description: 首个获 NRC 设计认证的小型模块化反应堆(SMR)。

news.title: AI 算力渴求无碳基荷电力，NuScale 转向数据中心客户重获追捧
news.summary: 旗舰示范项目 UAMPS 因成本超支于 2023 年取消后，NuScale 借 AI 数据中心对无碳基荷电力的渴求重新受追捧，正转向数据中心等新客户寻求订单，但仍面临从设计认证到建成发电的落地考验。

cat.name: 卡特彼勒
cat.oneLiner: 工程机械巨头，也是数据中心备用 / 就地发电主力。
cat.business: 工程机械与燃气 / 柴油发电机组，AI 数据中心抢电期的供电设备供应商。
cat.oneLinerEn: A construction-machinery giant and a mainstay of data-center backup/on-site power.
cat.subcategory: 工程机械 / 发电机组
cat.businessEn: Construction and mining equipment plus power generation (backup gensets and Solar Turbines) for data centers.
cat.description: 卡特彼勒(Caterpillar)是全球工程机械与矿山设备的巨头(那些黄色的挖掘机、推土机),但它还有一块被 AI 带火的业务:发电。数据中心需要可靠的备用电源(市电断了也不能停机),以及在电网接入排队时的「就地发电」——卡特的柴油/燃气发电机组、以及旗下 Solar Turbines 的燃气轮机,正好满足这些需求。AI 数据中心狂建,让卡特的备用与就地发电设备订单大增。作为「卖水人」,卡特一头连着基建与矿业周期(矿业又受益于 AI 对铜等金属的需求),一头连着 AI 数据中心的供电需求,是这轮 AI 电力叙事里的意外受益者之一。
cat.descriptionEn: Caterpillar is a global giant of construction and mining equipment (those yellow excavators and bulldozers), but it also has a business AI has energized: power generation. Data centers need reliable backup power (they can't go down if grid power fails) and "on-site generation" while waiting in grid-interconnection queues — and Cat's diesel/gas gensets and its Solar Turbines gas turbines fit these needs. The AI-data-center building frenzy has boosted orders for Cat's backup and on-site generation equipment. As a picks-and-shovels player, Cat is tied to infrastructure and mining cycles (mining itself benefits from AI's demand for copper and other metals) on one side and AI-data-center power needs on the other — an unexpected beneficiary of this AI-power story.
whyItMatters: 全球工程机械与矿山设备巨头
发电业务受 AI 带火:数据中心备用/就地发电
柴油/燃气发电机组 + Solar Turbines 燃气轮机
连着矿业周期(AI 铜需求)与数据中心供电

products.name: 工程机械 / 发电机组
products.description: 黄色工程机械龙头,柴油/燃气发电机组+Solar Turbines 供数据中心。

news.title: 数据中心备用与就地发电需求爆发，卡特彼勒发电机组订单大增
news.summary: AI 数据中心狂建带来可靠备电与电网排队期就地发电的硬需求，卡特彼勒的柴油/燃气发电机组和旗下 Solar Turbines 燃气轮机订单大增，同时矿业板块还受益于 AI 对铜等金属的需求。

cmi.name: 康明斯
cmi.oneLiner: 发动机与发电机组龙头。
cmi.business: 发电机组、发动机与电力系统，数据中心备电常用。
cmi.oneLinerEn: A leader in engines and power-generation gensets.
cmi.taglineEn: Innovating for a more prosperous world
cmi.businessEn: Engines and power-generation gensets (backup power for data centers) plus Accelera (hydrogen/electrolyzers).
cmi.description: 康明斯(Cummins)是全球发动机与发电机组的龙头,以柴油/天然气发动机闻名,广泛用于卡车、工程机械、船舶等。它与 AI 相关的核心是发电业务:AI 数据中心需要大功率、可靠的备用发电机组——一旦市电中断,发电机要在几秒内顶上,保证成千上万张 GPU 的集群不断电;在等待电网接入排队时,发电机组也能提供就地供电。AI 数据中心爆发式建设,让康明斯的备用与就地发电订单大增,数据中心成为它增长最快的业务之一。此外,它还通过 Accelera 部门布局氢能与电解槽,面向能源转型。作为发电设备的核心供应商,康明斯精准受益于「AI 数据中心必须有可靠后备与就地电力」这一硬需求,是 AI 电力叙事里既传统又直接的工业受益者之一。
cmi.descriptionEn: Cummins is a global leader in engines and power-generation gensets, famous for diesel/natural-gas engines widely used in trucks, construction machinery and ships. Its AI-relevant core is power generation: AI data centers need high-power, reliable backup gensets — if grid power fails, gensets must kick in within seconds to keep clusters of thousands of GPUs running; and while waiting in grid-interconnection queues, gensets can provide on-site power. The explosive build-out of AI data centers has boosted Cummins's backup and on-site power orders, making data centers one of its fastest-growing businesses. It also positions for the energy transition through its Accelera segment for hydrogen and electrolyzers. As a core supplier of power-generation equipment, Cummins benefits precisely from the hard need that "AI data centers must have reliable backup and on-site power" — a traditional yet direct industrial beneficiary in the AI-power narrative.
whyItMatters: 全球发动机与发电机组龙头,柴油/天然气发动机闻名
数据中心需大功率可靠备用发电机组,秒级顶上
市电断保 GPU 集群不断电,排队时就地供电
数据中心成最快增长业务,Accelera 布局氢能

products.name: 发动机 / 发电机组
products.description: 全球发动机与发电机组龙头,数据中心备用/就地发电。

news.title: AI 数据中心备电需求拉动订单，数据中心成康明斯增长最快业务
news.summary: AI 数据中心需要秒级顶上的大功率备用发电机组以保障 GPU 集群不断电，爆发式建设让康明斯备用与就地发电订单大增，数据中心成为其增长最快的业务之一，并通过 Accelera 布局氢能。

harmonic.name: 哈默纳科
harmonic.oneLiner: 谐波减速器全球龙头，人形机器人关节核心。
harmonic.oneLinerEn: The global leader in harmonic reducers — core of humanoid-robot joints.
harmonic.tagline: 以精密传动驱动机器人
harmonic.business: 谐波减速器(精密减速器)，是人形机器人关节的关键零部件，全球份额领先。
harmonic.businessEn: Harmonic (strain-wave) reducers — a key part in humanoid-robot joints, with leading global share.
harmonic.description: 哈默纳科(Harmonic Drive)是谐波减速器的全球龙头(日本),长期近乎垄断这一高端精密部件市场。谐波减速器是机器人关节里的核心零件——它能把电机的高速旋转精准地减速、放大扭矩,同时做到体积小、精度高、回差小,让机器人关节实现既精确又有力的运动。工业机器人、协作机器人、尤其人形机器人的每一个关节,都高度依赖这种减速器。哈默纳科以数十年积累的技术和工艺,做出了性能顶尖、可靠性极高的谐波减速器,是全球高端机器人关节的标准供应商,壁垒极深。在人形机器人量产浪潮下,每台机器人要用到多个谐波减速器,需求空间被极大打开,哈默纳科作为该领域绝对龙头直接受益。作为机器人「关节」核心精密部件的全球标杆,哈默纳科是具身智能硬件产业链里不可或缺、且议价能力很强的一环。
harmonic.descriptionEn: Harmonic Drive is the global leader in harmonic reducers (Japan), long nearly monopolizing this high-end precision-component market. A harmonic reducer is a core part in robot joints — it precisely reduces a motor's high-speed rotation and amplifies torque while being compact, high-precision and low-backlash, letting robot joints move both precisely and powerfully. Every joint of industrial robots, collaborative robots and especially humanoid robots relies heavily on such reducers. With decades of accumulated technology and craftsmanship, Harmonic Drive makes top-performance, highly reliable harmonic reducers — the standard supplier for high-end robot joints worldwide, with very deep barriers. In the humanoid-robot mass-production wave, each robot uses several harmonic reducers, greatly opening up demand, and as the absolute leader Harmonic Drive benefits directly. As the global benchmark for robot "joint" core precision components, Harmonic Drive is an indispensable, strong-pricing-power link in the embodied-intelligence hardware chain.
whyItMatters: 谐波减速器全球龙头(日本),近乎垄断高端市场
谐波减速器是机器人关节核心零件,减速放大扭矩
数十年技术工艺,高端机器人关节标准供应商,壁垒极深
人形机器人每台用多个,需求空间极大打开

products.name: 谐波减速器
products.description: 机器人关节核心精密减速器,全球龙头,近乎垄断高端市场。

news.title: 人形机器人量产浪潮打开需求空间，哈默纳科谐波减速器龙头地位受益
news.summary: 每台人形机器人的关节都要用到多个谐波减速器，量产浪潮极大打开需求空间。哈默纳科凭数十年技术工艺近乎垄断高端市场，是具身智能硬件产业链中议价能力很强的一环。

teradyne.name: 泰瑞达
teradyne.oneLiner: 半导体测试设备 + 协作机器人(Universal Robots)。
teradyne.business: 芯片测试设备，并通过 Universal Robots 做协作机械臂，横跨芯片与机器人。
teradyne.oneLinerEn: Semiconductor test equipment plus collaborative robots (Universal Robots).
teradyne.taglineEn: The power of test and automation
teradyne.industry: 半导体设备 / 机器人
teradyne.subcategory: 测试设备 / 协作机器人
teradyne.businessEn: Semiconductor and system test equipment, plus collaborative and mobile robots (Universal Robots, MiR).
teradyne.description: 泰瑞达(Teradyne)有两块与 AI 高度相关的业务:半导体测试设备和协作机器人。一是芯片测试:芯片造出来后必须经过严格测试才能出货,泰瑞达是全球自动测试设备(ATE)的龙头之一,做测试 AI 芯片、存储、SoC 等的设备。AI 芯片越来越复杂、HBM 等先进封装越来越多,测试的难度和价值量都在上升,直接拉动泰瑞达的测试设备需求。二是机器人:泰瑞达旗下拥有协作机器人(cobot)的开创者优傲机器人(Universal Robots)和移动机器人公司 MiR——协作机器人是能安全地和人一起工作、易于部署的轻型机械臂,是制造业自动化的重要力量,也随着 AI 让机器人更智能而受益。作为「AI 芯片测试 + 协作机器人」两条线兼具的公司,泰瑞达同时卡位半导体制造后端和智能制造两大 AI 相关趋势。
teradyne.descriptionEn: Teradyne has two businesses highly relevant to AI: semiconductor test equipment and collaborative robots. First, chip test: chips must be rigorously tested before shipping, and Teradyne is one of the global leaders in automatic test equipment (ATE), making equipment to test AI chips, memory and SoCs. As AI chips grow more complex and advanced packaging like HBM proliferates, test difficulty and value rise, directly driving demand for Teradyne's test equipment. Second, robotics: Teradyne owns Universal Robots, the pioneer of collaborative robots (cobots), and mobile-robot company MiR — cobots are lightweight robot arms that safely work alongside humans and deploy easily, an important force in manufacturing automation that also benefits as AI makes robots smarter. As a company with both "AI-chip test + collaborative robots," Teradyne is positioned in two AI-related trends at once: semiconductor back-end manufacturing and smart manufacturing.
whyItMatters: 两块 AI 相关业务:半导体测试设备 + 协作机器人
芯片测试(ATE)龙头,AI 芯片复杂化拉动测试需求
旗下优傲(Universal Robots)是协作机器人开创者
同时卡位半导体后端与智能制造两大趋势

products.name: 半导体测试设备
products.description: AI 芯片、存储、SoC 的自动测试设备(ATE)。

products.name: Universal Robots
products.description: 协作机器人(cobot)开创者。

news.title: AI 芯片与 HBM 先进封装复杂化，泰瑞达测试设备需求持续上升
news.summary: AI 芯片日益复杂、HBM 等先进封装增多，使芯片测试的难度与价值量同步上升，直接拉动泰瑞达 ATE 设备需求；旗下优傲协作机器人与 MiR 移动机器人同时卡位智能制造趋势。

asml.name: 阿斯麦
asml.oneLiner: 全球唯一 EUV 光刻机供应商，半导体设备皇冠上的明珠。
asml.oneLinerEn: The world's only EUV lithography supplier — the crown jewel of chip equipment.
asml.tagline: 缩小的极限，前进的动力
asml.taglineEn: Pushing the limits of what's possible in chips
asml.business: 光刻机（含独家 EUV/High-NA EUV），先进制程绕不开它，是整个芯片产业的咽喉。
asml.businessEn: Lithography machines (including the exclusive EUV/High-NA EUV) that no advanced node can bypass — the chokepoint of the entire chip industry.
asml.description: 阿斯麦(ASML)是全球唯一能生产 EUV(极紫外)光刻机的公司,是半导体设备「皇冠上的明珠」,也是整个先进芯片制造中最关键、最不可替代的一环。光刻是芯片制造的核心步骤——用光把纳米级的电路图案「印」到晶圆上,而要做出最先进的芯片(7nm 及以下),就必须用到 EUV 光刻机。这种机器极其复杂昂贵(一台上亿欧元)、集成了全球顶尖的光学、精密机械等技术,而全世界只有 ASML 能造。这让 ASML 处在一个近乎绝对垄断、且被视为地缘战略资产的位置——没有 ASML 的 EUV,台积电、三星、英特尔都造不出最先进的芯片,AI 芯片自然也无从谈起。AI 对先进制程的爆发式需求,直接拉动对 EUV、以及更先进的 High-NA EUV 光刻机的需求。作为先进芯片制造的绝对咽喉,ASML 是整个 AI 算力大厦最底层、最不可替代的基石之一。
asml.descriptionEn: ASML is the world's only company able to make EUV (extreme ultraviolet) lithography machines — the "crown jewel" of semiconductor equipment and the most critical, most irreplaceable link in all advanced chip manufacturing. Lithography is the core step of chip making — using light to "print" nanometer-scale circuit patterns onto wafers — and making the most advanced chips (7nm and below) requires EUV lithography machines. These machines are extremely complex and expensive (over €100 million each), integrating the world's top optics and precision mechanics, and only ASML can build them worldwide. This puts ASML in a near-absolute monopoly, viewed as a geopolitical strategic asset — without ASML's EUV, TSMC, Samsung and Intel can't make the most advanced chips, and AI chips would be impossible. AI's explosive demand for advanced nodes directly drives demand for EUV and the more advanced High-NA EUV machines. As the absolute chokepoint of advanced chip manufacturing, ASML is one of the most foundational, irreplaceable cornerstones of the entire AI-compute edifice.
whyItMatters: 全球唯一能造 EUV 光刻机的公司,设备「皇冠明珠」
做 7nm 及以下最先进芯片必须用 EUV
机器极复杂昂贵、全球仅 ASML 能造,近乎绝对垄断
AI 先进制程需求拉动 EUV/High-NA,算力大厦最底层基石

products.name: EUV 光刻机
products.description: 全球唯一的极紫外光刻机,制造 7nm 及以下先进芯片的必备设备。

products.name: High-NA EUV
products.description: 下一代更高数值孔径的 EUV,推动 2nm 及以下制程。

news.title: Q2 营收 93 亿欧元超预期，全年指引大幅升至 430–450 亿欧元
news.summary: Q2 净销售 93 亿欧元超预期，毛利率 54%；全年指引升至 430–450 亿欧元（前值 360–400 亿），为年内第三次上调，AI 驱动 EUV 需求强劲。

news.title: Q1 2026 净销售 88 亿欧元,毛利率达 53%
news.summary: ASML 2026 年一季度净销售额 88 亿欧元,毛利率 53%,业绩超预期;公司将于 7 月 15 日发布二季度财报,市场聚焦 EUV 订单动向。

news.title: 获 SK 海力士约 80 亿美元订单,为史上最大单笔 EUV 订单
news.summary: SK 海力士承诺 2027 年底前向 ASML 采购约 79.7 亿美元 EUV 设备,为公开披露的最大单笔 EUV 订单,印证 AI 芯片周期对光刻需求的拉动。

news.title: 上调 2026 营收指引至 360–400 亿欧元;AI 驱动 EUV 需求强劲
news.summary: Q1 2026 营收 88 亿欧元、毛利率 53%;AI 客户(台/韩/美)的高毛利 EUV 需求替代了流失的对华 DUV 收入,对华销售占比降至 19%;High-NA EUV 持续出货。

amat.name: 应用材料
amat.oneLiner: 全球最大半导体设备厂（沉积/刻蚀/CMP 等）。
amat.oneLinerEn: The world's largest semiconductor-equipment maker (deposition/etch/CMP and more).
amat.tagline: 让下一代技术成为可能
amat.taglineEn: Making possible the technology shaping the future
amat.subcategory: 沉积 / 刻蚀 / 量测
amat.business: 薄膜沉积、刻蚀、离子注入、量测等多类制造设备，覆盖面最广。
amat.businessEn: The broadest lineup of fab equipment — thin-film deposition, etch, ion implantation, metrology and more.
amat.description: 应用材料(Applied Materials,AMAT)是全球最大的半导体设备公司,产品线覆盖芯片制造的多个核心环节——薄膜沉积、刻蚀、离子注入、快速热处理、CMP(化学机械抛光)、量测检测等,是几乎每一座晶圆厂都离不开的设备供应商。芯片是在晶圆上一层层「盖楼」造出来的,而 AMAT 的设备贯穿了从材料沉积到图案成形、再到平坦化和检测的大量关键工序,是半导体制造设备里产品最全、体量最大的巨头。AI 芯片对先进逻辑、HBM 存储和先进封装的爆发式需求,直接拉动全球芯片厂扩产,而扩产就要大量购买 AMAT 的设备。作为与 ASML、泛林、科磊并列的设备五巨头之首(按营收),应用材料卡位在整个 AI 算力最上游的「制造芯片的机器」环节,是 AI 芯片浪潮最根基的受益者之一。
amat.descriptionEn: Applied Materials (AMAT) is the world's largest semiconductor-equipment company, with a product line spanning many core steps of chip manufacturing — thin-film deposition, etch, ion implantation, rapid thermal processing, CMP (chemical mechanical planarization) and inspection/metrology — an equipment supplier nearly every fab depends on. Chips are built layer by layer on a wafer like "constructing a building," and AMAT's tools run through many key steps from material deposition to pattern formation to planarization and inspection, making it the broadest-product, largest-scale giant in semiconductor-manufacturing equipment. AI chips' explosive demand for advanced logic, HBM memory and advanced packaging directly drives global fab capacity expansion, and expansion means buying lots of AMAT equipment. As the foremost (by revenue) of the five equipment giants alongside ASML, Lam and KLA, Applied Materials is positioned at the most upstream "machines that make chips" link of all AI compute — one of the most foundational beneficiaries of the AI-chip wave.
whyItMatters: 全球最大半导体设备公司,产品线最全
覆盖沉积/刻蚀/离子注入/CMP/量测检测等核心工序
AI 拉动全球芯片厂扩产,大量采购其设备
设备五巨头之首(按营收),AI 算力最上游根基受益者

news.title: FY2026 Q2 营收 79.1 亿美元,预计全年设备业务增长超 30%
news.summary: 截至 4 月的第二财季营收 79.1 亿美元、调整后 EPS 2.86 美元;公司预计 2026 自然年半导体设备业务增长超 30%,先进封装收入增长超 50%,DRAM 需求领跑。

news.title: AI 驱动先进制程与 HBM 扩产,设备订单强劲
news.summary: 先进逻辑(2nm)、HBM/先进封装、背面供电等技术拐点带来设备密集度提升,中国业务受出口管制影响但被 AI 需求抵消。

news.title: 美国对华出口管制收紧,预计致 2026 财年营收减少数亿美元
news.summary: 应用材料警告更严的美国出口管制将令 2026 年中国晶圆厂设备支出下滑,扩大的限制预计影响其 2026 财年营收约 6 亿美元;公司另因向中芯国际交付设备被处以 2.52 亿美元罚款。

lrcx.name: 泛林
lrcx.oneLiner: 刻蚀与沉积设备龙头，存储芯片制造关键。
lrcx.oneLinerEn: A leader in etch and deposition equipment, crucial to memory-chip manufacturing.
lrcx.tagline: 在原子尺度上塑造未来
lrcx.taglineEn: Shaping the future at the atomic scale
lrcx.business: 等离子刻蚀与薄膜沉积设备，在 3D NAND/DRAM 制造中份额领先。
lrcx.businessEn: Plasma etch and thin-film deposition equipment, with leading share in 3D NAND/DRAM manufacturing.
lrcx.description: 泛林(Lam Research)是全球半导体设备五巨头之一,尤其在「刻蚀」和「薄膜沉积」两大工艺上是绝对龙头。芯片是在晶圆上一层层「盖楼」造出来的:沉积设备负责一层层铺上材料薄膜,刻蚀设备负责精准地把不需要的部分「雕刻」掉,形成纳米级的立体电路结构。泛林在这两个环节技术领先、份额很高,尤其在存储芯片(3D NAND 要垂直堆叠上百层、DRAM 也越来越立体)制造中至关重要——这些正是 AI 所需 HBM 高带宽内存的基础。AI 带动的先进逻辑芯片与存储芯片扩产,直接拉动对泛林刻蚀沉积设备的需求。作为与应用材料、ASML、科磊等并列的设备巨头,泛林卡位在芯片制造最核心的工艺环节,是 AI 芯片能被造出来的上游关键设备供应商之一。
lrcx.descriptionEn: Lam Research is one of the world's five semiconductor-equipment giants, and the undisputed leader in "etch" and "thin-film deposition." Chips are built layer by layer on a wafer like "constructing a building": deposition tools lay down material films layer by layer, and etch tools precisely "carve away" the unwanted parts to form nanometer-scale 3D circuit structures. Lam leads technically with high share in both, and is especially critical in memory manufacturing (3D NAND stacks hundreds of vertical layers and DRAM grows ever more 3D) — the very basis of the HBM high-bandwidth memory AI needs. AI-driven capacity expansion of advanced logic and memory chips directly drives demand for Lam's etch and deposition tools. As an equipment giant alongside Applied Materials, ASML and KLA, Lam is positioned in the most core process steps of chip manufacturing — one of the key upstream equipment suppliers enabling AI chips to be made.
whyItMatters: 全球半导体设备五巨头之一,刻蚀+沉积绝对龙头
沉积铺薄膜、刻蚀精准雕刻,形成纳米级立体电路
在存储(3D NAND/DRAM)制造中至关重要,HBM 基础
AI 逻辑与存储扩产,直接拉动刻蚀沉积设备需求

products.name: 刻蚀设备
products.description: 精准雕刻电路结构,在存储(3D NAND/DRAM)制造中至关重要。

products.name: 薄膜沉积设备
products.description: 一层层铺上材料薄膜,与刻蚀并列泛林两大龙头业务。

news.title: FY26Q3营收58.4亿美元创纪录，同比增24%
news.summary: 4月22日泛林公布截至3月29日季度业绩：营收58.41亿美元创纪录、同比增24%，毛利率49.8%，GAAP每股收益1.45美元超预期，AI基建带动先进存储与封装设备需求。

news.title: 上调展望：6月季度指引66亿美元，全年WFE看1400亿
news.summary: 泛林指引6月季度营收66亿±4亿美元、毛利率50.5%，并预计2026年全球晶圆厂设备支出达1400亿美元且有上行空间；客户支持业务季度营收首破20亿美元。

news.title: NAND 升级周期+HBM 扩产,刻蚀沉积设备景气回升
news.summary: 存储厂商为 AI 升级 3D NAND/DRAM 产线,泛林作为存储设备龙头最受益;先进封装与背面供电打开新市场。

klac.name: 科磊
klac.oneLiner: 半导体量测与检测设备龙头。
klac.oneLinerEn: The leader in semiconductor metrology and inspection equipment.
klac.business: 缺陷检测与量测设备，保障先进制程良率。
klac.businessEn: Defect-inspection and metrology equipment that safeguards advanced-node yield.
klac.description: 科磊(KLA)是半导体量测与检测(过程控制)设备的绝对龙头,在这个细分领域占据全球约一半以上份额,壁垒极高。芯片制造要经过上千道工序,每一步都可能产生微小到纳米级的缺陷或偏差,一旦出问题就是整片晶圆报废——科磊的设备就是这条产线上的「质检员和显微镜」:在制造过程中检测缺陷、量测线宽与薄膜厚度、找出问题根源,帮芯片厂把良率(合格率)做上去。制程越先进(如向 3nm/2nm、以及先进封装演进),缺陷控制越难、越关键,科磊设备的重要性越突出。AI 芯片对先进制程和高良率的极致追求,直接拉动对科磊过程控制设备的需求。作为半导体设备五巨头之一、且在检测量测领域近乎垄断,科磊是 AI 芯片能被高良率造出来的幕后关键。
klac.descriptionEn: KLA is the undisputed leader in semiconductor inspection and metrology (process control) equipment, holding over half the global share in this niche with very high barriers. Chip manufacturing goes through thousands of steps, each able to introduce nanometer-scale defects or deviations, and one problem can scrap an entire wafer — KLA's tools are the "inspectors and microscopes" of the production line: detecting defects, measuring line widths and film thicknesses, and finding root causes during manufacturing to raise fabs' yields. The more advanced the node (toward 3nm/2nm and advanced packaging), the harder and more critical defect control becomes, and the more KLA's tools matter. AI chips' relentless pursuit of advanced nodes and high yield directly drives demand for KLA's process-control equipment. As one of the five semiconductor-equipment giants and nearly monopolistic in inspection and metrology, KLA is the behind-the-scenes key to AI chips being made at high yield.
whyItMatters: 半导体量测与检测(过程控制)设备绝对龙头
该细分占全球约一半以上份额,壁垒极高
产线「质检员+显微镜」:检缺陷、量线宽、提良率
制程越先进缺陷控制越关键,近乎垄断

products.name: 检测设备 (Inspection)
products.description: 在制造中检测纳米级缺陷,占该细分全球约一半以上份额。

products.name: 量测设备 (Metrology)
products.description: 量测线宽、薄膜厚度等,帮芯片厂提升良率。

news.title: 先进制程良率控制需求激增,过程控制份额稳固
news.summary: 2nm/先进封装的缺陷检测更关键,量检测设备强者恒强;AI 芯片高良率诉求直接拉动 KLA 订单。

news.title: 3 月季度营收 34.15 亿美元同比增 11%,AI 驱动增长
news.summary: 2026 年 3 月季度营收 34.15 亿美元、同比增长 11%,服务业务收入 7.75 亿美元、同比增 16%,业绩超预期,AI 仍是核心增长驱动力。

news.title: 先进封装过程控制收入 2026 年有望达约 10 亿美元
news.summary: KLA 先进封装过程控制收入预计从 2025 年约 6.35 亿美元增至 2026 年约 10 亿美元,并已获得 2025 年先进晶圆级封装过程控制市场第一的位置,系统业务增速有望超 20%。

snps.name: 新思科技
snps.oneLiner: EDA 芯片设计软件双雄之一。
snps.oneLinerEn: One of the two giants of EDA chip-design software.
snps.tagline: 从芯片到系统的智能设计
snps.taglineEn: Smart design from silicon to systems
snps.business: EDA 工具、IP 与系统设计软件——没有它画不出现代芯片。
snps.businessEn: EDA tools, IP and system-design software — modern chips can't be designed without it.
snps.description: 新思科技(Synopsys)与楷登(Cadence)是 EDA(电子设计自动化)软件的「双雄」,共同垄断了芯片设计的最上游工具链。现代芯片有几百亿到上千亿颗晶体管,工程师根本不可能手工画,必须依赖 EDA 软件来综合、布局布线、仿真验证——没有 EDA,就没有现代芯片。Synopsys 在数字设计综合与 IP(可复用电路模块)上尤其领先,并深度把 AI 引入设计流程(用 AI 自动优化芯片布局)。2025 年它以约 350 亿美元完成对仿真巨头 Ansys 的收购,把能力从「芯片」扩展到「系统级仿真」。AI 芯片设计的爆发让 EDA 需求水涨船高。
snps.descriptionEn: Synopsys and Cadence are the "twin giants" of EDA (electronic design automation) software, together dominating the most upstream tool chain of chip design. Modern chips have tens to hundreds of billions of transistors that engineers can't possibly lay out by hand, so they rely on EDA software for synthesis, place-and-route, and simulation/verification — without EDA there are no modern chips. Synopsys leads especially in digital design synthesis and IP (reusable circuit blocks), and has deeply infused AI into the design flow (using AI to automatically optimize chip layout). In 2025 it completed its ~$35 billion acquisition of simulation giant Ansys, extending its reach from "chip" to "system-level simulation." The boom in AI-chip design keeps lifting EDA demand.
whyItMatters: EDA 双雄之一,芯片设计最上游工具链
数字综合与 IP 领先,AI 引入设计流程
约 350 亿美元收购 Ansys,扩展系统级仿真
AI 芯片设计爆发,EDA 需求水涨船高

news.summary: 第一财季营收 24.09 亿美元,同比增长 66%,其中设计自动化业务收入 20 亿美元、同比增长 96%,非 GAAP EPS 3.77 美元超指引上限,Ansys 并购整合动能强劲。

news.title: Converge 2026 发布 AgentEngineer 多智能体芯片设计与多物理场…
news.summary: 在 Converge 2026 大会上发布 AgentEngineer 多智能体工作流、Multiphysics Fusion、电子数字孪生平台等,宣称设计效率提升 2-5 倍,硬件验证前可完成最高 90% 软件验证。

news.title: Q2 业绩强劲上调 FY26 全年指引,AI 芯片设计需求旺盛
news.summary: 受 AI 芯片设计需求带动,新思科技第二财季业绩超预期并上调 2026 财年全年指引,与 Ansys 融合的多物理场收入协同预计自 2027 财年起贡献营收。

news.title: 完成收购 Ansys,EDA+仿真巨头成型
news.summary: 约 350 亿美元收购 Ansys 完成,芯片设计+系统仿真一体化;AI 芯片设计潮与 AI 辅助设计(Synopsys.ai)双引擎。

cdns.name: 楷登
cdns.oneLiner: EDA 芯片设计软件双雄之一。
cdns.oneLinerEn: One of the two giants of EDA chip-design software.
cdns.subcategory: EDA 工具 / IP / 仿真
cdns.business: EDA 工具、IP 与系统仿真，和新思共同主导芯片设计软件。
cdns.businessEn: EDA tools, IP and system simulation that, together with Synopsys, dominate chip-design software.
cdns.description: 楷登(Cadence)是芯片设计软件(EDA,电子设计自动化)的双雄之一,与新思科技(Synopsys)一起几乎垄断了全球 EDA 市场。现代芯片动辄几百亿个晶体管,根本不可能靠人手工设计,必须用 EDA 软件来完成从电路设计、仿真、验证到物理布局的整个流程——可以说没有 EDA,就造不出任何先进芯片。Cadence 提供全套 EDA 工具,以及大量可复用的设计 IP,是所有芯片设计公司(英伟达、苹果、AMD 等)绕不开的「卖铲人」。AI 芯片爆发让全球设计的芯片数量和复杂度激增,直接拉动 EDA 需求;同时 Cadence 还把 AI 用进 EDA 本身(如用 AI 自动优化芯片设计),并拓展到系统设计与仿真。作为 EDA 双寡头之一,Cadence 卡位在半导体产业最上游、壁垒极高的设计工具环节,是 AI 芯片浪潮稳健的根基型受益者。
cdns.descriptionEn: Cadence is one of the two giants of chip-design software (EDA, electronic design automation), which together with Synopsys nearly monopolize the global EDA market. Modern chips have tens of billions of transistors and cannot possibly be designed by hand, requiring EDA software for the whole flow from circuit design, simulation and verification to physical layout — without EDA, no advanced chip can be made. Cadence provides a full EDA toolset plus much reusable design IP, an unavoidable "seller of shovels" for every chip-design company (NVIDIA, Apple, AMD). The AI-chip boom sharply increases the number and complexity of chips designed worldwide, directly driving EDA demand; Cadence also brings AI into EDA itself (using AI to auto-optimize chip designs) and expands into system design and simulation. As one of the EDA duopoly, Cadence is positioned in the most upstream, very-high-barrier design-tools link of the semiconductor industry — a steady, foundational beneficiary of the AI-chip wave.
whyItMatters: 芯片设计软件(EDA)双雄之一,与新思近乎垄断
没有 EDA 就造不出任何先进芯片
AI 芯片爆发让设计数量与复杂度激增,拉动 EDA
把 AI 用进 EDA,半导体最上游高壁垒环节

news.title: Q1营收14.7亿美元增19%，积压订单创纪录80亿
news.summary: 楷登2026年Q1营收14.74亿美元、同比增19%，各业务线均双位数增长，积压订单达创纪录的80亿美元，公司将全年营收增速指引上调至17%。

news.title: 再度出手并购，收购EDA厂商EMA Design Automation
news.summary: 5月20日楷登完成对EMA Design Automation的收购，延续其通过并购扩张EDA与系统设计版图的策略，为年内继Hexagon业务后又一笔交易。

news.title: 完成收购Hexagon设计与工程业务，年内贡献1.6亿营收
news.summary: 2月23日楷登完成对Hexagon旗下Design & Engineering业务的收购，预计2026年贡献约1.6亿美元营收，短期摊薄每股收益约0.28美元，2027年起转为增厚。

news.title: AI 芯片设计需求旺盛,AI 驱动 EDA 工具放量
news.summary: 定制 ASIC 与系统公司自研芯片潮拉动 EDA;Cadence.ai 用 AI 优化设计,并扩展系统分析与数字孪生。

ase.name: 日月光
ase.oneLinerEn: The world's largest outsourced chip assembly and test (OSAT) company.
ase.business: 芯片封装与测试，承接先进封装外包需求。
ase.businessEn: Chip packaging and testing, absorbing the outsourced demand for advanced packaging.
ase.description: 日月光(ASE Technology)是全球最大的半导体封装与测试(OSAT)公司,总部台湾,在这个「把芯片封装成品、并测试筛选」的外包环节稳居世界第一。芯片在晶圆厂造好后,必须经过封装(封进保护壳、连出引脚)和测试才能交付使用,日月光承接了全球大量芯片厂和 IC 设计公司的这部分需求。在 AI 时代,封装的重要性被空前放大——高性能 AI 芯片越来越依赖「先进封装」(如把多颗芯粒、HBM 内存用 2.5D/3D 方式高密度集成在一起),这直接决定芯片的性能、带宽与良率。日月光在先进封装上持续投入、技术领先,深度参与 AI 芯片的封装。作为全球封测龙头,日月光是 AI 芯片从「造出来」到「能用、能高性能」这一环节不可或缺的核心力量。
ase.descriptionEn: ASE Technology is the world's largest semiconductor packaging-and-test (OSAT) company, headquartered in Taiwan, firmly number one globally in the outsourced work of "packaging chips into finished products and testing/screening them." After chips are made in a fab, they must be packaged (sealed in a housing with pins routed out) and tested before use, and ASE handles this for a large share of the world's chipmakers and IC design companies. In the AI era, packaging's importance has been amplified unprecedentedly — high-performance AI chips increasingly rely on "advanced packaging" (densely integrating multiple chiplets and HBM memory in 2.5D/3D), which directly determines a chip's performance, bandwidth and yield. ASE invests continuously and leads in advanced packaging, deeply involved in AI-chip packaging. As the global OSAT leader, ASE is an indispensable core force in the link taking AI chips from "made" to "usable and high-performance."
whyItMatters: 全球最大封装测试(OSAT)公司,总部台湾
封装+测试是芯片交付前必经环节,稳居世界第一
AI 芯片依赖先进封装(2.5D/3D 集成芯粒+HBM)
先进封装持续投入、技术领先,深度参与 AI 芯片

products.description: 2.5D/3D 集成芯粒与 HBM,决定 AI 芯片性能与良率。

news.title: 先进封装报价上调逾 20%，覆盖 CoWoS、FoCoS 等 AI 关键工艺
news.summary: 据 TrendForce 报道，日月光在 AI 需求驱动下将先进封装报价上调超过 20%，涵盖 CoWoS、FoCoS 等技术，主因原材料成本与长期投资成本上升，且台积电向其转移更多 AI 客户封装订单。

news.title: 先进封装产能扩张,承接 AI 芯片外溢需求
news.summary: 台积电 CoWoS 满载下,日月光承接扇出/2.5D 封装外溢订单;测试业务受益 AI 芯片复杂度提升。

news.title: 2026 年资本开支上调至创纪录 85 亿美元，全球动工 6 座新厂
news.summary: AI 封装需求供不应求，日月光将 2026 年资本开支从 2025 年的 53 亿美元大幅上调至 85 亿美元，并在美国、马来西亚、日本、德国和台湾等地动工 6 座新厂，CoWoS 等效产能拟增至每月 2.5 万片。

amkr.name: 安靠
amkr.oneLinerEn: The leading U.S. outsourced packaging-and-test company.
amkr.business: 封装与测试服务，是西方供应链本地化的关键一环。
amkr.businessEn: Packaging and testing services — a key link in localizing the Western supply chain.
amkr.description: 安靠(Amkor)是全球第二大半导体封装与测试(OSAT)公司,仅次于台湾日月光。芯片在晶圆厂造好后,还要经过「封装」(把裸晶封进保护壳、连出引脚)和「测试」(筛掉坏片)才能出货,这就是 OSAT 这类外包厂的活。在 AI 时代,封装的重要性大幅提升——高性能 AI 芯片越来越依赖先进封装(如把多颗芯粒和 HBM 内存用 2.5D/3D 方式集成在一起),这直接决定芯片的性能与良率。安靠具备先进封装能力,并在美国亚利桑那州投建大型封装厂,配合台积电等在美建厂、承接半导体制造回流。作为全球封测双雄之一,安靠是 AI 芯片从「造出来」到「能用」这一封装测试环节的关键一员。
amkr.descriptionEn: Amkor is the world's second-largest semiconductor packaging-and-test (OSAT) company, after Taiwan's ASE. After chips are made in a fab, they must be "packaged" (sealing the die in a protective housing and routing out pins) and "tested" (screening out bad units) before shipping — the work of OSAT outsourcers. In the AI era, packaging's importance has risen sharply — high-performance AI chips increasingly rely on advanced packaging (like integrating multiple chiplets and HBM memory in 2.5D/3D), which directly determines a chip's performance and yield. Amkor has advanced-packaging capabilities and is building a large packaging plant in Arizona to support TSMC and others building in the US and to take on semiconductor reshoring. As one of the two global OSAT leaders, Amkor is a key player in the packaging-and-test link that takes AI chips from "made" to "usable."
whyItMatters: 全球第二大封装测试(OSAT)公司,仅次日月光
封装+测试是芯片出货前必经环节
AI 芯片依赖先进封装(2.5D/3D 集成芯粒+HBM)
在美国亚利桑那建厂,承接半导体制造回流
