Reka emphasizes building multimodal models rivaling top labs' performance with a relatively lean team and resources, proving that a "small but sharp" team can be competitive on frontier models. It offers its models to enterprises and explores deployment options like private deployment. In the extremely competitive, staggeringly cash-burning general-model race, Reka holds a place with strong research strength and multimodal specialization. As a representative multimodal-frontier upstart, Reka embodies a path of top researchers starting up and using efficiency to counter giants' resources.
whyItMatters: 2022 成立,多模态大模型新锐,DeepMind/Meta 等资深研究者创立
专注原生多模态:同时理解文本/图像/音频/视频
用精简团队做出对标一线大厂的多模态模型
强研究实力,「小而精」团队前沿竞争的代表

products.name: Reka Core / Flash
products.description: 原生多模态大模型,同时理解文本/图像/音频/视频。

news.title: Reka 以精简团队推进原生多模态模型，对标一线大厂
news.summary: 由 DeepMind、Meta 等资深研究者创立的 Reka 持续打磨 Core、Flash、Edge 系列原生多模态模型，同时理解文本、图像、音频与视频，面向企业提供并探索私有部署落地。

zeroone.name: 零一万物
zeroone.oneLiner: 李开复创立的中国大模型公司，Yi 系列开源。
zeroone.oneLinerEn: The Chinese large-model company founded by Kai-Fu Lee, maker of the open-source Yi series.
zeroone.tagline: 让通用人工智能普及每个人
zeroone.business: Yi 系列开源大模型与应用，主打高性价比与中英双语。
zeroone.businessEn: The open-source Yi model family and applications, emphasizing cost efficiency and bilingual (Chinese/English) strength.
zeroone.description: 零一万物(01.AI)是李开复于 2023 年创办的中国大模型公司,是「AI 2.0」创业浪潮里最受关注的明星团队之一。它推出的 Yi 系列大模型在中英双语能力上表现优秀,开源版本在全球开源社区(如 Hugging Face 榜单)一度名列前茅,树立了中国开源大模型的口碑。面对训练超大模型烧钱惊人、且国内大厂纷纷下场的激烈竞争,零一万物务实调整策略:不再一味追逐最大参数的基础模型军备竞赛,而更聚焦把模型做成企业能用的应用与解决方案,并与阿里等合作、共享算力。作为李开复亲自带队的明星创业公司,零一万物的路径变化,折射出中国「大模型六小虎」们在资本与算力现实下,从「炼大模型」转向「找商业化落地」的共同抉择。
zeroone.descriptionEn: 01.AI (Zero One Everything) is a Chinese large-model company founded by Kai-Fu Lee in 2023, one of the most-watched star teams of the "AI 2.0" startup wave. Its Yi series of models performs well on Chinese-English bilingual ability, and its open-source versions once ranked top in the global open-source community (such as Hugging Face leaderboards), building a reputation for Chinese open-source models. Facing the staggering cost of training very large models and fierce competition as domestic giants entered, 01.AI pragmatically adjusted: no longer chasing the largest-parameter base-model arms race, but focusing more on turning models into applications and solutions enterprises can use, and partnering with Alibaba and others to share compute. As a star startup led personally by Kai-Fu Lee, 01.AI's shift reflects the common choice of China's "six little dragons" of large models — pivoting from "forging giant models" to "finding commercialization" under capital and compute realities.
whyItMatters: 李开复 2023 创办的中国大模型公司
Yi 系列中英双语强,开源版曾登全球榜单前列
务实转向企业应用/解决方案,与阿里合作共享算力
折射中国「大模型六小虎」转向商业化的共同抉择

products.name: Yi 系列
products.description: 中英双语能力强的大模型,开源版曾登全球榜单前列。

news.title: 零一万物转向企业应用落地，与阿里合作共享算力
news.summary: 李开复创办的零一万物不再追逐最大参数的基础模型军备竞赛，聚焦把 Yi 系列模型做成企业可用的应用与解决方案，并与阿里合作共享算力，折射「大模型六小虎」的商业化抉择。

moonshot2.name: 月之暗面
moonshot2.oneLiner: 中国大模型独角兽，Kimi 以超长上下文见长。
moonshot2.oneLinerEn: A Chinese large-model unicorn whose Kimi assistant excels at ultra-long context.
moonshot2.business: Kimi 助手与月之暗面大模型，长上下文能力突出。
moonshot2.businessEn: The Kimi assistant and Moonshot's large models, distinguished by long-context capability.
moonshot2.description: 月之暗面(Moonshot AI)是中国大模型创业公司里最受瞩目的独角兽之一,成立于 2023 年,是「大模型六小虎」之一。它的旗舰产品是智能助手 Kimi,最出圈的特色是超长上下文——能一次读进并理解极长的文本(几十万字乃至更多),特别适合处理长文档、长篇资料、整本书的分析总结,一度成为国内最受欢迎的 AI 助手之一。月之暗面持续迭代自研大模型,并推出了在推理等能力上表现亮眼的新版本,在国内大模型第一梯队中技术口碑很好。在国内大厂环伺、竞争白热化、又要应对算力与商业化压力的环境下,月之暗面凭借 Kimi 的用户口碑和扎实的模型能力站稳脚跟。作为中国原创大模型的明星代表之一,月之暗面体现了中国在前沿大模型上追赶与创新的努力。
moonshot2.descriptionEn: Moonshot AI is one of the most-watched unicorns among China's large-model startups, founded in 2023, one of the "six little dragons." Its flagship product is the assistant Kimi, whose best-known feature is ultra-long context — reading and understanding extremely long text at once (hundreds of thousands of characters or more), especially suited to analyzing and summarizing long documents, lengthy materials and entire books, and at one point one of China's most popular AI assistants. Moonshot keeps iterating its in-house large models and released new versions with impressive reasoning capabilities, with a strong technical reputation in China's first tier. Amid domestic giants all around, white-hot competition and pressures of compute and commercialization, Moonshot holds firm on Kimi's user reputation and solid model capabilities. As a star representative of China's homegrown large models, Moonshot embodies China's efforts to catch up and innovate on frontier large models.
whyItMatters: 中国大模型最受瞩目独角兽之一,2023 成立,「六小虎」
旗舰 Kimi 以超长上下文见长,读进理解极长文本
适合长文档/整本书分析,曾最受欢迎 AI 助手之一
新版本推理能力亮眼,国内第一梯队技术口碑好

products.name: Kimi
products.description: 以超长上下文著称的智能助手,能读进整本书级别的长文本。

news.title: 寻求新一轮融资，估值目标 300 亿美元
news.summary: 据 Bloomberg 报道，月之暗面正洽谈新融资，拟募集至多 20 亿美元、估值达 300 亿美元，为六个月内第三次融资，距上一轮 200 亿美元估值大幅跃升。

news.title: Kimi ARR 突破 3 亿美元，新旗舰 K3 定于 7 月发布
news.summary: Kimi 系列模型年化经常性收入至 6 月中旬突破 3 亿美元；开源旗舰 K2.6 在 Artificial Analysis 独立测评中居开源权重模型之首，新一代旗舰 K3 确认 7 月推出。

news.title: 完成 20 亿美元 D 轮、估值超 200 亿美元,创中国大模型融资纪录
news.summary: 由美团龙珠领投,清华资本、中国移动等参投,成为中国融资额最高的大模型创业公司;旗舰 Kimi K2.6(万亿参数 MoE、26 万 token 上下文)4 月发布,ARR 突破 2 亿美元。

news.title: 拆除离岸架构，筹备香港 IPO
news.summary: 月之暗面正拆除海外离岸股权架构，为赴港上市铺路，此举发生在监管收紧境外上市背景下，公司对上市态度在数月内明显转变。

cognition.name: Cognition
cognition.oneLiner: 首个「AI 软件工程师」Devin 的开发商，收购了 Windsurf。
cognition.oneLinerEn: Maker of Devin, the first "AI software engineer"; acquired Windsurf.
cognition.business: Devin —— 能像人类工程师一样自主接需求、规划、写码、调试、跑测试、提 PR 的 AI 智能体，可并行处理多任务。2025 年收购 AI 编辑器 Windsurf(原 Codeium)，形成「Agent + 编辑器」组合。
cognition.businessEn: Devin — an AI agent that, like a human engineer, autonomously takes requirements, plans, writes code, debugs, runs tests and opens PRs, and can handle multiple tasks in parallel. In 2025 it acquired the AI editor Windsurf (formerly Codeium), forming an "agent + editor" combination.
cognition.description: Cognition 成立于 2023 年，凭借「首个 AI 软件工程师」Devin 一炮而红：不同于补全类工具，Devin 被定位为能独立完成完整开发任务的自主智能体——读需求、拆解计划、跨文件写代码、运行与调试、提交 PR，还能同时跑多个任务。2025 年 Cognition 收购了 AI 代码编辑器 Windsurf(原 Codeium)，把「自主 Agent」和「人机协同编辑器」两条路线合到一起，是 AI 编程赛道最受关注的公司之一。2025 年 9 月估值达 102 亿美元，2026 年 5 月再融超 10 亿美元、估值约 250 亿美元。
cognition.descriptionEn: Founded in 2023, Cognition shot to fame with Devin, the "first AI software engineer": unlike autocomplete tools, Devin is positioned as an autonomous agent that can complete entire development tasks — reading requirements, breaking down a plan, writing code across files, running and debugging, and submitting PRs, all while handling multiple tasks at once. In 2025 Cognition acquired the AI code editor Windsurf (formerly Codeium), merging the "autonomous agent" and "human-in-the-loop editor" approaches, making it one of the most-watched companies in AI coding. It was valued at $10.2 billion in September 2025 and raised over $1 billion more in May 2026 at roughly a $25 billion valuation.
whyItMatters: Devin 定义「自主 AI 软件工程师」品类
从需求到 PR 全流程自主，可并行多任务
收购 Windsurf，Agent + 编辑器双线布局

products.name: Devin
products.description: 自主完成完整开发任务的智能体。

products.name: Windsurf
products.description: 收购而来的智能体式编辑器。

news.title: Cognition 发布 SWE-1.7 代码模型及 Devin 安全漏洞扫描套件
news.summary: Cognition 推出旗舰代码模型 SWE-1.7,经 Cerebras 加速实现 1000 token/秒推理速度;同期发布 Devin Security Swarm,在 50 个真实漏洞测试中识别 36 个,单位成本较次优工具低 30%。

news.title: 融资超 10 亿、估值约 250 亿;Windsurf 更名 Devin Desktop
news.summary: 收购 Windsurf 后 ARR 翻倍、5 月达 4.92 亿美元;2026 年 6 月 Windsurf 品牌整体更名为 Devin Desktop,抢占企业级 AI 编程市场。

news.title: ARR 达 4.92 亿美元,12 个月增长 13 倍
news.summary: Cognition 年化收入运行率达 4.92 亿美元,较 2025 年 5 月的 3700 万美元一年内增长 13 倍,Devin 企业端用量过去六个月保持每月 50% 的环比增长。

news.title: 公司内部 89% 代码已由 Devin 提交
news.summary: Cognition 披露其内部提交代码的 89% 由 Devin 完成,其余由 Windsurf 本地 Agent 编写;该比例在 2025 年 12 月仅为 13%,被视为企业内 AI 采用速度的标志性案例。

glean.name: Glean
glean.oneLiner: 企业 AI 搜索与工作助手，「公司内部的 ChatGPT」。
glean.oneLinerEn: Enterprise AI search and work assistant — "ChatGPT for your company."
glean.business: 连接企业内部各系统(邮件、文档、Slack、Jira、CRM…)，用 AI 做统一搜索、问答与智能体，让员工用一句话找到跨系统的信息并自动化工作；权限感知、企业级安全。是「企业知识 + AI」的代表。
glean.businessEn: Connects a company's internal systems (email, docs, Slack, Jira, CRM…) for unified AI search, Q&A and agents, so employees can find cross-system information in one query and automate work — permission-aware and enterprise-secure. It is the standard-bearer for "enterprise knowledge + AI."
glean.description: Glean 由前谷歌搜索工程师、Rubrik 联合创始人 Arvind Jain 于 2019 年创立，做的是「企业内部的搜索与助手」：它把公司散落在几十个 SaaS 系统里的知识索引成一张知识图谱，员工用自然语言就能跨系统找到文档、对话、工单并得到带出处的答案，还能用智能体自动完成工作流。它严格遵循每个人的访问权限，主打企业级安全与合规。2025 年 6 月 F 轮融资 1.5 亿美元、估值达 72 亿美元；年化收入(ARR)从 2025 年初约 1 亿美元一路增长到 2026 年 5 月的约 3 亿美元。随着企业把 AI 落到「自己的数据」上，Glean 成为企业 AI 搜索/助手赛道的领跑者，与微软 Copilot 正面竞争。
glean.descriptionEn: Glean was founded in 2019 by Arvind Jain, a former Google search engineer and Rubrik co-founder. It builds an "internal search and assistant" for companies: it indexes knowledge scattered across dozens of SaaS systems into a knowledge graph, so employees can use natural language to find documents, conversations and tickets across systems and get cited answers, and use agents to automate workflows. It strictly respects each person's access permissions, emphasizing enterprise-grade security and compliance. Its June 2025 Series F raised $150 million at a $7.2 billion valuation, and its annualized revenue (ARR) grew from about $100 million in early 2025 to roughly $300 million by May 2026. As enterprises ground AI in "their own data," Glean has become the leader in enterprise AI search/assistants, competing head-on with Microsoft Copilot.
whyItMatters: 把企业散落的知识统一成「可问答」，找信息效率革命
权限感知 + 企业级安全，大客户放心用
企业 AI 搜索/助手赛道领跑者，增长快

products.name: Glean
products.description: 打通企业内部所有应用的 AI 搜索与工作助手。

news.title: Glean ARR 增至约 3 亿美元，企业 AI 搜索领跑地位巩固
news.summary: Glean 年化收入从 2025 年初约 1 亿美元增长到 2026 年 5 月的约 3 亿美元；此前 2025 年 6 月完成 1.5 亿美元 F 轮融资、估值 72 亿美元，与微软 Copilot 正面竞争。

news.title: 财富 500 强客户一年近翻倍,主打帮企业削减 AI 算力成本
news.summary: Glean 过去一年将财富 500 强客户数量近乎翻倍,并以"权限感知知识图谱降低 AI token 消耗、削减企业 AI 计算成本"为核心卖点,直接对标微软 Copilot。

news.title: 完成 1.5 亿美元 F 轮融资,估值 72 亿美元
news.summary: Glean 完成由 Wellington Management 领投的 1.5 亿美元 F 轮融资,估值达 72 亿美元,Khosla Ventures、Bicycle Capital 等新投资方参投,资金用于加速企业 AI Agent 平台。

tabnine.name: Tabnine
tabnine.oneLiner: 注重隐私与私有部署的 AI 代码助手。
tabnine.oneLinerEn: A privacy-focused, privately deployable AI code assistant.
tabnine.tagline: 值得企业信任的 AI 编程
tabnine.business: 企业级 AI 代码补全与智能体，支持私有化与合规部署。
tabnine.businessEn: Enterprise AI code completion and agents, supporting private and compliant deployment.
tabnine.description: Tabnine 是较早的一批 AI 代码助手之一(前身可追溯到 2018 年),核心差异化定位是「注重隐私、安全与私有部署」的企业级 AI 编程工具。像 GitHub Copilot 等主流工具虽强大,但对一些注重代码保密、有严格合规要求的企业(金融、国防、大型科技公司)来说,把源代码发到外部云端 AI 是不可接受的。Tabnine 主打:可以完全私有化部署(把 AI 跑在企业自己的环境里,代码不出门)、可用许可透明/合规的数据训练、不拿客户代码去训练、支持企业用自己的代码库定制模型等。它用「安全、可控、合规」的定位服务对隐私极敏感的企业客户。作为 AI 编程赛道里专攻企业隐私与私有部署的代表,Tabnine 满足了「既想用 AI 提效、又绝不能泄露代码」这一类企业的刚需。
tabnine.descriptionEn: Tabnine is one of the earlier AI code assistants (its predecessor dates to 2018), with a core differentiation of being a "privacy-, security- and private-deployment-focused" enterprise AI coding tool. Mainstream tools like GitHub Copilot are powerful, but for enterprises that prize code confidentiality and have strict compliance requirements (finance, defense, big tech), sending source code to an external cloud AI is unacceptable. Tabnine emphasizes: fully private on-prem deployment (running the AI in the enterprise's own environment so code never leaves), training on transparently licensed/compliant data, not training on customer code, and supporting model customization on a company's own codebase. It serves privacy-sensitive enterprise customers with a "secure, controllable, compliant" positioning. As a representative in AI coding specializing in enterprise privacy and private deployment, Tabnine meets the essential need of enterprises that "want AI productivity but can never leak code."
whyItMatters: 较早的 AI 代码助手之一,主打隐私/安全/私有部署
可完全私有化部署,代码不出企业环境
不拿客户代码训练,支持用自有代码库定制
服务金融/国防等对代码保密极敏感的企业

products.name: Tabnine
products.description: 注重隐私与私有部署的 AI 代码助手,代码不出企业环境。

news.title: Tabnine 深耕私有化部署，服务金融国防等代码保密客户
news.summary: Tabnine 以「代码不出企业环境」为核心卖点，支持完全私有化部署、不拿客户代码训练并可用自有代码库定制模型，满足金融、国防等对代码保密极敏感企业的刚需。

vercel.name: Vercel
vercel.oneLiner: 前端云平台，v0 从一句话生成生产级界面/应用。
vercel.oneLinerEn: A frontend cloud whose v0 turns a single prompt into production-grade UIs/apps.
vercel.tagline: 让开发者构建更快、更好的 Web
vercel.taglineEn: Helping developers build a faster, better web
vercel.business: Next.js 框架的母公司与前端部署云(全球最流行的前端托管平台之一)；AI 产品 v0 用自然语言生成生产级 React/Next.js + Tailwind 代码，2026 年升级为含 Git 集成、编辑器、数据库、智能体工作流的完整开发平台。并提供聚合各家模型的 AI Gateway。2025 年估值约 93 亿美元。
vercel.businessEn: The company behind the Next.js framework and a frontend deployment cloud (one of the world's most popular hosting platforms); its AI product v0 generates production-grade React/Next.js + Tailwind code from natural language, and in 2026 grew into a full dev platform with Git integration, an editor, databases and agent workflows. It also offers an AI Gateway aggregating many models. It was valued at about $9.3 billion in 2025.
vercel.description: Vercel 成立于 2015 年，是开源前端框架 Next.js 的母公司，也是全球最流行的前端部署平台之一，为海量网站与应用提供托管与全球加速。生成式 AI 兴起后，它推出 v0——用一句话描述就能生成界面美观、可直接投产的 React/Next.js + Tailwind 代码；2026 年 v0 从「组件生成器」升级为含 Git、类 VS Code 编辑器、数据库连接与智能体工作流的完整开发平台。Vercel 还运营 AI Gateway，聚合 GPT-5.6、Claude 等多家模型供开发者调用。2025 年融资后估值约 93 亿美元，是「Web 开发 + AI」的枢纽玩家。
vercel.descriptionEn: Founded in 2015, Vercel is the company behind the open-source frontend framework Next.js and one of the world's most popular frontend deployment platforms, hosting and globally accelerating a vast number of sites and apps. As generative AI rose, it launched v0 — describe an interface in a sentence and it generates beautiful, production-ready React/Next.js + Tailwind code; in 2026 v0 grew from a "component generator" into a full dev platform with Git, a VS Code-like editor, database connections and agent workflows. Vercel also runs an AI Gateway that aggregates models like GPT-5.6 and Claude for developers. Valued at about $9.3 billion after its 2025 round, it is a hub player at the intersection of web development and AI.
whyItMatters: Next.js 母公司 + 最流行前端云，Web 开发枢纽
v0 升级为完整开发平台，从生成到投产一体
AI Gateway 聚合各家模型，开发者调用入口
估值约 93 亿美元，Web × AI 核心玩家

products.name: v0
products.description: 自然语言生成生产级前端代码与应用。

products.name: Vercel 前端云
products.description: Next.js 托管与全球加速。

products.name: AI Gateway
products.description: 聚合各家大模型供开发者调用。

news.title: 收入运行率达 3.4 亿美元同比增 84%,平台 30% 应用由智能体生成
news.summary: Vercel 披露 2026 年 3 月 GAAP 收入运行率达 3.4 亿美元、同比增长 84%,平台上 30% 的应用已由 AI 智能体创建;CEO 表示公司正以上市公司标准运营,为 IPO 做准备。

news.title: v0 升级为完整开发平台，含 Git、编辑器与智能体工作流
news.summary: 2026 年 Vercel 的 v0 从「组件生成器」升级为包含 Git、类 VS Code 编辑器、数据库连接与智能体工作流的完整开发平台；其 AI Gateway 聚合 GPT-5.6、Claude 等多家模型供开发者调用。

news.title: 完成 3 亿美元 F 轮融资,估值 93 亿美元押注 AI Cloud
news.summary: Vercel 完成 Accel 与 GIC 领投的 3 亿美元 F 轮融资,估值 93 亿美元,较 2024 年 5 月的 32.5 亿美元增长近三倍,资金用于建设面向 AI 原生与智能体应用的 AI Cloud。

writer.name: Writer
writer.oneLiner: 面向大企业的全栈生成式 AI 平台，自研 Palmyra 模型。
writer.oneLinerEn: A full-stack generative-AI platform for large enterprises, with its own Palmyra models.
writer.taglineEn: Full-stack generative AI for the enterprise
writer.business: 自研 Palmyra 系列企业模型 + 一站式平台(工作流、知识图谱、智能体)，主攻大企业的内容生成、知识问答与流程自动化，强调合规、可控与全栈自有(不依赖第三方模型)。客户多为《财富》500 强。
writer.businessEn: In-house Palmyra enterprise models plus an all-in-one platform (workflows, knowledge graph, agents), focused on content generation, knowledge Q&A and process automation for large enterprises, emphasizing compliance, control and a fully owned stack (no reliance on third-party models). Its customers are largely Fortune 500.
writer.description: Writer 成立于 2020 年,是面向大企业的全栈生成式 AI 平台。与主打通用聊天的 ChatGPT 不同,Writer 自研了一整套企业专用的大模型(Palmyra 系列)并把它做成可落地的企业平台:让公司在自己的品牌语气、术语、合规规则下,安全地用 AI 写营销文案、生成报告、做知识问答、搭建业务工作流与 Agent。它强调数据安全、可控、不拿客户数据训练,正好击中大企业既想用 AI 又担心风险的痛点,客户包括大量知名品牌与《财富》500 强公司。凭借「自研模型 + 企业级平台 + 强合规」的定位,Writer 在竞争激烈的企业 AI 市场里走出一条差异化路线,估值已达数十亿美元。作为企业生成式 AI 的代表之一,它体现了 AI 落地企业时对安全、可控与业务贴合的核心要求。
writer.descriptionEn: Writer, founded in 2020, is a full-stack generative AI platform for large enterprises. Unlike general chat products like ChatGPT, Writer builds its own enterprise-purpose large models (the Palmyra family) and turns them into a deployable enterprise platform: letting companies safely use AI to write marketing copy, generate reports, answer knowledge questions and build business workflows and agents under their own brand voice, terminology and compliance rules. It emphasizes data security, control and not training on customer data — hitting the pain point of large enterprises that want AI but fear the risks — with customers including many well-known brands and Fortune 500 companies. On its "own models + enterprise platform + strong compliance" positioning, Writer carved a differentiated path in the crowded enterprise-AI market, reaching a multibillion-dollar valuation. As a representative of enterprise generative AI, it embodies the core requirements of security, control and business fit when AI is deployed in enterprises.
whyItMatters: 2020 成立,面向大企业的全栈生成式 AI 平台
自研企业专用大模型 Palmyra,而非套通用聊天
强调安全可控、不拿客户数据训练,击中大企业痛点
客户含众多财富 500 强,估值数十亿美元

products.name: Writer 平台
products.description: 工作流 + 知识图谱 + 智能体。

products.name: Palmyra
products.description: 自研企业级大模型系列。

news.title: Palmyra X5 成为主力模型，旧版模型 2026 年 7 月起弃用
news.summary: Writer 开发者文档将旧版 Palmyra 模型标记为弃用并定于 2026 年 7 月 13 日移除，palmyra-x5 成为官方迁移路径；此前发布的 Palmyra X4 在工具调用上达到业界领先精度。

news.title: Writer 凭自研 Palmyra 模型深入财富 500 强，估值达数十亿美元
news.summary: Writer 以「自研模型 + 企业级平台 + 强合规」的差异化路线，让企业在自有品牌语气与合规规则下用 AI 写文案、生成报告与搭建 Agent 工作流，客户涵盖大量财富 500 强公司。

news.title: 完成 2 亿美元 C 轮融资，估值 19 亿美元
news.summary: Writer 宣布由 Premji Invest、Radical Ventures 与 ICONIQ Growth 共同领投的 2 亿美元 C 轮，Adobe、Salesforce、IBM、Workday 等产业资本参投，加码企业级智能体 AI。

sierra.name: Sierra
sierra.oneLiner: Bret Taylor 创立的企业级对话 AI 智能体平台。
sierra.oneLinerEn: An enterprise conversational-AI agent platform founded by Bret Taylor.
sierra.tagline: 为企业打造更好的客户体验
sierra.taglineEn: Better customer experiences for every business
sierra.business: 面向企业的对话式 AI 智能体平台，帮企业搭建能真正解决问题(退换货、账单、预约)的客服/交互智能体，强调可控、合规与品牌一致。创始人 Bret Taylor(前 Salesforce 联席 CEO、OpenAI 董事长)。
sierra.businessEn: An enterprise conversational-AI agent platform that helps companies build customer-service/interaction agents that actually resolve issues (returns, billing, scheduling), with an emphasis on control, compliance and brand consistency. Founded by Bret Taylor (former Salesforce co-CEO and OpenAI chairman).
sierra.description: Sierra 由 Bret Taylor(前 Salesforce 联席 CEO、现 OpenAI 董事长)与 Clay Bavor(前谷歌)于 2023 年创立，做企业级对话 AI 智能体：不是简单聊天机器人，而是能接入企业系统、真正把客户问题办完(改订单、退款、排故障、预约)的智能体，并强调可控、审计与品牌语气。凭借创始人光环与扎实的企业落地，Sierra 迅速成为企业 AI 客服/交互赛道的头部，估值快速攀升——2025 年估值达约 100 亿美元、超 40% 的《财富》50 强为其客户、ARR 超 1.5 亿美元。
sierra.descriptionEn: Sierra was founded in 2023 by Bret Taylor (former Salesforce co-CEO, now OpenAI chairman) and Clay Bavor (formerly Google) to build enterprise conversational-AI agents: not simple chatbots, but agents that plug into company systems and actually get customer issues done (changing orders, refunds, troubleshooting, scheduling), with an emphasis on control, auditability and brand voice. With its founders' pedigree and solid enterprise adoption, Sierra quickly became a leader in enterprise AI service/interaction, with a rapidly climbing valuation — around $10 billion in 2025, more than 40% of the Fortune 50 as customers, and ARR over $150 million.
whyItMatters: 创始人 Bret Taylor 光环 + 深厚企业软件经验
做「能真正办完事」的客服智能体，非玩具
企业 AI 交互赛道头部，估值飙升

products.name: Sierra
products.description: 面向企业的对话式 AI 客服平台,能真正办事并接管对话。

news.title: 完成 9.5 亿美元 E 轮融资,估值突破 150 亿美元
news.summary: Sierra 完成由 Tiger Global 与 GV 领投的 9.5 亿美元 E 轮融资,Benchmark、红杉、Greenoaks 等参投,估值从去年秋天的 100 亿美元升至逾 150 亿美元,在手资金超 10 亿美元。

news.title: ARR 超 1.5 亿美元,AI 客服代理向语音与销售场景扩张
news.summary: Sierra 进入第三年时 ARR 已超 1.5 亿美元,客户涵盖 Prudential、Cigna 及全球三分之一的最大银行;公司正发力语音代理,瞄准仍占客服交互约 80% 的电话渠道,并拓展销售与客户管理场景。

news.title: Sierra 估值达约 100 亿美元，超四成财富 50 强成为客户
news.summary: Bret Taylor 创立的 Sierra 2025 年估值达约 100 亿美元，ARR 超 1.5 亿美元，超 40% 的《财富》50 强为其客户，其对话智能体能接入企业系统真正办完改订单、退款等事务。

decagon.name: Decagon
decagon.oneLiner: AI 客服智能体新贵，自动化大规模客户支持。
decagon.oneLinerEn: A rising AI customer-service agent startup automating support at scale.
decagon.tagline: 让每次客户对话都完美
decagon.business: 面向企业的 AI 客服智能体平台，跨聊天/邮件/语音自动化大规模客户支持，能解决而非只是转接问题；服务电商、金融科技等高咨询量客户，增长迅猛。
decagon.businessEn: An enterprise AI customer-service agent platform that automates large-scale support across chat, email and voice, resolving issues rather than just routing them; it serves high-volume customers in e-commerce, fintech and beyond, and is growing fast.
decagon.description: Decagon 成立于 2023 年,是企业级 AI 客服智能体的领跑者之一。它做的不是简单的问答机器人,而是能真正「办事」的 AI 客服 Agent——理解用户复杂诉求、调用企业后台系统(查订单、改预约、办退款等)、按公司规则完成整个服务流程,并在需要时无缝转给人工。它面向有海量客服需求的大企业(电商、金融、消费品牌等),目标是用 AI 承接大部分重复性咨询,大幅降低客服成本、提升响应速度和一致性。凭借扎实的落地效果和大客户口碑,Decagon 增长很快、估值迅速攀升,是「客服」这个大模型最早、最能规模化变现场景里的头部公司之一。作为企业 AI Agent 的代表,它体现了 AI 从「会聊天」走向「能替企业完成实际工作」的商业化前沿。
decagon.descriptionEn: Decagon, founded in 2023, is a leader in enterprise AI customer-service agents. It builds not simple Q&A bots but AI service agents that actually "get things done" — understanding complex user requests, calling enterprise back-end systems (checking orders, changing appointments, issuing refunds), completing entire service workflows per company rules, and handing off seamlessly to humans when needed. It targets large enterprises with massive support volumes (e-commerce, finance, consumer brands), aiming to have AI handle most repetitive inquiries, sharply cutting support costs and improving response speed and consistency. On solid results and strong customer references, Decagon has grown fast with a rapidly rising valuation — one of the leaders in "customer service," one of the earliest and most scalably monetizable use cases for large models. As a representative enterprise AI agent, it embodies AI's commercial frontier moving from "can chat" to "can do real work for the enterprise."
whyItMatters: 2023 成立,企业级 AI 客服智能体领跑者之一
能调用后台系统真正「办事」,而非简单问答
面向大企业,承接重复咨询、大幅降本提效
客服是大模型最能规模化变现场景,增长迅猛

products.name: Decagon
products.description: 跨聊天/邮件/语音的客服智能体。

news.title: 完成首次员工股份回购要约，按 45 亿美元估值执行
news.summary: Decagon 完成首次 tender offer，让 300 余名员工按 45 亿美元估值出售部分已归属股份；过去一年新增超 100 家企业客户，含 Avis 与德国电信，平均问题拦截率超 80%。

news.title: 2.5 亿美元 D 轮融资，估值三倍跃升至 45 亿美元
news.summary: Decagon 完成 Coatue 与 Index Ventures 领投的 2.5 亿美元 D 轮，估值较上轮增至三倍达 45 亿美元，a16z、Accel、Bain Capital Ventures 等老股东跟投。

news.title: Decagon AI 客服智能体承接大企业重复咨询，增长迅猛
news.summary: Decagon 的客服 Agent 能调用企业后台查订单、改预约、办退款并按规则走完服务流程，面向电商、金融等大客户大幅降本提效，估值随扎实落地效果快速攀升。

harvey.name: Harvey
harvey.oneLiner: 法律行业专用的 AI 智能体，顶级律所标配。
harvey.oneLinerEn: A legal-specialized AI agent that has become standard at top law firms.
harvey.business: 面向律所与企业法务的生成式 AI，处理合同起草/审查、法律检索、尽调、案卷分析等专业工作；与 OpenAI 深度合作、被大量顶级律所(如年利达、A&O 等)采用。
harvey.businessEn: Generative AI for law firms and in-house legal teams, handling contract drafting/review, legal research, due diligence and case-file analysis; it works closely with OpenAI and is used by many top law firms (such as Linklaters and A&O).
harvey.description: Harvey 成立于 2022 年,是法律垂直 AI 的领跑者,把大模型调教到能真正处理律师和法务的专业工作。它能起草与审查合同、检索判例与法条、做并购尽职调查、分析海量案卷与证据、生成备忘录等,并针对法律场景对准确性、引用可溯源和保密性做了专门优化——因为在法律领域,「一本正经地编造」是绝对不能接受的。Harvey 与 OpenAI 关系密切(是 OpenAI 创业基金早期押注的公司),被全球一大批顶级律所(如 A&O Shearman 等)和大企业法务部门采用,把 AI 嵌进真实的法律工作流。作为「专业服务 + AI」里商业化最成功的案例之一,Harvey 收入与估值快速攀升,已成为数十亿美元级公司,是垂直行业大模型落地的标杆。
harvey.descriptionEn: Harvey, founded in 2022, is the leader in vertical legal AI, tuning large models to truly handle the professional work of lawyers and legal teams. It drafts and reviews contracts, researches case law and statutes, does M&A due diligence, analyzes massive case files and evidence, and generates memos, with special optimization for accuracy, source-traceable citations and confidentiality in legal contexts — because in law, "confidently making things up" is absolutely unacceptable. Closely tied to OpenAI (an early bet of the OpenAI Startup Fund), Harvey is used by a large roster of top global law firms (like A&O Shearman) and corporate legal departments, embedding AI into real legal workflows. As one of the most commercially successful examples of "professional services + AI," Harvey's revenue and valuation have climbed fast to multibillion-dollar scale — a benchmark for deploying large models in a vertical industry.
whyItMatters: 2022 成立,法律垂直 AI 领跑者
起草审查合同、检索判例、并购尽调、分析案卷
针对准确性/可溯源引用/保密专门优化
与 OpenAI 密切,顶级律所采用,数十亿美元级

products.name: Harvey
products.description: 为律所与法务打造的法律大模型:合同审查、判例检索、尽调。

news.title: 获 2 亿美元融资,估值达 110 亿美元
news.summary: Harvey 完成由新加坡 GIC 与红杉领投的 2 亿美元融资,估值达 110 亿美元,距去年 12 月 80 亿美元估值的上一轮仅数月,累计融资超 10 亿美元,资金将用于扩展 AI 法律代理与全球嵌入式法律工程团队。

news.title: Harvey 成顶级律所标配，法律垂直 AI 达数十亿美元级
news.summary: Harvey 被 A&O Shearman 等全球顶级律所与大企业法务采用，覆盖合同起草审查、判例检索、并购尽调等工作流，凭准确性与可溯源引用优化，收入与估值快速攀升。

news.title: ARR 达 3 亿美元,超 10 万名律师、1300 家机构在用
news.summary: Harvey 2026 年 ARR 达约 3 亿美元,全球超过 10 万名律师、1300 家律所与企业机构在其平台上处理核心法律工作,公司员工规模约 460 人,稳居法律垂直 AI 头部。

hebbia.name: Hebbia
hebbia.oneLiner: 面向金融/专业服务的 AI 知识智能体。
hebbia.oneLinerEn: An AI knowledge agent for finance and professional services.
hebbia.tagline: 在你的文档上做真正的工作
hebbia.taglineEn: Do real work on your documents
hebbia.business: Matrix 平台对海量文档做深度检索与分析——像给分析师配一个能同时读上万页材料、逐条给出带出处答案的 AI，主攻投行、私募、资管、法律等文档密集型专业场景。
hebbia.businessEn: Its Matrix platform performs deep retrieval and analysis over huge document sets — like giving an analyst an AI that can read tens of thousands of pages at once and answer point by point with citations — aimed at document-heavy professional work in investment banking, private equity, asset management and law.
hebbia.description: Hebbia 成立于 2020 年,是面向金融与专业服务的 AI 知识工作平台,核心是让 AI 在海量复杂文档上做深度分析。它的产品 Matrix 能同时读通成百上千份长文档(财报、招股书、合同、研报、法律文件等),按用户的问题逐份提取、比对、汇总,并给出可溯源到原文的答案——这正是投行分析师、私募、律师、咨询顾问每天做的耗时苦活。相比通用 ChatGPT,Hebbia 强调准确、可核查、能处理超大文档集,不「编造」,契合金融和法律对严谨与合规的高要求。它被众多顶级资产管理公司、投行采用,估值达数十亿美元。作为「AI + 专业知识工作」的代表,Hebbia 体现了大模型如何把高薪专业人士从繁重的文档研读中解放出来,是垂直企业 AI 里落地扎实的一家。
hebbia.descriptionEn: Hebbia, founded in 2020, is an AI knowledge-work platform for finance and professional services, centered on having AI do deep analysis over massive, complex documents. Its product Matrix can read through hundreds or thousands of long documents at once (financial reports, prospectuses, contracts, research, legal files), extracting, comparing and summarizing per the user's question and giving answers traceable to the source text — exactly the time-consuming grind that investment-bank analysts, private-equity, lawyers and consultants do daily. Unlike general ChatGPT, Hebbia emphasizes accuracy, verifiability and handling very large document sets without "making things up," fitting finance and law's high demands for rigor and compliance. It is used by many top asset managers and investment banks, with a multibillion-dollar valuation. As a representative of "AI + professional knowledge work," Hebbia embodies how large models free highly paid professionals from heavy document review — one of the solidly deployed vertical enterprise-AI companies.
whyItMatters: 2020 成立,面向金融/专业服务的 AI 知识工作平台
Matrix 能读通成百上千份长文档,提取比对汇总
答案可溯源、不编造,契合金融法律严谨合规
被顶级资管/投行采用,估值数十亿美元

products.name: Matrix
products.description: 海量文档深度检索与结构化分析。

news.title: Hebbia Matrix 获顶级资管投行采用，估值达数十亿美元
news.summary: Hebbia 的 Matrix 能同时读通成百上千份财报、招股书、合同等长文档，逐份提取比对并给出可溯源到原文的答案，被众多顶级资产管理公司与投行采用。

news.title: 平台累计处理文档突破 10 亿页，金融机构规模化部署
news.summary: Hebbia 宣布平台累计处理页面数突破 10 亿页，金融机构正以前所未有的规模部署其 AI 基础设施，公司团队规模也扩张至约 150 人以上。

news.title: 收购 FlashDocs，补强自动化内容生成能力
news.summary: Hebbia 宣布收购 FlashDocs，将分析处理与信息检索能力延伸至自动化文档/演示内容生成，进一步完善面向金融与法律客户的产品闭环。

news.title: 接入 FactSet、PitchBook、ICE 等多家权威数据源
news.summary: Hebbia 陆续宣布与 Preqin、FactSet、Third Bridge 集成，并与 PitchBook、洲际交易所(ICE)合作接入私募公司数据与机构级定价数据，强化金融 AI 平台的数据底座。

characterai.name: Character.AI
characterai.oneLiner: AI 角色扮演聊天平台，用户黏性极高。
characterai.oneLinerEn: An AI roleplay chat platform with exceptionally high user engagement.
characterai.business: 可自定义 AI 角色的对话娱乐平台，用户可创建或与海量虚拟角色聊天，主打陪伴与娱乐，日均使用时长远超一般聊天助手。2024 年创始团队(Transformer 论文作者 Noam Shazeer 等)与部分技术授权给谷歌，Shazeer 回归谷歌。
characterai.businessEn: A conversational entertainment platform with customizable AI characters, where users create or chat with a vast library of virtual personas for companionship and fun, with daily usage far exceeding a typical chat assistant. In 2024 its founding team (including Transformer co-author Noam Shazeer) and a technology license went to Google, and Shazeer returned to Google.
characterai.description: Character.AI 由 Transformer 论文共同作者 Noam Shazeer 与 Daniel De Freitas 于 2021 年创立，做的是「与虚拟角色对话」——用户可以和名人、动漫角色、历史人物乃至自建角色聊天，主打情感陪伴与娱乐。它的用户黏性极高，年轻用户日均停留时间远超一般 AI 助手，是「AI 陪伴」这一品类的代表。2024 年 8 月，谷歌以约 27 亿美元达成技术授权协议并请回 Shazeer 与 De Freitas 回归 DeepMind，公司继续独立运营消费产品(Karandeep Anand 出任 CEO)；这笔「绕过收购」的交易引来美国司法部反垄断关注。产品高黏性的同时也深陷未成年人保护争议——多起青少年自杀/心理伤害诉讼(如佛州 Megan Garcia 案)于 2026 年 1 月与谷歌一并达成和解。
characterai.descriptionEn: Character.AI was founded in 2021 by Transformer co-authors Noam Shazeer and Daniel De Freitas to enable "conversations with virtual characters" — users chat with celebrities, anime characters, historical figures or their own creations, centered on emotional companionship and entertainment. Its engagement is exceptionally high, with young users spending far more time daily than on a typical AI assistant, making it the face of the "AI companion" category. In August 2024 Google struck a roughly $2.7 billion technology-licensing deal and brought Shazeer and De Freitas back to DeepMind, while the company kept running its consumer product independently (with Karandeep Anand as CEO); this "acquisition-bypassing" structure drew antitrust scrutiny from the U.S. Department of Justice. Alongside that high engagement, it has been mired in child-safety controversy — several teen suicide/mental-harm lawsuits (such as Florida's Megan Garcia case) were settled together with Google in January 2026.
whyItMatters: 定义「AI 陪伴/角色扮演」品类，用户黏性行业最高
创始人是 Transformer 论文作者，技术底子深厚
谷歌授权交易是「人才+技术回流巨头」的典型案例
AI 陪伴的伦理与未成年保护议题的焦点

products.name: Character.AI
products.description: 可与各种 AI 角色自由对话的消费级应用,用户粘性极高。

news.title: 推出自制互动微短剧,角色可与观众对话
news.summary: 上线《Last Summer》等三部自制微短剧进军微短剧市场,特色是剧中角色可与用户互动对话,延续其沉浸式陪伴产品路线。

news.summary: 2026 年初在对话中引入全屏广告加速商业化;4 月推出世界观构建工具 Lorebook 及可让用户置身经典文学的 Books 功能。

news.title: Character.AI 青少年诉讼与谷歌一并达成和解
news.summary: 多起青少年自杀/心理伤害诉讼(如佛州 Megan Garcia 案)于 2026 年 1 月与谷歌一并达成和解；此前 2024 年 8 月谷歌以约 27 亿美元技术授权请回两位创始人，交易曾引来司法部反垄断关注。

news.title: 全面禁止 18 岁以下用户进行开放式 1 对 1 聊天
news.summary: 在多起诉讼与安全争议后,Character.AI 宣布自 2025 年 11 月 25 日起禁止未成年人使用开放式一对一聊天功能,为行业内最严格的青少年限制之一。

canva.name: Canva
canva.oneLiner: 全球最大在线设计平台，深度接入 AI。
canva.oneLinerEn: The world's largest online design platform, deeply infused with AI.
canva.business: 拖拽式在线平面设计平台，海量模板 + Magic Studio 系列生成式 AI(文生图、AI 改写、一键设计、背景消除、Magic Design 等)，服务数亿非专业用户与企业团队；并收购图像生成公司 Leonardo.Ai 强化 AI 能力。
canva.businessEn: A drag-and-drop online graphic-design platform with vast templates plus the Magic Studio generative-AI suite (text-to-image, AI rewriting, one-click design, background removal, Magic Design), serving hundreds of millions of non-professional users and enterprise teams; it acquired image-generation company Leonardo.Ai to strengthen its AI.
canva.description: Canva 成立于 2013 年(澳大利亚),是全球最大的在线设计平台,用极其简单的拖拽式操作和海量模板,让完全没有设计基础的普通人也能快速做出海报、PPT、社媒图片、视频、logo 等,彻底把「设计」平民化,拥有数亿用户。它很早就积极拥抱生成式 AI,推出 Magic Studio 一系列 AI 功能——文字生成图片、一键抠图/扩图、AI 写文案、把一段话变成一份完整设计等,并在 2024 年收购了 AI 图像生成公司 Leonardo.Ai、以及专业设计软件 Affinity,大幅增强创作与 AI 能力。凭借「人人可用 + AI 加持」的定位,Canva 是全球估值最高的软件创业公司之一。作为把 AI 深度融入大众设计工作流的代表,Canva 展示了生成式 AI 如何让内容创作对每个人都更简单。
canva.descriptionEn: Canva, founded in 2013 (Australia), is the world's largest online design platform, using extremely simple drag-and-drop and vast templates to let ordinary people with no design background quickly make posters, slides, social images, videos and logos — thoroughly democratizing "design," with hundreds of millions of users. It embraced generative AI early, launching the Magic Studio suite of AI features — text-to-image, one-click background removal/expansion, AI copywriting, turning a sentence into a full design — and in 2024 acquired AI-image company Leonardo.Ai and professional design software Affinity, greatly strengthening its creation and AI capabilities. On its "usable by everyone + AI-powered" positioning, Canva is one of the world's highest-valued software startups. As a representative of deeply embedding AI into mass-market design workflows, Canva shows how generative AI makes content creation simpler for everyone.
whyItMatters: 2013 成立(澳大利亚),全球最大在线设计平台
拖拽式+海量模板,让人人都能做设计,数亿用户
Magic Studio:文生图/抠图/AI 文案/一键成稿
收购 Leonardo.Ai 与 Affinity,估值最高软件创业公司之一

products.name: Canva 设计平台
products.description: 拖拽 + 海量模板的平面设计。

news.summary: 员工股份出售按 420 亿美元估值定价,允许员工出售最多 300 万美元已归属股权;叠加 CFO 到位等信号,市场预期其临近纳斯达克 IPO。

news.title: Canva 收购 Leonardo.Ai 与 Affinity，AI 设计能力大增
news.summary: Canva 于 2024 年收购 AI 图像生成公司 Leonardo.Ai 及专业设计软件 Affinity，叠加 Magic Studio 的文生图、一键抠图、AI 文案等功能，巩固全球最大在线设计平台地位。

notion.name: Notion
notion.oneLiner: 全能协作文档/知识库，深度嵌入 AI。
notion.oneLinerEn: An all-in-one collaborative docs/knowledge base with AI built deeply in.
notion.tagline: 一个工具，连接你的团队与知识
notion.taglineEn: One tool to connect your team and knowledge
notion.business: 把文档、知识库、数据库、项目管理揉进一个灵活「积木」式工作空间；Notion AI 提供写作、总结、跨库问答与自动化智能体，让 AI 直接在你的工作数据上干活。深受初创团队与知识工作者欢迎。
notion.businessEn: Blends documents, knowledge bases, databases and project management into one flexible "building-block" workspace; Notion AI provides writing, summarization, cross-database Q&A and automation agents so AI works directly on your work data. It is a favorite of startups and knowledge workers.
notion.description: Notion 成立于 2013 年,是广受欢迎的一体化协作与知识管理工具,把文档、笔记、维基、数据库、项目管理揉进一个高度灵活、可自由搭建的工作空间,深受创业公司、团队和个人用户喜爱,靠出色的产品体验和活跃社区形成口碑传播。它很早、也很深地把 AI 嵌入产品:Notion AI 能在你的文档和知识库里直接写作、总结、翻译、问答、生成表格,还推出了能跨你所有笔记和资料回答问题的 AI 助手,把 Notion 从「你手动整理信息的地方」变成「AI 帮你调用和加工信息的地方」。在生成式 AI 重塑生产力工具的浪潮里,Notion 凭借它已有的海量结构化内容和用户粘性,处在有利位置。作为「AI 原生生产力工具」的代表之一,Notion 展示了 AI 如何让知识管理和协作更聪明。
notion.descriptionEn: Notion, founded in 2013, is a hugely popular all-in-one collaboration and knowledge-management tool, blending documents, notes, wikis, databases and project management into a highly flexible, freely composable workspace beloved by startups, teams and individuals, spreading by word of mouth on great product experience and an active community. It embedded AI early and deeply: Notion AI writes, summarizes, translates, answers questions and generates tables directly in your docs and knowledge base, and it launched an AI assistant that answers questions across all your notes and materials, turning Notion from "where you manually organize information" into "where AI retrieves and processes information for you." Amid the generative-AI wave reshaping productivity tools, Notion sits in a favorable position thanks to its vast existing structured content and user stickiness. As a representative "AI-native productivity tool," Notion shows how AI can make knowledge management and collaboration smarter.
whyItMatters: 2013 成立,一体化协作与知识管理工具
文档/笔记/维基/数据库/项目管理揉进灵活工作空间
Notion AI 在文档与知识库里写作/总结/问答
凭海量结构化内容与用户粘性,占 AI 生产力有利位置

news.summary: Notion 发布新开发者平台，支持自定义 AI 智能体、接入外部智能体并构建可读取任意数据库的多步自动化工作流，Claude 与 Cursor 成为首批外部智能体。

news.summary: Notion 完成总额约 2.7 亿美元的私募股权 tender offer，交易估值 110 亿美元；公司自 2021 年 C 轮后未再融资，市场预期其最快 2026 年底启动 IPO。

news.title: Notion AI 助手可跨全部笔记问答，重塑知识管理
news.summary: Notion 把 AI 深度嵌入产品，可在文档与知识库内写作、总结、翻译、生成表格，并推出跨所有笔记和资料回答问题的 AI 助手，凭海量结构化内容占据 AI 生产力有利位置。

news.title: ARR 突破 6 亿美元，约一半收入来自 AI 产品
news.summary: Notion 2025 年 ARR 先后越过 5 亿与约 6 亿美元关口，自推出 AI 智能体后增长逐月加速，AI 产品贡献约一半经常性收入。

grammarly.name: Grammarly
grammarly.oneLiner: AI 写作辅助龙头，向全场景 AI 助手升级。
grammarly.oneLinerEn: The AI writing-assistance leader, evolving into an everywhere AI assistant.
grammarly.business: 跨浏览器/应用的实时写作辅助——语法、拼写、语气、清晰度与改写建议，并升级为能在任意应用里帮你起草与改写的生成式 AI 助手；数千万日活用户，覆盖大量企业。近年收购邮件客户端 Superhuman，扩展生产力版图。
grammarly.businessEn: Real-time writing assistance across browsers and apps — grammar, spelling, tone, clarity and rewriting suggestions — upgraded into a generative-AI assistant that drafts and rewrites in any app; tens of millions of daily active users across many enterprises. It recently acquired the email client Superhuman to expand its productivity footprint.
grammarly.description: Grammarly 成立于 2009 年,是全球最知名的 AI 写作助手,每天帮数千万用户检查语法、拼写、标点,并润色语气与表达。它嵌进浏览器、邮箱、文档等几乎所有你打字的地方,实时给出修改建议,早在大模型时代之前就用 NLP 技术做到了写作辅助的普及。进入生成式 AI 时代,它推出 GrammarlyGO 等功能,从「改你写的」升级到「帮你写」——生成初稿、改写、调整语气、总结等,并大力拓展企业市场(安全、合规、统一品牌语气)。近年它动作频频:收购了协作文档工具 Coda、以及高效邮箱 Superhuman,试图从单一写作工具,整合成一个覆盖写作、文档、沟通的 AI 生产力平台。作为最早把 AI 写作带给大众的公司,Grammarly 正努力在生成式 AI 浪潮中完成从「语法检查」到「AI 生产力平台」的转型。
grammarly.descriptionEn: Grammarly, founded in 2009, is the world's best-known AI writing assistant, helping tens of millions of users daily check grammar, spelling and punctuation and polish tone and phrasing. It embeds into browsers, email, documents and nearly everywhere you type, giving real-time suggestions, and popularized writing assistance with NLP well before the large-model era. In the generative-AI era it launched features like GrammarlyGO, upgrading from "fixing what you write" to "writing for you" — drafting, rewriting, adjusting tone and summarizing — and pushed hard into the enterprise market (security, compliance, consistent brand voice). Recently it has been active: acquiring the collaborative-document tool Coda and the efficient email client Superhuman, aiming to grow from a single writing tool into an AI productivity platform spanning writing, documents and communication. As the company that first brought AI writing to the masses, Grammarly is working to transform from "grammar checker" to "AI productivity platform" amid the generative-AI wave.
whyItMatters: 2009 成立,全球最知名 AI 写作助手,日活数千万
嵌进浏览器/邮箱/文档,实时改语法与润色
GrammarlyGO 从「改你写的」升级到「帮你写」
收购 Coda、Superhuman,整合为 AI 生产力平台

news.summary: Superhuman(原 Grammarly)宣布收购 GPTZero,后者的检测工具帮助教师、编辑与招聘方识别机器生成文本,补强其 AI 写作生态。

news.title: Grammarly 收购 Coda 与 Superhuman，转型 AI 生产力平台
news.summary: Grammarly 近年接连收购协作文档工具 Coda 与高效邮箱 Superhuman，从单一写作工具整合为覆盖写作、文档、沟通的 AI 生产力平台，并以 GrammarlyGO 从「改你写的」升级到「帮你写」。

news.title: 公司更名 Superhuman,发布 Superhuman Suite 与 Go 助手
news.summary: 母公司更名为 Superhuman Platform Inc.,整合 Grammarly 写作、Coda 协作、Mail 邮箱与全新 AI 助手 Superhuman Go 为一体的生产力套件。

news.title: 获 General Catalyst 10 亿美元非稀释性增长融资
news.summary: 从 General Catalyst 客户价值基金获得 10 亿美元非稀释性融资,用于市场扩张与产品研发,为其向 AI 生产力平台转型提供弹药。

sanctuary.name: Sanctuary AI
sanctuary.oneLiner: 加拿大人形机器人公司，主打灵巧手操作。
sanctuary.business: Phoenix 人形机器人与 Carbon 控制系统，强调类人灵巧操作。
sanctuary.oneLinerEn: A Canadian humanoid-robot company focused on dexterous manipulation.
sanctuary.tagline: 打造有通用智能的机器人
sanctuary.subcategory: 人形机器人 / 灵巧手
sanctuary.businessEn: The Phoenix humanoid robot with a focus on dexterous hands and teleoperation-to-autonomy.
sanctuary.description: Sanctuary AI 是加拿大的人形机器人公司,最大的特色是主攻「灵巧手操作」——它认为通用机器人真正的难点和价值在于像人手一样灵巧地抓取和操作物体,因此重点打造高自由度、高灵敏度的机械手,以及驱动它的 AI「大脑」。它的人形机器人 Phoenix 配备了业界领先的灵巧双手,能完成不少需要精细手部操作的任务。Sanctuary 的技术路径很有特点:先用「遥操作」(由人远程操控机器人干活)来采集高质量的操作数据,再用这些数据训练 AI,让机器人逐步从「人遥控」走向「自主完成」。在人形机器人赛道普遍更关注行走、整机的当下,Sanctuary 对「手」这一最难环节的专注独树一帜。作为主攻灵巧操作的人形机器人代表,Sanctuary AI 押注的是通用机器人能否真正胜任精细的手部工作这一关键命题。
sanctuary.descriptionEn: Sanctuary AI is a Canadian humanoid-robot company whose biggest distinction is focusing on "dexterous-hand manipulation" — it believes the real difficulty and value of general-purpose robots lies in grasping and manipulating objects as dexterously as a human hand, so it emphasizes building high-degree-of-freedom, high-sensitivity robotic hands and the AI "brain" that drives them. Its humanoid robot Phoenix features industry-leading dexterous hands able to perform many tasks requiring fine manual manipulation. Sanctuary's technical path is distinctive: first using "teleoperation" (humans remotely controlling the robot to work) to collect high-quality manipulation data, then training AI on that data so the robot gradually moves from "human-controlled" to "autonomous." While the humanoid space generally focuses more on walking and the whole machine, Sanctuary's focus on "hands," the hardest link, is unique. As a representative humanoid company specializing in dexterous manipulation, Sanctuary AI bets on the key question of whether general-purpose robots can truly handle fine manual work.
whyItMatters: 加拿大人形机器人公司,主攻「灵巧手操作」
认为通用机器人真正难点在像人手一样抓取操作
Phoenix 配业界领先灵巧双手,做精细手部任务
先遥操作采数据再训 AI,从「人遥控」走向「自主」

products.name: Phoenix
products.description: 配业界领先灵巧双手的人形机器人,主打精细手部操作。

news.title: Sanctuary Phoenix 靠遥操作采数据，推进灵巧手自主作业
news.summary: Sanctuary AI 的人形机器人 Phoenix 配备业界领先的灵巧双手，通过「先遥操作采集高质量数据、再训练 AI」的路径，让机器人从人遥控逐步走向自主完成精细手部任务。

fourier.name: 傅利叶
fourier.oneLiner: 中国人形与康复机器人公司。
fourier.oneLinerEn: A Chinese company making humanoid and rehabilitation robots.
fourier.tagline: 以机器人赋能人类健康与生产
fourier.taglineEn: Robotics for human health and productivity
fourier.business: GR 系列通用人形机器人与康复机器人，产学结合落地。
fourier.businessEn: The GR series of general-purpose humanoids plus rehabilitation robots, with strong academia-industry ties.
fourier.description: 傅利叶(Fourier Intelligence)是中国的机器人公司,总部上海,最早以康复机器人(帮助中风、术后患者做康复训练的智能设备)起家并做到行业领先,积累了深厚的机器人运动控制与人机交互技术。近年它把这些能力延伸到人形机器人,推出 GR 系列全尺寸通用人形机器人(如 GR-1、GR-2),主打运动能力、灵巧操作和在康养、科研、服务等场景的应用。相比一些纯粹追求炫技的团队,傅利叶带着「康复医疗」这一真实落地场景的经验切入人形机器人,路径较为务实。它与宇树、智元、星动纪元等一起,构成中国人形机器人的重要力量。作为「康复机器人 → 通用人形机器人」跨越的代表,傅利叶体现了具身智能从专用走向通用、并寻找真实应用场景的探索。
fourier.descriptionEn: Fourier Intelligence is a Chinese robotics company headquartered in Shanghai, which first became an industry leader in rehabilitation robots (smart devices helping stroke and post-surgery patients with rehab training), accumulating deep expertise in robot motion control and human-machine interaction. Recently it extended these capabilities to humanoid robots, launching the GR series of full-size general-purpose humanoids (GR-1, GR-2), emphasizing mobility, dexterous manipulation and applications in rehabilitation/eldercare, research and service. Unlike some teams purely chasing flashy demos, Fourier enters humanoids with experience in the real, deployed scenario of "rehabilitation medicine," a relatively pragmatic path. Together with Unitree, AgiBot and RobotEra, it forms an important part of China's humanoid robotics. As a representative of the "rehab robots → general-purpose humanoids" leap, Fourier embodies embodied intelligence's move from specialized to general while seeking real use cases.
whyItMatters: 中国机器人公司,总部上海,康复机器人起家并领先
积累深厚的机器人运动控制与人机交互技术
延伸到人形,推 GR 系列全尺寸通用人形机器人
带着康复医疗真实落地经验切入,路径务实

products.name: GR 系列人形机器人
products.description: 全尺寸通用人形机器人,带康复医疗落地经验。

products.name: 康复机器人
products.description: 帮助中风、术后患者康复训练的智能设备。

news.title: 傅利叶 GR 系列人形机器人切入康养科研服务场景
news.summary: 以康复机器人起家的傅利叶把运动控制与人机交互积累延伸到 GR-1、GR-2 等全尺寸通用人形机器人，主打运动能力与灵巧操作，带着康复医疗真实落地经验务实推进。

mbly.name: Mobileye
mbly.oneLiner: 自动驾驶视觉与芯片老牌龙头（英特尔控股）。
mbly.oneLinerEn: A veteran leader in autonomous-driving vision and chips (Intel-controlled).
mbly.business: EyeQ 视觉芯片与 ADAS/自动驾驶方案，供货全球主流车企。
mbly.businessEn: EyeQ vision chips and ADAS/autonomous-driving solutions, supplied to major global automakers.
mbly.description: Mobileye 是自动驾驶视觉与芯片的老牌龙头(以色列,英特尔控股),是辅助驾驶(ADAS)领域的开创者和长期领导者之一。它的核心是自研的 EyeQ 系列视觉芯片和算法——用摄像头「看」路况,识别车道、车辆、行人、交通标志等,让汽车具备自动紧急制动、车道保持、自适应巡航等辅助驾驶能力。全球大量汽车品牌都在用 Mobileye 的方案,它几乎定义了主流 ADAS。在通往更高级别自动驾驶的路上,Mobileye 主张以视觉为主、结合其独有的众包高精地图和「责任敏感安全(RSS)」等方法论,逐步演进到自动驾驶,路径相对务实。它 2022 年从英特尔分拆上市,但英特尔仍控股。作为自动驾驶感知与芯片的老牌巨头,Mobileye 是「让汽车拥有 AI 视觉、逐步走向自动驾驶」这一进程里积累最深厚、装机量最大的玩家之一。
mbly.descriptionEn: Mobileye is a veteran leader in autonomous-driving vision and chips (Israel, Intel-controlled), a pioneer and long-time leader in assisted driving (ADAS). Its core is its in-house EyeQ series of vision chips and algorithms — using cameras to "see" the road, recognizing lanes, vehicles, pedestrians and traffic signs, giving cars assisted-driving capabilities like automatic emergency braking, lane keeping and adaptive cruise. Many global auto brands use Mobileye's solutions, and it has almost defined mainstream ADAS. On the path to higher-level autonomy, Mobileye advocates a vision-first approach combined with its unique crowdsourced HD maps and "Responsibility-Sensitive Safety (RSS)" methodology, evolving toward autonomous driving relatively pragmatically. It spun off from Intel in a 2022 IPO, but Intel still holds control. As a veteran giant in autonomous-driving perception and chips, Mobileye is one of the players with the deepest accumulation and largest installed base in the process of "giving cars AI vision and gradually moving toward autonomous driving."
whyItMatters: 自动驾驶视觉与芯片老牌龙头(以色列,英特尔控股)
自研 EyeQ 视觉芯片+算法,几乎定义主流 ADAS
用摄像头识别车道/车辆/行人,支撑辅助驾驶
视觉为主+众包高精地图+RSS,务实演进到自动驾驶

products.name: EyeQ
products.description: 自研视觉芯片+算法,几乎定义主流辅助驾驶(ADAS)。

news.title: Mobileye 以 EyeQ 芯片与 RSS 方法论务实演进自动驾驶
news.summary: 2022 年从英特尔分拆上市的 Mobileye 凭 EyeQ 视觉芯片与算法几乎定义主流 ADAS，坚持视觉为主、结合众包高精地图与责任敏感安全(RSS)方法论，向更高级别自动驾驶演进。

aurora.name: Aurora
aurora.oneLiner: 自动驾驶卡车领先者，已开启无人商运。
aurora.oneLinerEn: A leader in autonomous trucking that has launched driverless commercial operations.
aurora.tagline: 安全地推动运输的未来
aurora.taglineEn: Delivering the benefits of self-driving safely
aurora.business: Aurora Driver 自动驾驶系统，率先在美国德州开展无人重卡货运。
aurora.businessEn: The Aurora Driver autonomous system, first to run driverless heavy-truck freight on U.S. public roads in Texas.
aurora.description: Aurora Innovation 是自动驾驶卡车的领先者,由自动驾驶领域的顶尖人物创立(团队来自谷歌、特斯拉、Uber 等的自动驾驶核心)。它专注做自动驾驶货运卡车,核心产品是「Aurora Driver」——一套能让重型卡车在高速公路上无人驾驶的完整软硬件系统(含激光雷达、摄像头、雷达和 AI 驾驶软件)。它选择先攻长途干线货运这一场景,因为高速公路相对结构化、且货运有巨大的商业需求和司机短缺痛点。2024 年底至 2025 年,Aurora 在美国得州(达拉斯—休斯顿线路)正式开启了没有安全员的商业化无人卡车运营,成为自动驾驶行业的重要里程碑——从测试真正走向了无人商运。作为自动驾驶卡车的领跑者,Aurora 站在「用自动驾驶重塑万亿级货运物流」这一既有巨大商业价值、又技术极难的赛道最前沿。
aurora.descriptionEn: Aurora Innovation is a leader in self-driving trucks, founded by top figures in autonomous driving (its team comes from the self-driving cores of Google, Tesla and Uber). It focuses on autonomous freight trucks, its core product the "Aurora Driver" — a complete hardware-software system (with lidar, cameras, radar and AI driving software) enabling heavy trucks to drive driverlessly on highways. It chose to tackle long-haul trunk freight first, because highways are relatively structured and freight has huge commercial demand and a driver-shortage pain point. From late 2024 into 2025, Aurora launched commercial driverless truck operations without a safety operator in Texas (the Dallas–Houston route), a major industry milestone — moving from testing to genuine driverless commercial operation. As a leader in self-driving trucks, Aurora stands at the forefront of "reshaping trillion-dollar freight logistics with autonomous driving," a track with huge commercial value and extreme technical difficulty.
whyItMatters: 自动驾驶卡车领先者,团队来自谷歌/特斯拉/Uber
核心产品 Aurora Driver:让重卡在高速无人驾驶
先攻长途干线货运,高速结构化+司机短缺痛点
2024 底—2025 得州开启无安全员商业无人卡车运营

products.name: Aurora Driver
products.description: 让重卡在高速无人驾驶的软硬件系统,已开启无安全员商运。

news.title: McLane 转入全无人运输,Hirschbach 规划 500 辆规模
news.summary: 大客户 McLane 开始采用完全无人驾驶货运,Hirschbach 计划部署 500 辆搭载 Aurora Driver 的卡车,消息推动股价单日大涨逾 40%。

news.title: 2025 年净亏 8.16 亿美元,指引 2026 年营收增长 400%
news.summary: 2025 年营收 300 万美元、净亏损 8.16 亿美元,在手流动性近 15 亿美元;公司指引 2026 年营收 1400 万-1600 万美元,年底无人卡车超 200 辆。

news.title: 无人驾驶商业里程突破 25 万英里
news.summary: 在美国公共道路开启无人商业货运后,累计无人驾驶里程于 2026 年 1 月突破 25 万英里,并计划于二季度推出第二代硬件套件。

news.title: Aurora 得州开启无安全员商业无人卡车运营
news.summary: 2024 年底至 2025 年，Aurora 在得州达拉斯—休斯顿线路正式开启无安全员的商业化无人卡车运营，成为自动驾驶行业从测试走向无人商运的重要里程碑。

wayve.name: Wayve
wayve.oneLiner: 端到端学习的自动驾驶英国新锐。
wayve.oneLinerEn: A British upstart pursuing end-to-end learned autonomous driving.
wayve.taglineEn: Teaching vehicles to drive by learning
wayve.business: 用端到端 AI(无高精地图)做通用自动驾驶，获软银、英伟达投资。
wayve.businessEn: End-to-end AI (no HD maps) for general-purpose autonomous driving, backed by SoftBank and NVIDIA.
wayve.description: Wayve 是英国的自动驾驶新锐,走一条与众不同的「端到端学习 + 具身 AI」路线,被称为「AV2.0」。传统自动驾驶靠人工编写大量规则、并为不同场景高精地图逐一适配,又笨重又难扩展;Wayve 主张让 AI 像人学开车一样,通过端到端的深度学习,直接从摄像头看到的画面学习如何驾驶,不依赖高精地图和繁琐的手工规则,从而更容易泛化到新城市、新场景。它把自动驾驶当作「具身智能」问题来做,用类似大模型的方法训练驾驶大模型。凭借这一前沿理念,Wayve 获得了软银、英伟达、微软等的巨额投资,是欧洲最受瞩目的自动驾驶公司,并把技术拓展到辅助驾驶等可落地的产品。作为「端到端学习式自动驾驶」的代表,Wayve 代表了用 AI 大模型范式重新定义自动驾驶、追求更强泛化能力的前沿方向。
wayve.descriptionEn: Wayve is a UK autonomous-driving upstart taking a distinctive "end-to-end learning + embodied AI" path, dubbed "AV2.0." Traditional autonomous driving relies on hand-coding many rules and adapting high-definition maps scene by scene — cumbersome and hard to scale; Wayve argues for letting AI learn to drive like a human, learning driving directly from camera views through end-to-end deep learning, without HD maps and tedious hand-written rules, so it generalizes more easily to new cities and scenarios. It treats autonomous driving as an "embodied intelligence" problem, training a driving model with methods akin to large models. On this frontier philosophy, Wayve raised huge investment from SoftBank, NVIDIA and Microsoft, is Europe's most-watched autonomous-driving company, and extends its technology to deployable products like assisted driving. As a representative of "end-to-end learning autonomous driving," Wayve embodies the frontier direction of redefining autonomous driving with the AI-large-model paradigm and pursuing stronger generalization.
whyItMatters: 英国自动驾驶新锐,「端到端学习+具身 AI」路线(AV2.0)
让 AI 从摄像头画面直接学开车,不依赖高精地图与手工规则
更易泛化到新城市新场景,用大模型方法训练驾驶模型
获软银/英伟达/微软巨额投资,欧洲最受瞩目自动驾驶公司

products.name: AV2.0 自动驾驶
products.description: 端到端学习式自动驾驶,从摄像头直接学开车,不依赖高精地图。

news.title: D 轮融资 12 亿美元,英伟达、Uber 与三大车企参投,估值 86 亿美元
news.summary: Wayve 完成 12 亿美元 D 轮融资,投后估值 86 亿美元,英伟达、微软、Uber 及奔驰、日产、Stellantis 三大车企参投,本轮总承诺资金达 15 亿美元,用于全球部署其自动驾驶平台。

news.title: Wayve 获软银英伟达微软巨额投资，端到端路线拓展落地
news.summary: 走「端到端学习 + 具身 AI」路线的 Wayve 获软银、英伟达、微软等巨额投资，成为欧洲最受瞩目的自动驾驶公司，并把不依赖高精地图的驾驶大模型技术拓展到辅助驾驶等产品。

news.title: 联手日产与 Uber 签署备忘录,拟 2026 年底东京试点 Robotaxi
news.summary: Wayve、Uber 与日产签署合作备忘录,计划 2026 年底在东京用搭载 Wayve AI Driver 的日产 LEAF 试点 Robotaxi 服务,并通过 Uber 平台向乘客开放;2027 年起 L2+ 监督式自动驾驶将进入日产下一代 ProPILOT 量产车。

nuro.name: Nuro
nuro.oneLiner: 无人配送车先驱，转向授权自动驾驶。
nuro.oneLinerEn: A delivery-robot pioneer that pivoted to licensing its autonomy stack.
nuro.business: 自研 Nuro Driver，从无人配送转向对外授权 L4 自动驾驶方案。
nuro.businessEn: The in-house Nuro Driver; it pivoted from delivery robots to licensing its L4 autonomy stack.
nuro.description: Nuro 成立于 2016 年,由两位前谷歌无人车(Waymo)核心工程师创立,是无人配送车的先驱。它最早的产品不是载人车,而是一种小巧的、没有方向盘和座位、专门用来送货的自动驾驶小车,在街道上把外卖、生鲜、包裹自主送到你家门口,重新想象「最后一公里」配送。经过多年研发与运营探索,面对自动驾驶商业化的漫长与烧钱,Nuro 调整了战略重心:从自己运营配送车,转向把它积累多年的自动驾驶技术栈对外授权——即把「Nuro Driver」这套自动驾驶系统提供给车企和出行公司使用,走轻资产、技术输出的路线。作为自动驾驶领域一家技术扎实、且经历了从「自营」到「授权」务实转型的公司,Nuro 体现了自动驾驶行业在漫长商业化中不断寻找可行模式的现实。
nuro.descriptionEn: Nuro, founded in 2016 by two core engineers from Google's self-driving car (Waymo), is a pioneer of autonomous delivery vehicles. Its earliest product was not a passenger car but a small self-driving vehicle with no steering wheel or seats, purpose-built for delivery, autonomously bringing takeout, groceries and parcels to your door on public streets — reimagining "last-mile" delivery. After years of R&D and operational exploration, facing the long, cash-burning path of autonomous-driving commercialization, Nuro shifted its focus: from operating its own delivery vehicles to licensing the self-driving technology stack it built over years — offering the "Nuro Driver" autonomy system to automakers and mobility companies, an asset-light, technology-output path. As a technically solid autonomous-driving company that pragmatically pivoted from "self-operation" to "licensing," Nuro embodies the industry's reality of continually searching for viable models through a long commercialization.
whyItMatters: 2016 成立,前 Waymo 工程师创立,无人配送车先驱
早期做无方向盘的自动送货小车,重塑最后一公里
转向把「Nuro Driver」自动驾驶系统对外授权
体现自动驾驶从自营到授权的务实转型

products.name: Nuro Driver
products.description: 把多年积累的自动驾驶系统对外授权给车企与出行公司。

news.title: Nuro 从自营配送转向对外授权 Nuro Driver 系统
news.summary: 面对自动驾驶商业化的漫长与烧钱，无人配送先驱 Nuro 调整战略重心，从自己运营配送车转向把积累多年的「Nuro Driver」自动驾驶系统授权给车企与出行公司，走轻资产技术输出路线。

xaira.name: Xaira
xaira.oneLiner: 重金起步的 AI 药物发现公司。
xaira.business: 由 ARCH 等重金孵化，用生成式 AI 与大规模实验做新药发现。
xaira.oneLinerEn: An AI drug-discovery company launched with heavy backing.
xaira.tagline: 以 AI 与生物学交汇造药
xaira.taglineEn: Where AI meets biology to make medicines
xaira.businessEn: An AI-first drug-discovery company launched in 2024 with about $1 billion, involving Nobel laureate David Baker's work.
xaira.description: Xaira Therapeutics 是 2024 年「重金起步」的 AI 制药公司——由顶级风投 ARCH、Foresite 牵头,一出场就带着约 10 亿美元资金,是史上启动资金最多的生物科技公司之一。它汇聚了 AI 与生物学的顶尖人才,包括诺奖得主 David Baker(蛋白质设计/RFdiffusion 的开创者)相关的技术,试图用最前沿的 AI(尤其蛋白质与分子生成)来发现和设计新药。作为「用最强 AI + 最多钱 + 最强团队一起攻药物发现」的代表,Xaira 是这波 AI 制药里最受瞩目的新贵之一,但真正的考验仍在能否产出进入临床、最终获批的药物。
xaira.descriptionEn: Xaira Therapeutics is a 2024 "heavily funded from day one" AI-pharma company — led by top VCs ARCH and Foresite, launching with about $1 billion, one of the best-capitalized biotech startups ever. It gathers top AI and biology talent, including technology associated with Nobel laureate David Baker (pioneer of protein design/RFdiffusion), aiming to use the most cutting-edge AI (especially protein and molecule generation) to discover and design new drugs. As a representative of "attack drug discovery with the strongest AI + the most money + the best team," Xaira is one of the most-watched newcomers in AI pharma, though the real test remains whether it can produce drugs that reach the clinic and ultimately win approval.
whyItMatters: 2024 重金起步,约 10 亿美元启动资金
诺奖得主 David Baker 蛋白设计相关技术
用最前沿 AI(蛋白/分子生成)造药
最受瞩目 AI 制药新贵,考验在能否产出获批药

products.name: AI 药物发现平台
products.description: 重金起步,汇聚顶尖 AI 与生物学人才(含蛋白设计)发现新药。

news.title: Xaira 携约 10 亿美元启动资金攻坚 AI 药物发现
news.summary: 2024 年由 ARCH、Foresite 牵头设立的 Xaira 带着约 10 亿美元资金起步，是史上启动资金最多的生物科技公司之一，汇聚诺奖得主 David Baker 蛋白质设计相关技术，考验在于能否产出获批药物。

evoscale.name: EvolutionaryScale
evoscale.oneLiner: 蛋白质大语言模型 ESM3 的开发商。
evoscale.business: ESM 系列蛋白质语言模型，能生成全新蛋白，原 Meta FAIR 团队创立。
evoscale.oneLinerEn: The developer of the ESM3 protein language model.
evoscale.tagline: 用大模型理解生命语言
evoscale.taglineEn: A language model for the language of life
evoscale.industry: AI 制药 / 生物 AI
evoscale.businessEn: Builds the ESM3 protein language model that understands and generates proteins, for biology and drug design.
evoscale.description: EvolutionaryScale 是蛋白质大语言模型 ESM3 的开发商,由原 Meta FAIR 的蛋白质团队(ESM 系列的核心人)出走创立。它的思路是:蛋白质就像一种「语言」(氨基酸序列),可以用类似大语言模型的方法去学习——ESM3 能理解蛋白质的序列、结构与功能,还能像 GPT 生成文字一样「生成」全新的蛋白质,用于药物、酶、材料设计等。这是「AI for Science」里最硬核的方向之一:不是聊天,而是让 AI 真正读懂并创造生命的分子。EvolutionaryScale 起步即获约 1.42 亿美元种子轮,是生物大模型赛道最受关注的公司之一。
evoscale.descriptionEn: EvolutionaryScale is the developer of the ESM3 protein language model, founded by the former Meta FAIR protein team (the core people behind the ESM series). Its idea: proteins are like a "language" (amino-acid sequences) that can be learned with LLM-like methods — ESM3 understands proteins' sequences, structures and functions, and can "generate" novel proteins like GPT generates text, for drug, enzyme and material design. This is one of the most hardcore directions in "AI for Science": not chatting, but AI truly reading and creating the molecules of life. EvolutionaryScale launched with about a $142 million seed round — one of the most-watched companies in biological foundation models.
whyItMatters: 蛋白质大模型 ESM3 开发商,原 Meta FAIR 团队
把蛋白质当「语言」用大模型学习
能理解并生成全新蛋白质,用于药物/酶/材料
约 1.42 亿美元种子,生物大模型最受关注之一

products.name: ESM3
products.description: 能理解并生成全新蛋白质的大语言模型,用于药物/酶/材料设计。

news.title: EvolutionaryScale 携 1.42 亿美元种子轮推进 ESM3 蛋白质生成
news.summary: 由原 Meta FAIR 蛋白质团队创立的 EvolutionaryScale 持续推进 ESM3 蛋白质大模型,可理解并生成全新蛋白质,面向药物、酶与材料设计,是生物大模型赛道最受关注的公司之一。

minimax.name: MiniMax
minimax.oneLiner: 中国大模型独角兽，海螺 AI 与视频生成出圈。
minimax.oneLinerEn: A Chinese large-model unicorn, breaking out with the Hailuo assistant and video generation.
minimax.business: 自研大模型与海螺 AI 助手、Hailuo 视频生成，出海表现亮眼。
minimax.businessEn: In-house large models, the Hailuo AI assistant and Hailuo video generation, with strong traction in overseas markets.
minimax.description: MiniMax 由前商汤科技高管闫俊杰于 2021 年创立，是中国「AI 六小龙」之一，背后有阿里、腾讯、红杉中国等投资。它走「全模态 + 出海」路线：自研文本大模型 MiniMax M 系列(最新 M2.1 强化编程)，消费端有海螺 AI 助手，以及在海外爆火的 Hailuo 文/图生视频——被黄仁勋点名称赞为「世界级」。2026 年 1 月 9 日，MiniMax 在港交所上市，IPO 募资约 5.4 亿美元，首日大涨约 109% 至 345 港元，估值约 137 亿美元，是这波中国 AI 公司赴港上市潮的代表之一。
minimax.descriptionEn: MiniMax was founded in 2021 by former SenseTime executive Yan Junjie and is one of China's "six AI tigers," backed by Alibaba, Tencent and HongShan (Sequoia China). It follows an "all-modality + global" path: its in-house MiniMax M-series text models (the latest M2.1 strengthens coding), the consumer Hailuo AI assistant, and the overseas-hit Hailuo text/image-to-video product — which NVIDIA's Jensen Huang singled out as "world-class." On January 9, 2026, MiniMax listed in Hong Kong, raising about $538 million; its shares jumped roughly 109% on debut to HK$345, valuing it at about $13.7 billion — a flagship of the wave of Chinese AI companies going public in Hong Kong.
whyItMatters: Hailuo 视频生成海外出圈，被黄仁勋称「世界级」
全模态布局：文本 M 系列 + 海螺助手 + 视频
2026.1 港交所上市，首日大涨 109%、估值约 137 亿美元
中国「AI 六小龙」之一，阿里腾讯红杉加持

products.name: 海螺 (Hailuo)
products.description: 以视频与语音生成出圈的 AI 产品。

products.name: abab 大模型
products.description: 自研的多模态大模型系列。

news.title: 连发 M2.5、M2.7 至 M3.0 大模型,快速迭代文本模型系列
news.summary: MiniMax 在 2026 年密集迭代旗舰模型:2 月发布 M2.5 及 Lightning 版本,3 月推出 M2.7,6 月发布 MiniMax-M3.0,持续强化其在文本大模型上的竞争力。

news.title: 发布 2025 年报:营收 7900 万美元同比增 159%,ARR 突破 1.5 亿美元
news.summary: MiniMax 于 3 月 2 日发布上市后首份年报,2025 年营收 7900 万美元、同比增长 158.9%,超 70% 来自海外市场;2026 年 2 月 ARR 突破 1.5 亿美元,上市以来股价累计上涨逾三倍。

news.title: 登陆港交所(00100),首日涨 42%、市值约 719 亿港元
news.summary: 2026 年 1 月 9 日挂牌,成为全球从创立到 IPO 最快的 AI 公司之一;阿里、阿布扎比投资局基石认购;前 9 个月营收同比增超 170%,海外贡献超 70%。

news.title: 发布海螺 Hailuo 2.3 视频模型,全球累计生成视频超 6 亿条
news.summary: MiniMax 发布物理表现更强的视频生成模型 Hailuo 2.3,提升人体动作与面部微表情自然度,并支持动漫、水墨、游戏 CG 等风格;截至 2025 年底其视频模型全球累计生成超 6 亿条视频。

zhipu.name: 智谱 AI
zhipu.oneLiner: 清华系大模型公司，GLM 系列，全球首家上市的大模型公司。
zhipu.oneLinerEn: The Tsinghua-rooted GLM model company — the world's first listed large-language-model company.
zhipu.taglineEn: Teaching machines to think like humans
zhipu.subcategory: GLM 系列 / 企业应用
zhipu.business: GLM 系列大模型与企业应用，中国「AI 六小龙」之一。
zhipu.businessEn: The GLM family of large models and enterprise applications — one of China's "six AI tigers."
zhipu.description: 智谱 AI(国际品牌 Z.ai)脱胎于清华大学知识工程实验室(KEG)，2019 年成立，是中国「AI 六小龙」中学术血统最纯的一家。其 GLM 系列快速迭代(GLM-4.5/4.6/4.7 到 2026 年的 GLM-5/5.1)，在开源与编程/智能体能力上口碑领先，被广泛用于企业与开发者。2026 年 1 月 8 日，智谱在港交所上市(股票代码 2513)，成为全球首家上市的纯大模型公司，IPO 估值约 70 亿美元；上市后因散户狂热，股价一度暴涨十几倍到二十几倍，市值一度冲上约 1000 亿美元量级(涨幅与市值均属高度投机、波动极大)。2025 年营收约 72.4 亿元人民币、同比增长 132%，但仍处大额亏损。
zhipu.descriptionEn: Zhipu AI (international brand Z.ai) grew out of Tsinghua University's Knowledge Engineering Group (KEG) lab and was founded in 2019, making it the most academically rooted of China's "six AI tigers." Its GLM series iterates rapidly (GLM-4.5/4.6/4.7 through GLM-5/5.1 in 2026), with a strong reputation for open weights and coding/agentic capability, widely used by enterprises and developers. On January 8, 2026, Zhipu listed in Hong Kong (ticker 2513), becoming the world's first listed pure large-model company, at an IPO valuation of about $7 billion; after listing, a retail frenzy sent the stock up more than ten- to twenty-fold, briefly pushing its market cap to the ~$100 billion range (a highly speculative, extremely volatile move). Its 2025 revenue was about RMB 7.24 billion, up 132% year over year, though it remained deeply loss-making.
whyItMatters: 全球首家上市的纯大模型公司(港股 2513)
清华 KEG 血统，GLM 系列开源与编程能力领先
上市后散户狂热，市值一度冲上千亿美元(高度投机)
中国「AI 六小龙」学术派代表

products.name: GLM 系列
products.description: 自研的通用与多模态大模型,含开源版本。

products.name: 智谱清言
products.description: 面向消费者与企业的对话助手。

news.title: 智谱AI创始人发布「Touch High」AGI战略，港股当日涨逾7%
news.summary: 创始人唐杰宣布「Touch High」计划，以AGI研究取代短期商业化，聚焦长程任务、自主智能体等四大方向，并承诺实现AGI前放弃薪酬；港股智谱当日涨逾7%。

news.title: GLM-5.2 首周使用量暴增 27 倍，智谱 AI 启动定制 ASIC 推理芯片探索
news.summary: GLM-5.2 首周日均 token 使用量激增 27 倍，智谱 AI 初步接洽国内芯片设计公司探索定制 ASIC 推理芯片；受美国出口管制影响，项目落地预计逾两年。

news.title: 启动最高336亿港元配售，或成2026港股最大再融资
news.summary: 智谱AI在IPO解禁后即宣布配售1980万股，定价1588-1698港元、折价最高13%，拟募资至多约43亿美元，用于研发、业务扩张与并购，规模超其IPO六倍。

news.title: 开源新旗舰GLM-5.2，支持百万token无损上下文
news.summary: 6月17日智谱正式发布并开源新一代旗舰大模型GLM-5.2，支持最高100万token无损上下文，编码能力显著增强，在多项基准测试中登顶。

stepfun.name: 阶跃星辰
stepfun.oneLiner: 中国多模态大模型公司。
stepfun.oneLinerEn: A Chinese frontier lab focused on multimodal large models.
stepfun.business: Step 系列多模态大模型，主打万亿参数与多模态能力。
stepfun.businessEn: The Step series of multimodal large models, emphasizing trillion-parameter scale and multimodal capability.
stepfun.description: 阶跃星辰(StepFun)是中国领先的大模型创业公司之一,成立于 2023 年,创始人姜大昕是前微软全球副总裁、微软亚洲研究院的资深科学家。它是中国「大模型六小虎」之一,尤其以多模态见长——不只做语言,还发力图像、语音、视频的理解与生成,推出了 Step 系列覆盖多模态的大模型,追求打造能看、能听、能说、能理解的通用多模态智能。在国内大模型竞争白热化、又要应对算力与商业化压力的环境下,阶跃星辰凭借顶尖的研发团队和多模态技术特色站稳第一梯队,并探索在内容创作、智能终端、Agent 等方向落地。作为中国原创大模型的代表力量之一,阶跃星辰体现了国内在追赶前沿多模态大模型上的努力。
stepfun.descriptionEn: StepFun is one of China's leading large-model startups, founded in 2023 by Jiang Daxin, a former Microsoft corporate vice president and senior scientist at Microsoft Research Asia. It is one of China's "six little dragons" of large models, especially strong in multimodality — not only language but also image, voice and video understanding and generation — releasing the Step series of multimodal models and pursuing general multimodal intelligence that can see, hear, speak and understand. Amid white-hot domestic model competition and pressures of compute and commercialization, StepFun holds a first-tier position on its top research team and multimodal strengths, and explores deployment in content creation, smart devices and agents. As a representative force of China's homegrown large models, StepFun embodies domestic efforts to catch up on frontier multimodal models.
whyItMatters: 中国领先大模型创业公司,2023 成立
创始人姜大昕:前微软全球副总裁、MSRA 资深科学家
中国「大模型六小虎」之一,尤以多模态见长
Step 系列覆盖图/声/视频,追求通用多模态智能

products.name: Step 系列
products.description: 覆盖语言与图/声/视频的多模态大模型。

news.title: 阶跃星辰 Step 系列多模态模型覆盖图像语音视频,稳居第一梯队
news.summary: 这家 2023 年成立、由前微软全球副总裁姜大昕创办的「大模型六小虎」之一,以多模态见长,Step 系列覆盖图像、语音、视频理解与生成,并向内容创作、智能终端、Agent 方向落地。

sensetime.name: 商汤科技
sensetime.oneLiner: 中国 AI 视觉与大模型老牌公司。
sensetime.oneLinerEn: A veteran Chinese AI company spanning computer vision and large models.
sensetime.tagline: 坚持原创，让 AI 引领人类进步
sensetime.taglineEn: Advancing human progress through original AI research
sensetime.business: 计算机视觉起家，日日新(SenseNova)大模型与 AI 算力基础设施。
sensetime.businessEn: Rooted in computer vision, now offering the SenseNova large-model family and AI compute infrastructure.
sensetime.description: 商汤科技(SenseTime)是中国 AI 的老牌代表企业之一,港股上市,早年以计算机视觉(人脸识别、图像/视频理解、智能安防、自动驾驶感知等)技术领先而成为中国「AI 视觉四小龙」之首,拥有深厚的算法积累和自建的大规模 AI 算力基础设施(AIDC)。进入大模型时代,商汤全力转向生成式 AI,推出「日日新」(SenseNova)大模型体系,布局大语言模型、多模态、文生图/视频等,并把「大装置」算力基础设施对外提供算力服务。虽然经历了商业模式转型和美国制裁等挑战,商汤凭借算法、算力和多年行业落地经验,仍是中国 AI 的重要力量。作为从「AI 视觉时代」跨入「大模型时代」的中国 AI 老兵,商汤科技体现了中国头部 AI 公司在技术浪潮更迭中的转型与坚持。
sensetime.descriptionEn: SenseTime is one of China's veteran flagship AI companies, listed in Hong Kong, which early on led in computer vision (face recognition, image/video understanding, smart security, autonomous-driving perception) to become the foremost of China's "four little dragons" of AI vision, with deep algorithm accumulation and its own large-scale AI compute infrastructure (AIDC). In the large-model era, SenseTime pivoted fully to generative AI, launching the "SenseNova" large-model system spanning LLMs, multimodal and text-to-image/video, and offering its "big device" compute infrastructure as a compute service. Despite challenges from business-model transformation and U.S. sanctions, SenseTime remains an important force in Chinese AI on its algorithms, compute and years of industry-deployment experience. As a Chinese AI veteran crossing from the "AI-vision era" into the "large-model era," SenseTime embodies leading Chinese AI companies' transformation and persistence through shifting technology waves.
whyItMatters: 中国 AI 老牌代表,港股上市,「AI 视觉四小龙」之首
计算机视觉技术领先,自建大规模算力基础设施(AIDC)
转向生成式 AI,推「日日新 SenseNova」大模型体系
从 AI 视觉时代跨入大模型时代的中国 AI 老兵

products.name: 日日新 (SenseNova)
products.description: 商汤的大模型体系,覆盖语言与多模态。

products.name: 大装置 (AIDC)
products.description: 自建的大规模 AI 算力基础设施,对外提供算力服务。

news.title: 商汤全面转向生成式 AI,「日日新」大模型叠加大装置算力服务
news.summary: 这家港股上市的「AI 视觉四小龙」之首全力转型生成式 AI,推出日日新(SenseNova)大模型体系,布局大语言模型、多模态与文生图/视频,并将自建 AIDC 算力对外提供服务。

iflytek.name: 科大讯飞
iflytek.oneLiner: 中国智能语音龙头，星火大模型。
iflytek.oneLinerEn: China's speech-AI leader, maker of the Spark (Xinghuo) large model.
iflytek.tagline: 用人工智能建设美好世界
iflytek.taglineEn: Building a better world with artificial intelligence
iflytek.subcategory: 语音 / 翻译 / 教育
iflytek.business: 智能语音、翻译与教育硬件，讯飞星火大模型自研自主可控。
iflytek.businessEn: Speech AI, translation and education hardware, with the self-developed, self-controlled iFlytek Spark large model.
iflytek.description: 科大讯飞(iFlytek)是中国智能语音与人工智能的老牌龙头,1999 年成立,深耕语音识别、语音合成、机器翻译几十年,是这些领域中国最强、也是国际领先的公司之一。它的技术广泛落地在日常里:输入法语音、智能音箱、会议转写、翻译机、车载语音、以及教育领域的口语评测、智慧课堂等。进入大模型时代,科大讯飞推出「星火」认知大模型,把几十年的语音与 AI 积累和通用大模型结合,应用到教育、医疗、办公等行业,并强调基于国产算力训练。作为中国 AI 的代表企业之一,科大讯飞在教育和智能语音这两个它最擅长的场景有深厚壁垒,是「AI + 行业」在中国落地最广、根基最深的公司之一。
iflytek.descriptionEn: iFlytek is a veteran leader in China's intelligent voice and AI, founded in 1999, having cultivated speech recognition, speech synthesis and machine translation for decades — one of China's strongest and internationally leading companies in these fields. Its technology is widely embedded in daily life: voice input methods, smart speakers, meeting transcription, translation devices, in-car voice, and in education, oral-language assessment and smart classrooms. In the large-model era, iFlytek launched the "Spark" cognitive large model, combining decades of voice and AI accumulation with a general large model, applied across education, healthcare and office work, and emphasizing training on domestic compute. As a representative Chinese AI company, iFlytek has deep moats in education and intelligent voice — its strongest scenarios — and is one of the most broadly deployed, deeply rooted companies in "AI + industry" in China.
whyItMatters: 中国智能语音与 AI 老牌龙头,1999 成立
语音识别/合成/翻译几十年积累,国内最强之一
「星火」认知大模型,落地教育/医疗/办公
在教育与智能语音场景壁垒深厚,强调国产算力

products.name: 讯飞星火 (Spark)
products.description: 科大讯飞的认知大模型,强调国产算力训练。

products.name: 翻译机 / 听见
products.description: 翻译机、会议转写等语音 AI 硬件与应用。

news.title: 科大讯飞星火大模型基于国产算力,深耕教育医疗办公落地
news.summary: 这家 1999 年成立的中国智能语音龙头将几十年语音与 AI 积累与星火认知大模型结合,强调基于国产算力训练,在教育、医疗、办公等行业落地,教育与语音场景壁垒深厚。

cambricon.name: 寒武纪
cambricon.oneLiner: 中国 AI 芯片第一股，思元系列。
cambricon.oneLinerEn: China's "first AI-chip stock," maker of the Siyuan (MLU) series.
cambricon.tagline: 让机器更好地理解世界
cambricon.taglineEn: Helping machines better understand the world
cambricon.business: 思元(MLU)系列 AI 训练/推理芯片，国产算力替代核心标的。
cambricon.businessEn: The Siyuan (MLU) series of AI training/inference chips — a core beneficiary of China's push for domestic compute.
cambricon.description: 寒武纪(Cambricon)是「中国 AI 芯片第一股」(科创板上市),是国产 AI 加速芯片的标杆企业之一。它成立较早、专注做 AI 芯片,产品包括用于数据中心 AI 训练/推理的思元(MLU)系列加速卡等,目标是提供替代英伟达 GPU 的国产 AI 算力。在英伟达高端 AI 芯片对华出口受限、国产算力自主可控需求空前迫切的背景下,寒武纪作为纯正的国产 AI 芯片公司备受关注,业绩和股价随「国产替代」预期大幅波动、屡创新高。当然,和所有英伟达挑战者一样,它面临的核心难题是软件生态(要让开发者从 CUDA 迁移过来极难)和受限的制造条件。作为国产 AI 芯片的代表性上市公司,寒武纪承载着中国在 AI 算力芯片上突围、实现自主可控的重要期待,是观察国产算力进展的关键窗口之一。
cambricon.descriptionEn: Cambricon is "China's first AI-chip stock" (listed on the STAR Market) and one of the benchmark domestic AI-accelerator companies. Founded relatively early and focused on AI chips, its products include the Siyuan (MLU) series of accelerators for data-center AI training/inference, aiming to provide domestic AI compute that substitutes for NVIDIA GPUs. With NVIDIA's high-end AI chips restricted for export to China and demand for domestic compute autonomy unprecedentedly urgent, Cambricon, as a pure-play domestic AI-chip company, draws much attention, its earnings and stock swinging sharply and repeatedly hitting new highs on "domestic substitution" expectations. Of course, like all NVIDIA challengers, its core difficulties are the software ecosystem (migrating developers from CUDA is very hard) and constrained manufacturing. As a representative listed domestic AI-chip company, Cambricon carries significant hope for China breaking through and achieving autonomy in AI compute chips — a key window into domestic-compute progress.
whyItMatters: 「中国 AI 芯片第一股」,国产 AI 加速芯片标杆
思元(MLU)系列加速卡,替代英伟达 GPU 的国产算力
「国产替代」预期下股价大幅波动、屡创新高
难题在软件生态(CUDA 迁移难)与受限制造

news.title: 2026 年 Q1 营收 28.85 亿元增 160%,净利 10.13 亿增 185%
news.summary: 一季度营收同比增长 159.56%,归母净利润 10.13 亿元、同比增长 185.04%,经营现金流净额 8.34 亿元实现由负转正。

news.title: 寒武纪思元系列乘国产替代东风,业绩股价屡创新高
news.summary: 在英伟达高端 AI 芯片对华出口受限背景下,「中国 AI 芯片第一股」寒武纪的思元(MLU)系列加速卡承接国产算力需求,业绩与股价随国产替代预期大幅波动、屡创新高。

moorethreads.name: 摩尔线程
moorethreads.oneLiner: 国产全功能 GPU 新锐，「中国英伟达」。
moorethreads.oneLinerEn: A rising Chinese full-function GPU maker dubbed "China's NVIDIA."
moorethreads.tagline: 打造中国人自己的全功能 GPU
moorethreads.business: 自研全功能 GPU(MTT 系列)，覆盖 AI 计算与图形，冲刺国产替代。
moorethreads.businessEn: In-house full-function GPUs (the MTT series) spanning AI compute and graphics, racing to become a domestic alternative.
moorethreads.description: 摩尔线程(Moore Threads)是国产全功能 GPU 的新锐代表,成立于 2020 年,由多位有英伟达等国际大厂背景的资深人创立,被称为「中国的英伟达」。所谓「全功能 GPU」,是指它的芯片不只做 AI 计算,还同时支持图形渲染、视频编解码、科学计算等,力求做一颗像英伟达 GPU 那样通用全能的国产 GPU。它同时布局消费级显卡、AI 训练/推理加速卡和数据中心算力,并努力构建自己的软件生态。在英伟达高端 AI 芯片对华受限、国产算力自主需求迫切的背景下,摩尔线程承载着「造出中国自己的通用 GPU」的期待,是国产 GPU 赛道最受关注的公司之一,并推进 IPO。当然,和所有挑战者一样,它最大的难关是如何突破英伟达 CUDA 生态的护城河、并在受限制造条件下持续迭代。作为国产全功能 GPU 的代表,摩尔线程是中国算力自主的重要力量。
moorethreads.descriptionEn: Moore Threads is an upstart representative of domestic full-function GPUs, founded in 2020 by veterans with backgrounds at NVIDIA and other international firms, called "China's NVIDIA." A "full-function GPU" means its chips do not only AI computing but also graphics rendering, video encoding/decoding and scientific computing, striving for a versatile all-around domestic GPU like NVIDIA's. It works on consumer graphics cards, AI training/inference accelerators and data-center compute at once, and strives to build its own software ecosystem. With NVIDIA's high-end AI chips restricted for China and urgent demand for domestic compute autonomy, Moore Threads carries the hope of "building China's own general-purpose GPU," one of the most-watched companies in the domestic-GPU space, and is pursuing an IPO. Of course, like all challengers, its biggest hurdle is breaking through NVIDIA's CUDA-ecosystem moat and iterating under constrained manufacturing. As a representative of domestic full-function GPUs, Moore Threads is an important force in China's compute autonomy.
whyItMatters: 国产全功能 GPU 新锐,2020 成立,「中国的英伟达」
全功能:AI 计算+图形渲染+视频编解码+科学计算
布局消费显卡/AI 加速卡/数据中心,构建软件生态
承载国产通用 GPU 期待,推进 IPO,难关在 CUDA 生态

news.title: 摩尔线程推进 IPO,全功能 GPU 覆盖 AI 计算与图形渲染

biren.name: 壁仞科技
biren.oneLiner: 国产高端 GPGPU 新锐，2026 港股首个 AI 芯片 IPO。
biren.oneLinerEn: A rising Chinese high-end GPGPU maker — Hong Kong's first AI-chip IPO of 2026.
biren.tagline: 为通用计算打造国产 GPU
biren.business: 壁砺(BR)系列通用 GPU，面向 AI 训练与通用计算。
biren.businessEn: The Bili (BR) series of general-purpose GPUs, aimed at AI training and general compute.
biren.description: 壁仞科技(Biren Technology)是中国高端通用 GPU(GPGPU)的新锐代表之一,总部上海,成立于 2019 年,由一批有国际大厂经验的芯片人创立,目标是做出能对标英伟达数据中心 GPU 的国产高性能通用计算芯片,用于 AI 训练与推理、以及通用科学计算。在英伟达高端 AI 芯片对华出口受限、国产替代需求迫切的背景下,壁仞这类国产 GPGPU 承载着「算力自主可控」的战略期待。它推出了自研架构的高端 GPU,并要在受限的制造条件下持续迭代、构建软件生态(这也是最难的部分)。2026 年壁仞在港交所完成 IPO,成为港股市场上受关注的国产 AI 芯片上市公司之一。作为国产高端 GPU 的代表新锐,壁仞是中国在最关键、也最难的高端算力芯片上寻求突破的重要力量。
biren.descriptionEn: Biren Technology is one of the upstart representatives of China's high-end general-purpose GPUs (GPGPUs), headquartered in Shanghai, founded in 2019 by chip veterans with experience at major international firms, aiming to build domestic high-performance general-computing chips that can rival NVIDIA's data-center GPUs, for AI training and inference and general scientific computing. With NVIDIA's high-end AI chips restricted for export to China and urgent demand for domestic substitution, domestic GPGPUs like Biren carry the strategic hope of "compute autonomy." It has launched high-end GPUs on its own architecture and must keep iterating under constrained manufacturing conditions and build a software ecosystem (the hardest part). In 2026 Biren completed an IPO on the Hong Kong exchange, becoming a closely watched listed domestic AI-chip company. As a representative upstart in domestic high-end GPUs, Biren is an important force in China's push to break through on the most critical and most difficult high-end compute chips.
whyItMatters: 中国高端通用 GPU(GPGPU)新锐,上海,2019 成立
目标对标英伟达数据中心 GPU,用于 AI 训练推理

hygon.name: 海光信息
hygon.oneLiner: 国产 CPU + DCU 加速卡厂商。
hygon.oneLinerEn: A Chinese maker of domestic x86 CPUs and DCU accelerators.
hygon.business: x86 CPU 与 DCU(深度计算单元)加速卡，国产算力重要一极。
hygon.businessEn: x86 CPUs and DCU (Deep Computing Unit) accelerators — an important pillar of domestic compute.
hygon.description: 海光信息(Hygon)是国产高端处理器的代表厂商之一,同时做 CPU 和 DCU(深度计算单元,即 GPGPU 加速卡)。它的 CPU 源于早年获得的 AMD x86 架构授权,兼容主流生态、性能较强,广泛用于服务器,是国产服务器 CPU 替代进口(英特尔/AMD)的重要力量。更受关注的是它的 DCU——一种类似 GPU 的通用计算加速卡,用于 AI 训练/推理和高性能计算,并强调兼容主流的编程生态,以降低迁移门槛。在英伟达高端 AI 芯片对华受限、国产算力自主需求迫切的背景下,海光的 CPU+DCU 双线布局让它成为「国产算力」最受关注的上市公司之一。作为兼具国产 CPU 与 AI 加速卡的稀缺标的,海光信息承载着中国在服务器与 AI 算力芯片上自主可控的重要期待。
hygon.descriptionEn: Hygon is one of the representative makers of domestic high-end processors in China, producing both CPUs and DCUs (Deep Computing Units, i.e. GPGPU accelerators). Its CPUs derive from an early AMD x86 architecture license, compatible with the mainstream ecosystem with fairly strong performance, widely used in servers — an important force in domestic server-CPU substitution for imports (Intel/AMD). More closely watched is its DCU — a GPU-like general-computing accelerator for AI training/inference and high-performance computing, emphasizing compatibility with the mainstream programming ecosystem to lower migration barriers. With NVIDIA's high-end AI chips restricted for China and urgent demand for domestic compute autonomy, Hygon's dual CPU+DCU layout makes it one of the most-watched listed companies in "domestic compute." As a rare name combining domestic CPUs and AI accelerators, Hygon carries significant hope for China's autonomy in server and AI compute chips.

CPU 源于 AMD x86 授权,兼容生态,国产服务器替代
DCU 是类 GPU 通用加速卡,用于 AI 训练推理
CPU+DCU 双线,「国产算力」最受关注上市公司之一

ubtech.name: 优必选
ubtech.oneLiner: 中国人形机器人第一股。
ubtech.oneLinerEn: China's first publicly listed humanoid-robot company.
ubtech.tagline: 让智能机器人走进千家万户
ubtech.taglineEn: Bringing intelligent robots into every home
ubtech.business: Walker 系列人形机器人，率先进入工厂实训，教育机器人起家。
ubtech.businessEn: The Walker humanoid series — first into factory training — with roots in educational robots.
ubtech.description: 优必选(UBTech)是中国知名的人形机器人公司,总部深圳,被称为「中国人形机器人第一股」(港股上市)。它成立较早(2012 年),长期深耕伺服舵机(机器人关节的核心部件)和人形机器人整机,推出过 Walker 系列大型人形机器人,并在教育机器人、商用服务机器人等领域有实际产品和落地。凭借在伺服驱动、运动控制、人形整机上的多年积累,优必选试图把人形机器人推向工业制造(如进汽车工厂做实训)、商用服务等场景。作为最早一批、且已上市的中国人形机器人企业,优必选在这波由特斯拉 Optimus 点燃、国内众多新玩家涌入的人形机器人热潮中,是资历最老的代表之一。它与宇树、智元、星动纪元等一起,构成中国在人形机器人赛道的第一梯队力量。
ubtech.descriptionEn: UBTech is a well-known Chinese humanoid-robot company headquartered in Shenzhen, called "China's first humanoid-robot stock" (Hong Kong-listed). Founded relatively early (2012), it has long cultivated servo actuators (the core components of robot joints) and full humanoid robots, launched the Walker series of large humanoids, and has real products and deployments in educational and commercial service robots. On years of accumulation in servo drives, motion control and full humanoids, UBTech is trying to push humanoids into industrial manufacturing (e.g. training in car factories) and commercial service scenarios. As one of the earliest and already-listed Chinese humanoid-robot companies, UBTech is one of the most senior representatives in this humanoid boom ignited by Tesla's Optimus and joined by many new domestic players. Together with Unitree, AgiBot and RobotEra, it forms part of China's first tier in humanoid robotics.
whyItMatters: 中国知名人形机器人公司,深圳,「人形机器人第一股」
2012 成立,深耕伺服舵机与人形整机,推 Walker 系列
推动人形机器人进汽车工厂实训、商用服务
最早一批且已上市的中国人形机器人企业

products.name: Walker
products.description: 大型人形机器人,推动进汽车工厂实训与商用服务。

news.title: 优必选 Walker 人形机器人进汽车工厂实训,拓展工业场景
news.summary: 「中国人形机器人第一股」优必选凭借伺服舵机与运动控制多年积累,推动 Walker 系列人形机器人进入汽车工厂实训与商用服务场景,稳居国内人形机器人第一梯队。

agibot.name: 智元机器人
agibot.oneLiner: 中国明星人形机器人公司，量产落地快。
agibot.oneLinerEn: A star Chinese humanoid-robot company with fast mass-production rollout.
agibot.tagline: 以智能机器创造无限生产力
agibot.role: 机器人本体 + 具身数据
agibot.business: 远征/灵犀系列人形机器人，主打量产与具身数据，稚晖君联合创立。
agibot.businessEn: The Yuanzheng/Lingxi humanoid series, focused on mass production and embodied data; co-founded by "Zhihui Jun."
agibot.description: 智元机器人(AgiBot)是中国最受瞩目的人形机器人明星公司之一,成立于 2023 年,联合创始人是前华为「天才少年」稚晖君(彭志辉),自带极高关注度。智元专注通用人形和具身智能机器人的研发与量产,推出了「远征」等系列机器人,涵盖交互服务、柔性制造、科研教育等多种形态,并在推动机器人的规模化量产落地上动作很快。它同时自研机器人本体、核心部件和具身智能算法(让机器人能感知、操作、学习),走软硬一体的路线,并积极开源部分数据和模型推动生态。凭借明星团队、快速的产品迭代和量产落地能力,智元与宇树、优必选、星动纪元等一同处在中国人形机器人的第一梯队。作为中国具身智能的代表公司之一,智元站在人形机器人这个 AI 下一个大风口的最前沿。
agibot.descriptionEn: AgiBot is one of China's most-watched star humanoid-robot companies, founded in 2023, with co-founder "Zhihui Jun" (Peng Zhihui), a former Huawei "genius youth," bringing huge attention. AgiBot focuses on R&D and mass production of general-purpose humanoid and embodied-intelligence robots, launching series like "Yuanzheng" spanning interactive service, flexible manufacturing and research/education forms, and moving fast on scaled mass production. It develops robot bodies, core components and embodied-intelligence algorithms (letting robots perceive, manipulate and learn) in-house, taking a software-hardware-integrated path, and actively open-sources some data and models to grow the ecosystem. On its star team, fast product iteration and mass-production capability, AgiBot sits, alongside Unitree, UBTech and RobotEra, in the first tier of China's humanoid robotics. As a representative of China's embodied intelligence, AgiBot stands at the forefront of humanoid robots — AI's next big wave.
whyItMatters: 中国最受瞩目人形机器人明星公司之一,2023 成立
联合创始人是前华为「天才少年」稚晖君
「远征」系列,推动机器人规模化量产落地快
软硬一体+具身算法,中国人形机器人第一梯队

products.description: 通用人形与具身智能机器人,主打快速量产落地。

news.summary: 2026 年 6 月第 15000 台机器人(工业级 AGIBOT G2)下线,距破万仅 3 个月;据 Omdia,智元 2025 年以 5168 台出货、39% 市占居全球人形机器人第一;估值约 150 亿元。
