luminar.descriptionEn: Luminar is a leading U.S. automotive lidar (LiDAR) company, founded by Austin Russell, who rose to fame young (once one of the youngest self-made billionaires). Lidar emits laser light to measure distance and generates a high-precision 3D image of the surroundings in real time, seen by many as a key sensor for "safety redundancy" in high-level autonomous driving — it can still accurately perceive obstacles and distance in scenarios like darkness and backlight where cameras easily fail. Luminar focuses on high-performance, production-vehicle-oriented lidar (like Iris) and has partnered with automakers like Volvo, trying to put lidar into mass-produced passenger cars. But autonomous-driving commercialization is long, the lidar industry is fiercely competitive and long cash-burning, and Luminar faces profitability and operating pressure. As a representative of the vision of "getting lidar into mass-produced cars," Luminar sits on the difficult but crucial track of autonomous-driving perception hardware.
whyItMatters: 美国车载激光雷达代表,Austin Russell 少年成名创立
激光雷达是高级别自动驾驶「安全冗余」关键传感器
黑夜/逆光下仍能精准感知,主打量产车用(Iris)
与沃尔沃等合作,但面临盈利与经营压力

products.name: Iris 激光雷达
products.description: 面向量产车的高性能激光雷达,与沃尔沃等合作。

news.title: Luminar 推进 Iris 激光雷达上量产车，携手沃尔沃但盈利承压
news.summary: Luminar 主打面向量产乘用车的高性能激光雷达 Iris，与沃尔沃等车企合作推动装车；但自动驾驶商业化漫长、行业竞争激烈且长期烧钱，公司仍面临盈利与经营压力。

ouster.name: Ouster
ouster.tagline: 以数字激光雷达感知世界
ouster.taglineEn: Sensing the world with digital lidar
ouster.business: 数字激光雷达，覆盖汽车、机器人、工业与智慧城市。
ouster.businessEn: Digital lidar spanning automotive, robotics, industrial and smart-city applications.
ouster.description: Ouster 成立于 2015 年,是数字激光雷达(LiDAR)厂商。激光雷达通过发射激光并测量反射,实时生成周围环境的高精度三维点云,是让机器「看清」立体世界、判断距离的关键传感器,广泛用于自动驾驶、机器人、工业、智慧城市与安防等。Ouster 的技术特色是「数字激光雷达」——用类似 CMOS 图像传感器的数字化架构,把激光雷达做成更简洁、可量产、成本更低的芯片化方案,区别于传统的机械旋转式高成本激光雷达。2023 年它与另一家激光雷达先驱 Velodyne 合并,整合成更有规模的公司,以应对这个竞争激烈、又长期烧钱的行业。作为具身智能与自动驾驶的「眼睛」供应商之一,Ouster 处在机器人和无人车能否大规模落地所依赖的感知硬件环节。
ouster.descriptionEn: Ouster, founded in 2015, is a digital lidar (LiDAR) maker. Lidar emits laser light and measures reflections to generate a high-precision 3D point cloud of the surroundings in real time — a key sensor for machines to "see" the three-dimensional world and judge distance, widely used in autonomous driving, robotics, industry, smart cities and security. Ouster's distinctive technology is "digital lidar" — using a digitized architecture akin to a CMOS image sensor to make lidar a simpler, mass-producible, lower-cost chip-based solution, unlike traditional high-cost mechanical spinning lidar. In 2023 it merged with fellow lidar pioneer Velodyne into a larger company to cope with this fiercely competitive, long cash-burning industry. As one of the "eyes" suppliers for embodied intelligence and autonomous driving, Ouster sits in the perception-hardware link on which robots and self-driving vehicles depend for large-scale deployment.
whyItMatters: 2015 成立,数字激光雷达(LiDAR)厂商
激光雷达生成三维点云,让机器看清立体世界
数字化架构:更简洁、可量产、成本更低的芯片化方案
2023 与 Velodyne 合并,自动驾驶/机器人的「眼睛」

products.name: 数字激光雷达
products.description: 芯片化的数字激光雷达,更简洁可量产,已与 Velodyne 合并。

news.title: Ouster 完成与 Velodyne 整合，数字激光雷达押注芯片化降本
news.summary: 2023 年 Ouster 与激光雷达先驱 Velodyne 合并，整合成更有规模的公司以应对烧钱的行业竞争。其数字化架构借鉴 CMOS 传感器思路，把激光雷达做成可量产、成本更低的芯片化方案。

horizon.name: 地平线
horizon.oneLiner: 中国车规 AI 芯片龙头。
horizon.oneLinerEn: China's leader in automotive-grade AI chips.
horizon.tagline: 让每辆车都成为智能体
horizon.business: 征程系列车规智能驾驶芯片与软硬一体方案，中国智驾芯片主力。
horizon.businessEn: The Journey series of automotive-grade driving chips and integrated hardware-software solutions — China's mainstay in smart-driving silicon.
horizon.description: 地平线(Horizon Robotics)由前百度深度学习研究院负责人余凯于 2015 年创立,是中国车规智能驾驶芯片的龙头。其「征程(Journey)」系列芯片专为车载辅助/自动驾驶设计,配套软硬一体的 Horizon Mono/Pilot/SuperDrive 方案,被大量中外车企采用装车,是国产智驾芯片替代英伟达/Mobileye 的主力之一。2024 年 10 月,地平线在港交所上市(9660),募资约 6.7 亿美元、是当年香港最大 IPO 之一。随着中国车企智能化竞赛白热化、以及本土供应链需求,地平线的芯片出货与业绩快速增长。
horizon.descriptionEn: Horizon Robotics was founded in 2015 by Kai Yu, former head of Baidu's deep-learning institute, and is China's leader in automotive-grade smart-driving chips. Its Journey-series chips are purpose-built for in-vehicle assisted/autonomous driving, paired with integrated Horizon Mono/Pilot/SuperDrive hardware-software solutions adopted by many Chinese and foreign automakers — a mainstay of domestic smart-driving silicon competing with NVIDIA/Mobileye. In October 2024 Horizon listed in Hong Kong (9660), raising about $670 million in one of the city's largest IPOs of the year. As China's automaker intelligence race intensifies and demand for a local supply chain grows, Horizon's chip shipments and earnings have grown rapidly.
whyItMatters: 中国车规智驾芯片龙头,创始人余凯出身百度
征程系列 + 软硬一体方案,大量车企装车
国产替代英伟达/Mobileye 主力之一
2024.10 港股上市,当年香港最大 IPO 之一

products.name: 征程 (Journey)
products.description: 中国车规级智能驾驶 AI 芯片龙头。

products.name: 智驾方案
products.description: 面向车企的软硬一体智能驾驶方案。

news.title: HSD V2.0智驾系统发布,iCAR V27首发OTA
news.summary: 地平线于2026年6月29日正式发布HSD V2.0智能驾驶系统,iCAR V27成为首款获得OTA升级的车型,6月30日起陆续推送。

news.title: 发布国内首颗舱驾融合芯片"地平线星空"
news.summary: 地平线于2026年4月发布国内首颗舱驾融合车载智能芯片"地平线星空",并推出车载智能操作系统,HSD舱驾一体方案已获超十家品牌合作意向。

news.title: 2025年营收约37.6亿元,同比增长57.7%
news.summary: 地平线发布2025年业绩,全年营收约37.58亿元,同比增长57.7%,研发投入持续高企,智驾方案量产上车规模继续扩大。

news.title: 地平线港交所上市募资约 6.7 亿美元，成当年香港最大 IPO 之一
news.summary: 2024 年 10 月地平线登陆港交所（9660）。随着中国车企智能化竞赛白热化与本土供应链需求，其征程系列芯片与软硬一体方案被大量车企装车，出货与业绩快速增长。

eqix.name: Equinix
eqix.oneLiner: 全球最大数据中心互联 REIT。
eqix.oneLinerEn: The world's largest data-center interconnection REIT.
eqix.taglineEn: Where the world's digital leaders connect
eqix.business: 全球互联数据中心(IBX)与云交换，AI 算力落地的核心地产平台。
eqix.businessEn: Global interconnected data centers (IBX) and cloud exchange — a core real-estate platform where AI compute lands.
eqix.description: Equinix 是全球最大的数据中心互联(interconnection)公司,以 REIT(房地产信托)形式上市,在全球几十个主要城市运营大量数据中心。它的独特价值不只是「提供机房、电力、制冷」,更在于「互联」——Equinix 的数据中心是众多网络、云厂商、企业汇聚互联的枢纽(carrier-neutral 中立机房),客户把设备放进来,就能就近、低延迟地和成千上万家其他公司、以及各大公有云直接连接,这种密集的互联生态是它最强的护城河。在 AI 时代,企业既要用公有云、又要就近部署自己的算力和数据、还要多云互联,Equinix 作为「连接一切的中枢」持续受益。作为数据中心与互联基础设施的全球龙头,Equinix 是 AI 和云计算物理承载层里最核心、最稳健的公司之一。
eqix.descriptionEn: Equinix is the world's largest data-center interconnection company, listed as a REIT (real-estate investment trust), operating many data centers across dozens of major global cities. Its unique value is not just "providing space, power and cooling" but "interconnection" — Equinix's data centers are hubs where many networks, cloud providers and enterprises converge and interconnect (carrier-neutral facilities); customers placing equipment there can directly connect nearby and at low latency to thousands of other companies and all the major public clouds, and this dense interconnection ecosystem is its strongest moat. In the AI era, enterprises want to use public cloud, deploy their own compute and data nearby, and interconnect across multiple clouds, and Equinix, as the "hub connecting everything," keeps benefiting. As the global leader in data-center and interconnection infrastructure, Equinix is one of the most core, steadiest companies in the physical-hosting layer of AI and cloud computing.
whyItMatters: 全球最大数据中心互联公司,以 REIT 形式上市
价值不只机房,更在「互联」:中立机房汇聚网络与云
密集互联生态是最强护城河
AI 时代多云互联、就近部署,持续受益

products.name: Equinix 数据中心 / 互联
products.description: 全球最大数据中心互联平台,汇聚网络与云的中立枢纽。

news.title: Equinix 互联生态护城河在 AI 多云时代持续兑现价值
news.summary: 企业既要用公有云、又要就近部署自有算力并实现多云互联，Equinix 的中立机房作为汇聚成千上万网络与云厂商的低延迟互联枢纽，在 AI 时代作为「连接一切的中枢」持续受益。

dlr.name: Digital Realty
dlr.oneLiner: 全球最大数据中心 REIT 之一。
dlr.oneLinerEn: One of the world's largest data-center REITs.
dlr.subcategory: 超大规模数据中心 REIT
dlr.business: 大规模数据中心地产与托管，承接云厂与 AI 算力扩张。
dlr.businessEn: Large-scale data-center real estate and colocation, absorbing cloud and AI compute expansion.
dlr.description: Digital Realty(数字房地产)是全球最大的数据中心 REIT(房地产信托)之一,在世界各地拥有和运营大量数据中心,把机房空间、电力、制冷和网络作为服务出租给云厂商、互联网公司和大型企业。它是数据中心这一「数字世界的地产」的核心玩家:AI 和云计算再虚拟,最终都要跑在实实在在的物理数据中心里,而建设和运营这些设施需要巨额资本、稳定电力和优质地段——这正是 Digital Realty 的生意。在 AI 数据中心需求爆发(尤其是能提供大功率、高密度、支持 GPU 集群的机房)的背景下,数据中心供不应求,Digital Realty 作为规模最大的数据中心地产商之一持续受益,并与云巨头深度合作扩建 AI 相关容量。作为数据中心 REIT 的代表,Digital Realty 是 AI 与云计算「物理承载层」里最核心、最稳健的公司之一。
dlr.descriptionEn: Digital Realty is one of the world's largest data-center REITs (real-estate investment trusts), owning and operating many data centers worldwide, renting out facility space, power, cooling and networking as a service to cloud providers, internet companies and large enterprises. It is a core player in data centers, "the real estate of the digital world": however virtual AI and cloud computing are, they ultimately run in real physical data centers, and building and operating these facilities requires huge capital, stable power and prime locations — exactly Digital Realty's business. Amid exploding AI-data-center demand (especially facilities offering high-power, high-density, GPU-cluster-supporting rooms), data centers are in short supply, and as one of the largest data-center landlords Digital Realty keeps benefiting, deeply partnering with cloud giants to expand AI-related capacity. As a representative data-center REIT, Digital Realty is one of the most core, steadiest companies in the "physical hosting layer" of AI and cloud computing.
whyItMatters: 全球最大数据中心 REIT 之一,全球拥有运营大量数据中心
出租机房空间/电力/制冷/网络,「数字世界的地产」
AI 与云最终都要跑在物理数据中心里
AI 数据中心供不应求,规模最大地产商之一持续受益

products.name: Digital Realty 数据中心
products.description: 全球最大数据中心 REIT 之一,出租机房空间/电力/制冷。

news.title: Digital Realty 联手云巨头扩建 AI 容量，高密度机房供不应求
news.summary: AI 数据中心需求爆发，尤其是可支持 GPU 集群的大功率高密度机房供不应求。作为全球最大数据中心 REIT 之一，Digital Realty 与云巨头深度合作扩建 AI 相关容量，持续受益。

gds.name: 万国数据
gds.oneLiner: 中国头部第三方数据中心运营商。
gds.oneLinerEn: A leading Chinese third-party data-center operator.
gds.tagline: 为数字中国提供算力底座
gds.business: 高性能数据中心开发与运营，中国与东南亚 AI 算力基础设施主力。
gds.businessEn: Develops and operates high-performance data centers — a mainstay of AI compute infrastructure in China and Southeast Asia.
gds.description: 万国数据(GDS)是中国头部的第三方(中立)数据中心运营商,在一线城市及周边核心地区建设、运营大型数据中心,把机房空间、电力、制冷和网络作为服务出租给云厂商、互联网公司和大型企业。它不属于任何一家云厂商,客户覆盖各大互联网与云巨头,规模和一线城市优质资源是其护城河。在 AI 时代,训练和部署大模型需要海量算力,数据中心(尤其能提供大功率、高密度、支持 AI 服务器的机房)需求激增,推动 GDS 这类数据中心运营商的成长;它也通过分拆的国际业务(GDS International / DayOne)拓展东南亚等海外市场,承接 AI 驱动的全球数据中心需求。作为中国领先的第三方数据中心平台,万国数据是 AI 算力落地所需「物理承载」这一环节的核心基础设施提供商之一。
gds.descriptionEn: GDS is a leading third-party (neutral) data-center operator in China, building and operating large data centers in and around tier-one cities and core regions, renting out facility space, power, cooling and networking as a service to cloud providers, internet companies and large enterprises. Belonging to no single cloud provider, its customers span the major internet and cloud giants, and its scale and prime tier-one-city resources are its moat. In the AI era, training and deploying large models needs massive compute, and demand surges for data centers (especially those offering high-power, high-density facilities that support AI servers), driving the growth of operators like GDS; it also expands overseas into Southeast Asia and beyond through its spun-off international business (GDS International / DayOne), taking on AI-driven global data-center demand. As China's leading third-party data-center platform, GDS is a core infrastructure provider of the "physical hosting" link needed for AI compute.
whyItMatters: 中国头部第三方(中立)数据中心运营商
一线城市及周边建运营大型数据中心,出租算力承载
中立、客户覆盖各大互联网与云巨头,一线资源是护城河
AI 算力需求激增,并拓展东南亚等海外(DayOne)

products.name: 数据中心 (GDS / DayOne)
products.description: 中国头部第三方数据中心,并拓展东南亚等海外(DayOne)。

news.title: 万国数据承接 AI 算力需求,DayOne 加速拓展东南亚
news.summary: AI 大模型训练推动高密度机房需求激增,万国数据凭一线城市优质数据中心资源持续受益,并通过分拆的国际业务 GDS International(DayOne)承接 AI 驱动的东南亚等海外数据中心需求。

irm.name: Iron Mountain
irm.oneLiner: 信息管理巨头，转型数据中心。
irm.oneLinerEn: An information-management giant pivoting into data centers.
irm.tagline: 守护与激活你的信息资产
irm.industry: 信息管理 / 数据中心
irm.subcategory: 档案存储 / 数据中心
irm.role: 信息资产 · 算力地产
irm.business: 从档案存储转向数据中心与资产管理，受益 AI 数据存储需求。
irm.businessEn: Pivoting from records storage into data centers and asset management, benefiting from AI data-storage demand.
irm.description: Iron Mountain(铁山)是全球信息管理巨头,一百多年来以「安全保管企业的实体档案文件」闻名——把海量纸质记录、磁带、重要资料存在它高度安全的仓库里,是无数大企业、政府、银行的档案托管方。如今它正积极转型:一方面把传统的文档管理数字化(帮客户把纸质档案扫描、数字化、做数据治理),另一方面大举进军数据中心业务——利用其在安全设施、房地产和企业信任上的深厚积累,建设和运营数据中心。在 AI 驱动数据爆发、数据中心需求激增的浪潮下,数据中心成为铁山增长最快的新业务之一,让这家「老牌档案公司」焕发新生。作为从「保管实体信息」向「承载数字算力」转型的代表,Iron Mountain 体现了传统信息管理巨头搭上 AI 数据中心快车的转身。
irm.descriptionEn: Iron Mountain is a global information-management giant, known for over a century for "securely storing enterprises' physical records" — keeping vast paper records, tapes and important documents in its highly secure warehouses, the records custodian for countless large enterprises, governments and banks. It is now actively transforming: on one hand digitizing traditional document management (scanning and digitizing clients' paper records and doing data governance), and on the other hand pushing into the data-center business — leveraging its deep accumulation in secure facilities, real estate and enterprise trust to build and operate data centers. Amid the wave of AI-driven data explosion and surging data-center demand, data centers have become one of Iron Mountain's fastest-growing new businesses, rejuvenating this "veteran records company." As a representative of transforming from "storing physical information" to "hosting digital compute," Iron Mountain embodies a traditional information-management giant catching the AI-data-center express.
whyItMatters: 全球信息管理巨头,百年来以安全保管企业实体档案闻名
转型:文档数字化 + 大举进军数据中心业务
利用安全设施/房地产/企业信任积累建运营数据中心
数据中心成增长最快新业务,老牌公司焕发新生

products.name: 信息管理 / 数据中心
products.description: 百年档案托管巨头,大举转型数据中心业务。

news.title: 铁山转型见效:数据中心成 Iron Mountain 增长最快业务
news.summary: 这家百年档案管理巨头利用安全设施、房地产与企业信任积累大举建设运营数据中心,在 AI 驱动数据爆发的浪潮下,数据中心已成为其增长最快的新业务之一,老牌公司焕发新生。

bloomberg.name: 彭博
bloomberg.oneLiner: 金融数据终端巨头，自研 BloombergGPT。
bloomberg.oneLinerEn: The financial-data terminal giant, maker of BloombergGPT.
bloomberg.industry: 金融数据 / 企业 AI
bloomberg.subcategory: 金融终端 / 专用大模型
bloomberg.business: 彭博终端与金融数据，BloombergGPT 面向金融领域的专用大模型。
bloomberg.businessEn: The Bloomberg Terminal and financial data, plus BloombergGPT, a finance-specialized large model.
bloomberg.description: 彭博(Bloomberg)由 Michael Bloomberg 创立,靠「彭博终端」——那台金融从业者桌上无处不在、年费数万美元的数据+资讯+交易工具——建立起金融信息帝国,是华尔街的基础设施。它掌握着海量、高质量、结构化的金融数据与新闻,这正是训练金融 AI 的绝佳燃料。彭博自研了 BloombergGPT——一个专门在金融语料上训练的大模型,并把生成式 AI 嵌进终端(新闻摘要、财报问答、数据查询等),用「独家数据 + 场景 + 分发」的护城河做金融专用 AI。作为未上市的私有巨头,彭博是「垂直行业专用 AI」最有底气的玩家之一。
bloomberg.descriptionEn: Bloomberg, founded by Michael Bloomberg, built a financial-information empire on the Bloomberg Terminal — the data + news + trading tool ubiquitous on finance professionals' desks at tens of thousands of dollars a year — the infrastructure of Wall Street. It commands vast, high-quality, structured financial data and news, ideal fuel for training financial AI. Bloomberg built BloombergGPT, a large model trained specifically on financial corpora, and embeds generative AI into the Terminal (news summaries, earnings Q&A, data queries), leveraging a moat of "exclusive data + use case + distribution" for finance-specialized AI. As a private giant, Bloomberg is one of the best-positioned players in "vertical, industry-specific AI."
whyItMatters: 彭博终端是华尔街基础设施,金融信息帝国
掌握海量高质量结构化金融数据与新闻
自研 BloombergGPT,把生成式 AI 嵌进终端
「独家数据+场景+分发」护城河,金融专用 AI

products.name: 彭博终端 (Terminal)
products.description: 金融从业者必备的数据与交易终端。

products.name: BloombergGPT
products.description: 自研的金融领域大模型。

news.title: 公布ASKB路线图,AI代理网络覆盖投资全流程
news.summary: 彭博于2026年4月16日公布ASKB新功能路线图,将彭博数据与客户自有观点打通,通过协同的AI代理网络支持盈利前准备、会议准备等多步骤投研工作流。

news.title: 推出终端智能体AI对话界面ASKB
news.summary: 彭博于2026年2月23日推出ASKB(beta),将智能体AI直接引入彭博终端,用户可用自然语言提问,由AI代理在彭博全量内容中检索、分析并综合生成投研洞察。

news.title: 彭博把 BloombergGPT 生成式 AI 深度嵌入终端
news.summary: 彭博基于金融语料自研 BloombergGPT,将新闻摘要、财报问答、数据查询等生成式 AI 能力嵌进彭博终端,以「独家数据+场景+分发」护城河做金融专用 AI。

blackrock.name: 贝莱德
blackrock.oneLiner: 全球最大资管，Aladdin 风控平台接入 AI。
blackrock.oneLinerEn: The world's largest asset manager, with AI in its Aladdin risk platform.
blackrock.tagline: 帮更多人实现财务健康
blackrock.taglineEn: Helping more people build financial well-being
blackrock.industry: 资产管理 / 金融科技
blackrock.subcategory: 资管 / Aladdin / AI 基建投资
blackrock.business: 资产管理与 Aladdin 风控/投研平台，把生成式 AI 引入投资流程，并大手笔投资 AI 基建。
blackrock.businessEn: Asset management plus the Aladdin risk/analytics platform, bringing generative AI into investing and making large AI-infrastructure investments.
blackrock.description: 贝莱德(BlackRock)是全球最大的资产管理公司,管理着十几万亿美元资产。它有两副面孔:一是庞大的资管业务(含 iShares ETF),二是 Aladdin——一个几乎成为行业标准的风险管理与投研操作系统,被大量机构用来管理和分析自己的资产,是贝莱德的「金融界安卓」。在 AI 上,贝莱德一方面把生成式 AI 引入投研、风控与客户服务;另一方面更引人注目的是「用资本押注 AI 基建」——它牵头设立大规模 AI 基础设施投资基金(与微软、MGX、英伟达等合作),并收购数据中心、电力等资产,直接为 AI 时代的算力与能源提供长期资本。贝莱德是「金融如何为 AI 供血」的核心玩家。
blackrock.descriptionEn: BlackRock is the world's largest asset manager, overseeing well over ten trillion dollars. It has two faces: a huge asset-management business (including iShares ETFs), and Aladdin — a risk-management and analytics operating system that has become almost an industry standard, used by many institutions to manage and analyze their assets, BlackRock's "Android of finance." On AI, it brings generative AI into research, risk and client service; more strikingly, it "bets capital on AI infrastructure" — leading large AI-infrastructure investment funds (partnering with Microsoft, MGX, NVIDIA and others) and acquiring data-center and power assets, directly providing long-term capital for the compute and energy of the AI era. BlackRock is a core player in "how finance funds AI."
whyItMatters: 全球最大资管,管理十几万亿美元
Aladdin 近乎行业标准的风控/投研操作系统
牵头大规模 AI 基建基金(联手微软/MGX/英伟达)
收购数据中心/电力资产,为 AI 算力供长期资本

products.name: Aladdin
products.description: 全球广泛使用的投资与风险管理平台,正接入 AI。

products.name: iShares / 资管
products.description: 全球最大资管,含 iShares ETF 系列。

news.title: 贝莱德联手微软、英伟达设 AI 基建基金,收购数据中心电力资产
news.summary: 全球最大资管贝莱德牵头设立大规模 AI 基础设施投资基金,与微软、MGX、英伟达等合作,并收购数据中心与电力资产,为 AI 时代的算力与能源提供长期资本。

duolingo.name: 多邻国
duolingo.oneLiner: 最大语言学习 App，AI 私教先行者。
duolingo.business: 游戏化语言学习，Duolingo Max 用 GPT 提供 AI 对话与讲解私教。
duolingo.oneLinerEn: The largest language-learning app, a pioneer of AI tutoring.
duolingo.tagline: 让教育免费且触手可及
duolingo.businessEn: A gamified language-learning app; Duolingo Max uses GPT for AI conversation and explanations; "AI-first" strategy.
duolingo.description: 多邻国(Duolingo)是全球最大的语言学习 App,以「游戏化 + 免费」把学外语变得轻松上瘾,拥有数亿用户。它是把生成式 AI 用进教育的先行者:高级订阅 Duolingo Max 用 GPT 等大模型提供「AI 对话练习」(和 AI 角色用外语聊天)、「逐题讲解」(错了给你详细解释为什么)等,相当于给每个学习者配一个便宜的私教。2025 年多邻国明确「AI-first」战略,用 AI 大规模、低成本地生成课程内容与练习,加速扩品类(数学、音乐等)。作为「AI + 教育」商业化最成功的上市公司之一,多邻国展示了 AI 如何让优质教育更便宜、更普及。
duolingo.descriptionEn: Duolingo is the world's largest language-learning app, making foreign-language learning fun and addictive through "gamification + free," with hundreds of millions of users. It is a pioneer of generative AI in education: its premium Duolingo Max uses GPT and other models for "AI conversation practice" (chatting with AI characters in a foreign language) and "explain-my-answer" (detailed explanations of mistakes) — like giving every learner a cheap private tutor. In 2025 Duolingo declared an "AI-first" strategy, using AI to generate course content and exercises at scale and low cost, accelerating expansion into new subjects (math, music). As one of the most commercially successful public companies in "AI + education," Duolingo shows how AI can make quality education cheaper and more accessible.
whyItMatters: 全球最大语言学习 App,游戏化+免费,数亿用户
Duolingo Max 用 GPT 做 AI 对话与逐题讲解
2025「AI-first」战略,AI 大规模低成本生成内容
「AI+教育」商业化最成功上市公司之一

products.name: Duolingo
products.description: 游戏化+免费的全球最大语言学习 App。

products.name: Duolingo Max
products.description: 用 GPT 做 AI 对话练习与逐题讲解。

news.title: 多邻国确立「AI-first」战略,用 AI 批量生成课程扩品类
news.summary: 2025 年多邻国明确 AI-first 战略,用 AI 大规模、低成本地生成课程内容与练习,加速向数学、音乐等品类扩张;Duolingo Max 订阅以 GPT 提供 AI 对话练习与逐题讲解。

speak.name: Speak
speak.oneLiner: AI 口语陪练 App，OpenAI 参投，增长迅速。
speak.oneLinerEn: An AI speaking-practice app, backed by OpenAI and growing fast.
speak.business: 用语音 AI 做外语口语陪练——没有真人也能大量开口练习，AI 实时纠音、给反馈、模拟真实对话。在韩国、日本等市场增长强劲，OpenAI 创业基金参投。
speak.businessEn: Uses voice AI for foreign-language speaking practice — practice out loud extensively with no human partner, as the AI corrects pronunciation in real time, gives feedback and simulates real conversations. It is growing strongly in markets like Korea and Japan, with backing from the OpenAI Startup Fund.
speak.description: Speak 成立于 2016 年,是 AI 驱动的语言学习应用,核心卖点是「用 AI 陪你开口说」。传统语言 App(如多邻国)偏重认单词、做题,而 Speak 专攻最难的口语——用语音识别和大模型,让学习者和 AI 老师进行开放式对话,实时纠正发音、语法与表达,相当于一个随时可练、便宜又不尴尬的口语私教。它最早在韩国、日本等英语学习需求旺盛的市场做到头部,用户增长和付费表现亮眼,并与 OpenAI 关系密切(是 OpenAI 创业基金的被投公司之一)。随着大模型让「和 AI 自然对话」成为可能,Speak 站上了「AI + 教育」里最具刚需、最能体现大模型价值的口语练习赛道,估值快速攀升,是 AI 教育应用中商业化领先的代表之一。
speak.descriptionEn: Speak, founded in 2016, is an AI-driven language-learning app whose core selling point is "AI practices speaking with you." Traditional language apps (like Duolingo) emphasize vocabulary and quizzes, whereas Speak tackles the hardest part — speaking — using speech recognition and large models to let learners have open-ended conversations with an AI tutor that corrects pronunciation, grammar and phrasing in real time, like an always-available, cheap, non-awkward speaking coach. It first became a leader in markets with strong English-learning demand like South Korea and Japan, with strong user growth and monetization, and is closely tied to OpenAI (a portfolio company of the OpenAI Startup Fund). As large models make "natural conversation with AI" possible, Speak sits on the most essential, most value-demonstrating speaking-practice niche of "AI + education," with a rapidly rising valuation — one of the commercial leaders among AI education apps.
whyItMatters: 2016 成立,AI 语言学习,专攻最难的口语
用语音识别+大模型做开放式对话,实时纠错
韩日等市场头部,与 OpenAI 关系密切
「AI+教育」最刚需赛道,商业化领先代表

products.name: Speak
products.description: AI 口语陪练，实时纠音与情景对话。

news.title: Speak AI 口语陪练在韩日市场登顶,估值快速攀升
news.summary: Speak 用语音识别+大模型让学习者与 AI 老师开放式对话、实时纠正发音与语法,在韩国、日本等英语学习旺盛市场做到头部,作为 OpenAI 创业基金被投公司,商业化在 AI 教育应用中领先。

news.title: 企业版获KPMG等约500家公司采用,年化营收破亿
news.summary: Speak推出企业服务Speak for Business,KPMG、HD现代等约500家企业(含韩国前十大雇主中的八家)为员工订阅,员工采用率达85%,公司年化营收已超1亿美元。

news.title: 完成7800万美元C轮融资,估值达10亿美元
news.summary: Speak完成由Accel领投的7800万美元C轮融资,OpenAI创业基金、Khosla Ventures等跟投,估值达10亿美元晋级独角兽,较六个月前翻倍。

khanacademy.name: 可汗学院
khanacademy.oneLiner: 非营利在线教育，Khanmigo AI 私教。
khanacademy.oneLinerEn: A non-profit online-education platform with the Khanmigo AI tutor.
khanacademy.tagline: 为任何人、在任何地方提供免费世界级教育
khanacademy.taglineEn: A free, world-class education for anyone, anywhere
khanacademy.business: 全球最大免费在线教育平台，Khanmigo(基于 GPT)提供一对一 AI 辅导——不直接给答案，而是像老师一样引导学生思考；同时给教师减负(备课、出题、批改)。与 OpenAI 深度合作。
khanacademy.businessEn: The world's largest free online-education platform; Khanmigo (built on GPT) provides one-on-one AI tutoring — it doesn't just give answers but guides students to think like a teacher would — while easing teachers' workload (lesson prep, question generation, grading). It works closely with OpenAI.
khanacademy.description: 可汗学院(Khan Academy)是全球知名的非营利在线教育机构,由萨尔曼·可汗创办,以「为任何人、在任何地方提供免费的世界级教育」为使命,用海量免费视频和练习覆盖数学、科学、编程等学科,惠及全球数亿学习者。它是把生成式 AI 用进教育的先行者:与 OpenAI 合作,基于 GPT 打造了 AI 私教 Khanmigo——它不像普通聊天机器人直接给答案,而是像好老师一样用提问引导学生一步步思考、发现错误、真正学会,同时也给老师减负(备课、出题、批改)。作为非营利机构,可汗学院对「如何负责任地把 AI 用于学习、又不助长作弊」的探索格外有代表性。它展示了 AI 让「一对一因材施教」这种曾经昂贵稀缺的优质教育,有望变得人人可及。
khanacademy.descriptionEn: Khan Academy is a world-renowned nonprofit online-education organization founded by Salman Khan, with a mission of "a free, world-class education for anyone, anywhere," covering math, science, programming and more with vast free videos and exercises, reaching hundreds of millions of learners worldwide. It is a pioneer of using generative AI in education: partnering with OpenAI, it built the AI tutor Khanmigo on GPT — which, unlike ordinary chatbots that just give answers, guides students step by step with questions like a good teacher to think, find mistakes and truly learn, while also easing teachers' load (lesson prep, question generation, grading). As a nonprofit, Khan Academy is especially representative in exploring "how to responsibly use AI for learning without enabling cheating." It shows how AI could make "one-on-one personalized teaching" — once expensive and scarce quality education — accessible to everyone.
whyItMatters: 全球知名非营利在线教育,萨尔曼·可汗创办
免费视频与练习,惠及全球数亿学习者
与 OpenAI 合作打造 AI 私教 Khanmigo
用提问引导而非直接给答案,让因材施教人人可及

products.name: Khanmigo
products.description: 苏格拉底式 AI 私教 + 教师工具。

news.title: 可汗学院携手 OpenAI 推 AI 私教 Khanmigo,引导式教学落地
news.summary: 基于 GPT 打造的 Khanmigo 不直接给答案,而是像好老师一样提问引导学生逐步思考,同时为教师减负备课、出题与批改,让「一对一因材施教」有望人人可及。

news.title: 可汗学院全面重构课堂版,2026 年 7 月起面向所有用户上线
news.summary: 可汗学院与多个学区试点「课堂优先」的全新平台体验,Khanmigo 化身学习教练在学生卡壳时一对一辅导,教师可直接获得学情洞察与作业建议,平台于 2026 年 7 月正式向全部用户推出。

news.title: 获微软支持,Khanmigo 教师版向全美教师免费开放
news.summary: 在微软的资助与 Azure 支持下,可汗学院宣布 Khanmigo for Teachers 对所有美国教师 100% 免费,提供备课、教案生成与学情分析等 AI 助教能力,加速 AI 教学工具普及。

inflection.name: Inflection AI
inflection.oneLiner: 曾做情感陪伴助手 Pi，后转向企业 AI。
inflection.oneLinerEn: Once made the empathetic companion Pi, then pivoted to enterprise AI.
inflection.taglineEn: A personal AI with emotional intelligence
inflection.industry: 前沿大模型 / 企业 AI
inflection.business: 曾推出主打情商与情感陪伴的个人助手 Pi 与自研大模型。2024 年创始人 Mustafa Suleyman(DeepMind 联创)与核心团队加入微软(领衔 Microsoft AI)，公司转向面向企业的 AI。
inflection.businessEn: It once released Pi, a personal assistant focused on emotional intelligence and companionship, along with its own large models. In 2024 founder Mustafa Suleyman (a DeepMind co-founder) and the core team joined Microsoft (leading Microsoft AI), and the company pivoted toward enterprise AI.
inflection.description: Inflection AI 曾是最受瞩目的 AI 创业公司之一,由 DeepMind 联合创始人 Mustafa Suleyman 等人创立,推出过主打「情感陪伴、善解人意」的个人 AI 助手 Pi,以温暖、共情的对话风格区别于工具化的 ChatGPT,并训练了性能不俗的自研大模型。但在烧钱惊人的基础模型竞赛中,2024 年发生了戏剧性一幕:微软把 Inflection 的核心团队(包括 Suleyman)整体「收编」进微软、由 Suleyman 执掌微软 AI,并向 Inflection 支付授权费用。此后 Inflection 战略转向,从面向消费者的 Pi 转为面向企业的 AI 服务(提供可授权、可私有部署的模型给企业)。Inflection 的故事是这轮 AI 创业最典型的写照之一:顶级团队和模型也难敌基础模型军备竞赛的残酷,最终被巨头以「类收购」方式吸纳。
inflection.descriptionEn: Inflection AI was once one of the most-watched AI startups, founded by DeepMind co-founder Mustafa Suleyman and others, which launched Pi, a personal AI assistant emphasizing "emotional companionship and empathy," distinguished from tool-like ChatGPT by its warm, empathetic conversational style, and trained a capable in-house large model. But in the staggeringly cash-burning foundation-model race, a dramatic turn came in 2024: Microsoft "absorbed" Inflection's core team (including Suleyman) into Microsoft, with Suleyman running Microsoft AI, and paid Inflection licensing fees. Inflection then pivoted strategically, from the consumer-facing Pi to enterprise AI services (offering licensable, privately deployable models to enterprises). Inflection's story is one of the most emblematic of this AI-startup wave: even a top team and model struggle against the brutal foundation-model arms race, ultimately absorbed by a giant via a "quasi-acquisition."
whyItMatters: 曾最受瞩目 AI 创业公司,Mustafa Suleyman 等创立
主打情感陪伴助手 Pi,温暖共情区别于 ChatGPT
2024 核心团队被微软「收编」,Suleyman 掌微软 AI
转向企业 AI,折射基础模型军备竞赛的残酷

products.name: Pi
products.description: 主打情感陪伴的个人 AI 助手。

news.title: 核心团队被微软收编后,Inflection 转向企业 AI 服务
news.summary: 2024 年微软将 Inflection 核心团队(含创始人 Suleyman)整体收编并支付授权费,Suleyman 出任微软 AI 负责人;此后公司从消费级助手 Pi 转向可授权、可私有部署的企业 AI 模型服务。

retell.name: Retell AI
retell.oneLiner: 让开发者快速搭语音智能体的平台。
retell.oneLinerEn: A platform for quickly building voice agents.
retell.tagline: 几行代码,搭起会打电话的 AI
retell.taglineEn: Voice agents in a few lines of code
retell.business: 语音智能体开发平台，几行代码接入实时电话 AI。
retell.businessEn: A voice-agent development platform to add real-time phone AI in a few lines of code.
retell.description: Retell AI 是一个让开发者快速搭建语音智能体(voice agent)的平台,核心是把「做一个能自然打电话对话的 AI」这件复杂的事变得简单。要做出能实时听懂、流畅应答、还能处理打断的电话 AI,背后要整合语音识别、大模型、语音合成、电话通信和超低延迟处理等一堆技术。Retell 把这些封装成易用的 API 和工具,开发者只需搭建对话逻辑、接上自己的业务系统,就能快速上线用于客服、预约、外呼提醒、资格审核等场景的语音智能体,并处理好实时打断、转人工、通话质量等关键体验。随着大模型让「和 AI 自然通电话」成为现实,企业对能自动接打电话的语音 Agent 需求快速上升。作为语音 Agent 开发平台的代表之一,Retell 与 Vapi 等一起,让「用 AI 电话自动办事」变得触手可及。
retell.descriptionEn: Retell AI is a platform that lets developers quickly build voice agents, centered on making the complex task of "building an AI that naturally converses on the phone" simple. Creating a phone AI that understands in real time, responds fluidly and handles interruptions requires integrating speech recognition, large models, speech synthesis, telephony and ultra-low-latency processing. Retell packages these into easy-to-use APIs and tools, so developers just build the conversation logic and connect their business systems to quickly launch voice agents for customer service, scheduling, outbound reminders and eligibility checks, handling key experiences like real-time interruption, human handoff and call quality. As large models make "natural phone conversation with AI" real, enterprise demand for voice agents that automatically answer and make calls is rising fast. As a representative voice-agent development platform, Retell, alongside Vapi, makes "using AI phone calls to get things done" within easy reach.
whyItMatters: 让开发者快速搭建语音智能体的平台
封装语音识别/大模型/合成/电话/低延迟等技术
快速上线客服/预约/外呼/审核等语音 Agent
处理好实时打断/转人工,与 Vapi 同赛道

products.name: Retell AI
products.description: 让开发者快速搭建能打电话对话的语音智能体。

news.title: Retell AI 语音智能体平台加速客服外呼场景商用
news.summary: Retell 将语音识别、大模型、语音合成、电话通信与低延迟处理封装成易用 API,开发者可快速上线客服、预约、外呼提醒等语音 Agent,并处理好实时打断与转人工等关键体验。

vapi.name: Vapi
vapi.oneLiner: 语音 AI 智能体开发平台。
vapi.tagline: 语音智能体的开发者平台
vapi.taglineEn: The developer platform for voice agents
vapi.business: 面向开发者的语音智能体基础设施，快速构建电话 AI。
vapi.businessEn: Developer-facing voice-agent infrastructure to build phone AI quickly.
vapi.description: Vapi 是一个语音 AI 智能体(voice AI agent)开发平台,让开发者能快速搭建能打电话、能自然对话的语音智能体。过去要做一个能听懂人说话、实时应答、还能打断和被打断的电话机器人,需要把语音识别(把话变文字)、大模型(理解和生成回答)、语音合成(把文字变自然人声)、以及电话通信、低延迟处理等一大堆技术拼起来,极其复杂。Vapi 把这些底层能力封装成简单的 API 和平台,开发者只需配置和编排,就能快速做出用于客服、预约、外呼、问询等场景的语音 AI 应用,并处理好实时性、打断、转人工等关键体验。随着大模型让「和 AI 自然通话」成为可能,语音智能体正快速兴起。作为语音 Agent 的开发基础设施代表之一,Vapi 与 Retell 等一起,让「用 AI 打电话办事」这件事变得人人可开发。
vapi.descriptionEn: Vapi is a voice AI agent development platform that lets developers quickly build voice agents that can make phone calls and converse naturally. Building a phone bot that understands speech, responds in real time and can interrupt and be interrupted used to require stitching together many technologies — speech recognition (speech to text), large models (understanding and generating replies), speech synthesis (text to natural voice), plus telephony and low-latency processing — extremely complex. Vapi packages these underlying capabilities into simple APIs and a platform, so developers just configure and orchestrate to quickly build voice AI apps for customer service, scheduling, outbound calls and inquiries, handling key experiences like real-time responsiveness, interruption and human handoff. As large models make "natural phone conversation with AI" possible, voice agents are rapidly rising. As a representative development infrastructure for voice agents, Vapi, alongside Retell, makes "using AI to handle phone tasks" developable by anyone.
whyItMatters: 语音 AI 智能体开发平台,快速搭建能打电话的语音 Agent
封装语音识别/大模型/合成/电话/低延迟等底层能力
开发者配置编排即做出客服/预约/外呼语音应用
处理好实时/打断/转人工,语音 Agent 开发基础设施

products.name: Vapi
products.description: 语音 AI 智能体开发平台,封装语音识别/大模型/合成/电话。

news.title: Vapi 封装语音 AI 底层能力,让电话智能体人人可开发
news.summary: Vapi 把语音识别、大模型、语音合成、电话通信与低延迟处理封装为简单 API 与平台,开发者只需配置编排即可做出客服、预约、外呼等语音应用,成为语音 Agent 开发基础设施代表。

crowdstrike.name: CrowdStrike
crowdstrike.oneLiner: 端点安全龙头，Charlotte AI 智能体。
crowdstrike.oneLinerEn: The endpoint-security leader, with the Charlotte AI agent.
crowdstrike.business: 云原生端点检测与响应(EDR)，Charlotte AI 用大模型自动化威胁狩猎与响应。
crowdstrike.businessEn: Cloud-native endpoint detection and response (EDR); Charlotte AI uses large models to automate threat hunting and response.
crowdstrike.description: CrowdStrike 是端点安全龙头,其 Falcon 平台以「一个轻量探针 + 云端大数据分析」的架构成为业界标杆,靠海量终端遥测训练出很强的威胁检测能力。生成式 AI 时代,它推出 Charlotte AI 并在 2026 年 3 月升级为可自主行动的「智能体」——自动做威胁狩猎、分析告警、执行响应,应对「AI 加持的攻击已快到人类跟不上」的新现实。矛盾的是,AI 既让攻击更凶,也让防守方(CrowdStrike)需求更旺:2026 年二季度公司创下史上最佳业绩、股价大涨,是「AI 安全」最直接的受益龙头之一。
crowdstrike.descriptionEn: CrowdStrike is the endpoint-security leader; its Falcon platform, built on "one lightweight agent + cloud-scale analytics," became the industry benchmark, using massive endpoint telemetry to train strong threat detection. In the generative-AI era it launched Charlotte AI, upgraded in March 2026 into an autonomous "agent" that hunts threats, triages alerts and executes response on its own — addressing the reality that AI-powered attacks now move faster than humans can. The paradox: AI makes attacks fiercer but also boosts demand for defenders like CrowdStrike — in Q2 2026 the company posted its best-ever results and its stock rallied sharply, one of the most direct beneficiaries of "AI security."
whyItMatters: 端点安全龙头,Falcon 轻探针+云端分析标杆
Charlotte AI 升级为自主安全智能体
AI 攻击快过人类,自动响应成刚需
2026 史上最佳业绩,AI 安全直接受益龙头

products.name: Falcon 平台
products.description: 云原生端点安全平台,行业龙头。

products.name: Charlotte AI
products.description: 自动分析威胁、辅助安全运营的 AI 智能体。

news.title: FY27 Q1:净新增 ARR 创纪录 2.56 亿美元,宣布 1 拆 4
news.summary: 季度营收 13.9 亿美元同比增 26%,净新增 ARR 2.56 亿美元创纪录(+32%),自由现金流 4.68 亿美元创新高,公司上调全年净新增 ARR 增速指引,并宣布 7 月实施 1 拆 4 股票拆分。

news.title: ARR 达 52.5 亿(+24%),Charlotte AI 使用量增 6 倍
news.summary: Charlotte AI 相关 ARR 翻三倍、获 FedRAMP High 认证;推出与 AWS/英伟达/OpenAI 共建的无代码安全智能体平台 AgentWorks;并发起含 OpenAI、Anthropic 的前沿 AI 风险治理联盟 QuiltWorks。

news.title: 7.4 亿美元收购身份安全公司 SGNL,并揽入 AI 安全商 Pangea
news.summary: CrowdStrike 以 7.4 亿美元收购身份安全初创 SGNL,并收购 AI 安全公司 Pangea 与浏览器安全公司 Seraphic,强化非人类身份与零常设权限等能力;还从英伟达延揽 Bartley Richardson 出任首席 AI 与自主系统官。

paloalto.name: Palo Alto Networks
paloalto.oneLiner: 网络安全龙头，全面 AI 化。
paloalto.oneLinerEn: The network-security leader, going all-in on AI.
paloalto.tagline: 守护我们的数字生活方式
paloalto.taglineEn: Protecting our digital way of life
paloalto.subcategory: 网络 / 云 / 安全运营
paloalto.business: 网络、云与安全运营平台(Cortex/Prisma)，用 AI 做检测与自动响应。
paloalto.businessEn: Network, cloud and security-operations platforms (Cortex/Prisma), using AI for detection and automated response.
paloalto.description: Palo Alto Networks 是网络安全行业市值龙头,从下一代防火墙起家,通过持续并购整合成横跨网络(NGFW)、云安全(Prisma)与安全运营(Cortex)的综合平台。它力推「平台化」战略——让客户把多种安全能力统一到它的平台上,以数据和 AI 提升整体防护。2026 年 3 月它推出 XSIAM 自主响应,把安全运营中心(SOC)的检测—分析—处置尽量自动化,应对 AI 时代的攻击。凭借平台化与 AI 化,PANW 在 2026 年录得史上最佳季度、股价大涨,与 CrowdStrike 并列 AI 安全两强。
paloalto.descriptionEn: Palo Alto Networks is the most valuable company in cybersecurity, starting from next-generation firewalls and consolidating through acquisitions into an integrated platform spanning network (NGFW), cloud security (Prisma) and security operations (Cortex). It pushes a "platformization" strategy — getting customers to unify many security capabilities on its platform, improving overall protection with data and AI. In March 2026 it launched XSIAM Autonomous Response, automating as much of the SOC's detect-analyze-remediate loop as possible to counter AI-era attacks. On the back of platformization and AI, PANW posted its best-ever quarter in 2026 with a sharp stock rally, standing alongside CrowdStrike as one of the two AI-security leaders.
whyItMatters: 网络安全市值龙头,平台化战略
网络(NGFW)+云(Prisma)+运营(Cortex)一体
XSIAM 自主响应,自动化安全运营中心
2026 史上最佳季度,AI 安全两强之一

products.name: 下一代防火墙 / Prisma
products.description: 网络防火墙与云安全(Prisma Cloud)平台。

products.name: Cortex
products.description: AI 驱动的安全运营(SOC)自动化平台。

news.title: FY2026 Q3 营收 30 亿美元同比增 31%,超华尔街预期
news.summary: 2026 财年第三季度营收 30 亿美元,高于预期的 29.4 亿美元,同比增长 31%,其中 CyberArk 与 Chronosphere 两笔收购贡献 3.88 亿美元;AI 驱动的安全需求持续推高业绩。

news.title: Palo Alto 推 XSIAM 自主响应,录得史上最佳季度
news.summary: 2026 年 3 月 Palo Alto Networks 推出 XSIAM 自主响应,将 SOC 的检测—分析—处置尽量自动化以应对 AI 时代攻击;凭平台化与 AI 化,公司 2026 年录得史上最佳季度、股价大涨。

news.title: 完成 211 亿美元收购 CyberArk,确立身份安全为平台核心支柱
news.summary: 2026 年 2 月完成对 CyberArk 的收购,总对价约 211 亿美元(约 23 亿美元现金加约 1.12 亿股股票),将身份安全确立为平台化战略核心支柱,覆盖人类、机器与 AI 智能体身份。

sentinelone.name: SentinelOne
sentinelone.oneLiner: AI 驱动的自主端点安全。
sentinelone.tagline: 让安全以机器速度运转
sentinelone.business: 以 AI 为核心的端点/云安全平台，主打自主检测与响应。
sentinelone.businessEn: An AI-centric endpoint/cloud security platform focused on autonomous detection and response.
sentinelone.description: SentinelOne 成立于 2013 年,是 AI 驱动的自主端点安全(endpoint security)代表公司,与 CrowdStrike 是直接对手。端点安全就是保护电脑、服务器、云工作负载等「终端」不被病毒、勒索软件、黑客攻击。SentinelOne 的核心理念是「用 AI 实现自主防御」:它的 Singularity 平台把机器学习模型直接部署到每个端点上,能实时自动地检测异常行为、拦截攻击、甚至自动回滚被勒索软件加密的文件,尽量不依赖人工和云端连接就地快速响应。在网络攻击日益自动化、AI 化的今天,「用 AI 对抗 AI」成为安全行业的必然,SentinelOne 以高度自动化和 AI 原生的架构服务大量企业。作为 AI 网络安全的代表之一,它处在「威胁越来越智能,防御也必须越来越智能」这一长期刚需的核心。
sentinelone.descriptionEn: SentinelOne, founded in 2013, is a leading AI-driven autonomous endpoint-security company and a direct rival to CrowdStrike. Endpoint security protects "endpoints" like computers, servers and cloud workloads from viruses, ransomware and hackers. SentinelOne's core philosophy is "autonomous defense with AI": its Singularity platform deploys machine-learning models directly onto each endpoint, detecting anomalous behavior in real time, blocking attacks, and even automatically rolling back files encrypted by ransomware, responding fast on-device with minimal reliance on humans or cloud connectivity. As cyberattacks grow increasingly automated and AI-driven, "using AI to fight AI" has become inevitable in security, and SentinelOne serves many enterprises with its highly automated, AI-native architecture. As a representative of AI cybersecurity, it sits at the core of the long-term imperative that "as threats get smarter, defenses must too."
whyItMatters: 2013 成立,AI 驱动的自主端点安全代表,CrowdStrike 对手
Singularity 平台把 ML 模型部署到每个端点
实时检测/拦截/自动回滚勒索加密文件,就地快速响应
「用 AI 对抗 AI」,AI 网络安全代表

products.name: Singularity 平台
products.description: 把 ML 模型部署到每个端点,自主检测/拦截/回滚。

news.title: SentinelOne Singularity 平台以端侧 AI 实现自主防御
news.summary: Singularity 平台把机器学习模型直接部署到每个端点,实时检测异常、拦截攻击,甚至自动回滚被勒索软件加密的文件,尽量不依赖人工与云端连接就地响应,践行「用 AI 对抗 AI」。

zscaler.name: Zscaler
zscaler.business: 零信任网络访问(SASE)云平台，用 AI 分析海量流量做威胁防护。
zscaler.businessEn: A zero-trust network-access (SASE) cloud platform that uses AI to analyze massive traffic for threat protection.
zscaler.description: Zscaler 成立于 2007 年,是云原生网络安全的龙头,以「零信任」架构重新定义了企业上网与访问的安全方式。传统安全靠在公司机房架防火墙,把内网圈起来当「城堡」;但在云和远程办公时代,员工和应用都跑在云上,这套旧模式失效了。Zscaler 的思路是「零信任」——默认谁都不信任,任何用户访问任何应用,流量都先经过 Zscaler 的全球云平台做身份验证与安全检查,再放行,把安全能力搬到云端、贴着每一次访问做。它的 SSE/SASE 平台服务大量大型企业。如今它又把 AI 用于威胁检测,并帮企业管控员工使用 AI 应用的数据安全风险。作为零信任云安全的代表,Zscaler 处在「企业数字化 + 云化 + AI 化都需要新安全底座」这一长期趋势的核心。
zscaler.descriptionEn: Zscaler, founded in 2007, is a leader in cloud-native cybersecurity, redefining how enterprises secure internet access with a "zero trust" architecture. Traditional security relied on firewalls in a company's data center, fencing the internal network as a "castle"; but in the era of cloud and remote work, with users and apps on the cloud, that old model broke. Zscaler's approach is "zero trust" — trust no one by default; any user accessing any app has traffic first routed through Zscaler's global cloud platform for identity verification and security inspection before being allowed, moving security to the cloud and applying it to every access. Its SSE/SASE platform serves many large enterprises. It now also uses AI for threat detection and helps enterprises manage the data-security risks of employees using AI apps. As a standard-bearer of zero-trust cloud security, Zscaler sits at the core of the long-term trend that "enterprise digitalization + cloud + AI all need a new security foundation."
whyItMatters: 2007 成立,云原生网络安全龙头,零信任架构
「谁都不信任」,每次访问先经其云平台验证检查
SSE/SASE 平台服务大量大型企业
用 AI 做威胁检测,管控员工用 AI 的数据风险

products.name: Zero Trust Exchange
products.description: 零信任云安全平台,每次访问先经其云平台验证检查。

news.title: Zscaler 用 AI 强化威胁检测,管控企业员工 AI 应用风险
news.summary: 零信任云安全龙头 Zscaler 在其 SSE/SASE 平台上引入 AI 做威胁检测,并帮助企业管控员工使用 AI 应用带来的数据安全风险,巩固「云化+AI 化需要新安全底座」的定位。

wiz.name: Wiz
wiz.oneLiner: 云安全新星，被谷歌 320 亿美元收购。
wiz.oneLinerEn: The cloud-security star acquired by Google for $32 billion.
wiz.taglineEn: Making cloud security simple for everyone
wiz.business: 云原生安全平台(CNAPP)，增长最快的安全公司之一，2026 年被谷歌以约 320 亿美元收购。
wiz.businessEn: A cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP), one of the fastest-growing security companies; acquired by Google for about $32 billion in 2026.
wiz.description: Wiz 是云安全领域的超级新星,成立于 2020 年(以色列团队),以惊人的速度成长为最受瞩目的网络安全公司之一。随着企业把业务大规模搬上云(AWS、Azure、谷歌云),云环境变得极其复杂、配置繁多,安全漏洞和风险也随之激增。Wiz 提供的「云原生应用保护平台(CNAPP)」能快速扫描企业整个云环境,自动发现最严重、最可能被利用的安全风险,并按优先级清晰呈现,让安全团队一眼看清「哪里最危险、先修哪里」,以极佳的产品体验广受大企业欢迎。它的收入(ARR)以史上最快之一的速度飙升。2025 年,谷歌宣布以约 320 亿美元收购 Wiz,创下谷歌史上最大收购、也是网络安全史上最大交易之一。作为云安全的标杆,Wiz 体现了「上云是大势、云安全是刚需」这一巨大市场的价值。
wiz.descriptionEn: Wiz is a superstar in cloud security, founded in 2020 (Israeli team), which grew at astonishing speed into one of the most-watched cybersecurity companies. As enterprises move business to the cloud at scale (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), cloud environments become extremely complex with countless configurations, and security vulnerabilities and risks surge. Wiz's "cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP)" quickly scans an enterprise's entire cloud environment, automatically finding the most severe, most exploitable risks and presenting them clearly by priority, letting security teams see at a glance "where's most dangerous, fix which first," widely loved by large enterprises for its excellent product experience. Its ARR soared at one of the fastest rates ever. In 2025 Google announced it would acquire Wiz for about $32 billion, Google's largest acquisition ever and one of the biggest deals in cybersecurity history. As a cloud-security benchmark, Wiz embodies the value of the huge market where "cloud adoption is the trend and cloud security is essential."
whyItMatters: 云安全超级新星,2020 成立,增长惊人
CNAPP 扫描整个云环境,自动发现最严重可利用风险
按优先级清晰呈现,产品体验佳,大企业广泛采用
2025 被谷歌约 320 亿美元收购,谷歌史上最大收购

products.name: Wiz 云安全平台 (CNAPP)
products.description: 扫描整个云环境、按优先级揪出最危险风险,被谷歌约 320 亿美元收购。

news.title: ARR 突破 10 亿美元,服务超半数财富 100 强企业
news.summary: 截至谷歌收购交割时,Wiz 年经常性收入已突破 10 亿美元,员工约 1800 人,客户覆盖超过 50% 的财富 100 强;并入 Google Cloud 后保留品牌并继续支持 AWS、Azure 等多云环境。

news.title: RSAC 2026 发布 AI-APP 平台,防护 AI 模型与智能体安全
news.summary: 在 RSAC 2026 推出 AI 应用防护平台(AI-APP),对 AWS Bedrock、Azure AI、Vertex AI 上的模型、智能体与数据流提供全景可视化,防范提示注入与影子 AI,并新增 Red Agent 与 Workload Explainer 等能力。

news.title: 谷歌约 320 亿美元收购 Wiz,创网络安全史上最大交易
news.summary: 2025 年谷歌宣布以约 320 亿美元收购成立仅五年的云安全公司 Wiz,创谷歌史上最大收购;Wiz 的 CNAPP 平台可扫描整个云环境并按优先级呈现最危险的可利用风险,ARR 增速为史上最快之一。

planet.name: Planet Labs
planet.oneLiner: 每日全球拍照的对地观测卫星公司。
planet.oneLinerEn: An Earth-observation company that photographs the whole planet daily.
planet.taglineEn: Making change visible, accessible and actionable
planet.subcategory: 卫星影像 / 地理情报
planet.business: 运营最大规模对地观测卫星群，用 AI 解译影像做地理情报与分析。
planet.businessEn: Operates the largest Earth-observation satellite fleet, using AI to interpret imagery for geospatial intelligence and analytics.
planet.description: Planet Labs 是对地观测卫星公司,核心能力是「每天给整个地球拍一遍照」。它运营着大量小型卫星(Dove、SkySat 等)组成的星座,能高频率、大范围地拍摄地表影像,积累起独一无二的「地球每日变化」数据集。光有照片还不够,Planet 越来越强调用 AI 分析这些海量卫星影像——自动识别船只、飞机、建筑、农田长势、森林砍伐、灾害、军事动向等变化,把「像素」变成可决策的情报。它的客户包括政府、国防情报机构、农业、金融、保险、环境监测等。在地缘冲突和 AI 分析能力提升的背景下,卫星情报需求上升,Planet 的「持续拍摄 + AI 解译」模式价值凸显。作为对地观测 + 地理空间 AI 的代表,Planet Labs 处在「用太空视角和 AI 理解地球正在发生什么」这一独特赛道。
planet.descriptionEn: Planet Labs is an Earth-observation satellite company whose core capability is "photographing the entire Earth every day." It operates a constellation of many small satellites (Doves, SkySats) that image the surface at high frequency and broad coverage, building a unique dataset of "Earth's daily changes." Photos alone aren't enough, and Planet increasingly emphasizes using AI to analyze this vast satellite imagery — automatically detecting ships, aircraft, buildings, crop health, deforestation, disasters and military movements, turning "pixels" into decision-ready intelligence. Its customers include governments, defense-intelligence agencies, agriculture, finance, insurance and environmental monitoring. Amid geopolitical conflict and improving AI analysis, demand for satellite intelligence rises, and Planet's "continuous imaging + AI interpretation" model stands out. As a representative of Earth observation + geospatial AI, Planet Labs sits in the unique space of "using a space-borne view and AI to understand what's happening on Earth."
whyItMatters: 对地观测卫星公司,每天给整个地球拍一遍
小卫星星座高频大范围成像,积累独家「地球每日变化」
用 AI 解译海量影像,把像素变成可决策情报
客户含政府/国防情报/农业/金融,卫星情报需求上升

products.name: 对地观测卫星
products.description: 小卫星星座每天给整个地球拍照,并用 AI 解译成情报。

news.title: Planet Labs 以「每日拍遍地球+AI 解译」承接卫星情报需求
news.summary: Planet 运营 Dove、SkySat 等小卫星星座每天为全球成像,并用 AI 自动识别船只、农田长势、灾害与军事动向等变化;在地缘冲突背景下,政府、国防与金融客户的卫星情报需求持续上升。

blacksky.name: BlackSky
blacksky.oneLiner: 实时卫星影像与地理情报。
blacksky.oneLinerEn: Real-time satellite imagery and geospatial intelligence.
blacksky.tagline: 让世界的动态一目了然
blacksky.taglineEn: Seeing what matters, in real time
blacksky.subcategory: 高频成像 / 地理情报
blacksky.business: 高频成像卫星与 AI 分析平台，提供近实时地理情报。
blacksky.businessEn: High-revisit imaging satellites and an AI analytics platform delivering near-real-time geospatial intelligence.
blacksky.description: BlackSky 是实时卫星影像与地理空间情报公司,核心是「快」——它运营的低轨小卫星星座能对全球热点区域进行高频次重访拍摄,并强调把「拍到」和「分析出来」之间的时间压到最短,给客户提供近实时的地表监测和情报。它大量用 AI 来自动分析卫星影像:识别和追踪船只、飞机、车辆、设施变化等,并结合分析平台把海量图像变成可即时使用的情报警报。它的主要客户是政府和国防情报机构——在地缘冲突和安全需求上升的背景下,「能快速看清全球任何地方正在发生什么」的能力价值极高。BlackSky 与 Planet、Maxar 等同处对地观测/地理空间情报赛道,差异化在于强调高频重访和近实时的情报交付。作为实时卫星情报的代表,BlackSky 处在「用太空视角 + AI 提供即时地理情报」这一国防与商业都高度看重的赛道。
blacksky.descriptionEn: BlackSky is a real-time satellite-imagery and geospatial-intelligence company, centered on "speed" — its low-Earth-orbit small-satellite constellation revisits global hotspots at high frequency, emphasizing minimizing the time between "capturing" and "analyzing" to give customers near-real-time surface monitoring and intelligence. It heavily uses AI to automatically analyze satellite imagery: detecting and tracking ships, aircraft, vehicles and facility changes, and combining an analytics platform to turn vast images into instantly usable intelligence alerts. Its main customers are government and defense-intelligence agencies — amid rising geopolitical conflict and security needs, the ability to "quickly see what's happening anywhere in the world" is highly valuable. BlackSky sits alongside Planet and Maxar in Earth-observation/geospatial intelligence, differentiated by emphasizing high-frequency revisit and near-real-time intelligence delivery. As a representative of real-time satellite intelligence, BlackSky is in a space highly valued by both defense and commercial customers: "instant geospatial intelligence via space-borne view + AI."
whyItMatters: 实时卫星影像与地理空间情报公司,核心是「快」
低轨星座高频重访,压缩「拍到」到「分析出」的时间
用 AI 自动识别追踪船只/飞机/设施变化
主要客户政府与国防情报,近实时情报交付

products.name: 实时卫星影像 / 情报
products.description: 低轨星座高频重访,近实时提供地理空间情报。

news.title: BlackSky 高频重访+AI 分析,压缩近实时情报交付时间
news.summary: BlackSky 低轨星座对全球热点区域高频重访,用 AI 自动识别追踪船只、飞机与设施变化,把「拍到」与「分析出」的间隔压到最短,为政府与国防情报客户提供近实时地理情报警报。

smci.name: 超微电脑
smci.oneLiner: AI 服务器整机与液冷机柜龙头。
smci.oneLinerEn: A leader in AI servers and liquid-cooled racks.
smci.tagline: 为 AI 打造绿色计算
smci.taglineEn: Green computing for the age of AI
smci.subcategory: GPU 服务器 / 液冷机柜
smci.business: 英伟达 GPU 服务器与整机柜(含液冷)组装，AI 服务器出货最激进的厂商之一。
smci.businessEn: Assembles NVIDIA GPU servers and full racks (including liquid cooling) — one of the most aggressive AI-server shippers.
smci.description: 超微电脑(Supermicro/SMCI)是 AI 服务器整机与液冷机柜的头部厂商,与英伟达绑定极深。它以「积木式」模块化设计和极快的上新速度著称——新一代 GPU 一出,它往往能最快把服务器和整柜(含直接液冷)推向市场,因此在这轮 AI 算力狂潮里出货最激进、增速惊人。但它也一波三折:2024 年因会计问题、审计机构辞任、财报延迟而股价暴跌、险些退市,2025 年恢复合规;2026 年靠 AI 需求业绩回暖,却又因 70 亿美元融资引发稀释担忧,股价波动剧烈。SMCI 是「AI 服务器最纯、也最刺激」的标的之一。
smci.descriptionEn: Supermicro (SMCI) is a leading maker of AI servers and liquid-cooled racks, deeply tied to NVIDIA. Known for a "building-block" modular design and very fast time-to-market — when a new GPU ships, it often gets servers and full racks (with direct liquid cooling) out first — it has been the most aggressive AI-server shipper in this compute boom, with striking growth. But it has been turbulent: in 2024 an accounting issue, auditor resignation and delayed filings sent the stock crashing and nearly delisted it, before regaining compliance in 2025; in 2026 AI demand revived its results, yet a $7 billion capital raise sparked dilution fears and sharp volatility. SMCI is one of the "purest but most turbulent" AI-server names.
whyItMatters: AI 服务器整机与液冷机柜头部,与英伟达深度绑定
模块化+极快上新,新 GPU 出即最快推整柜
2024 会计风波险退市,2025 恢复合规
2026 业绩回暖但融资稀释,股价波动剧烈

products.name: AI 服务器 / 液冷机柜
products.description: 英伟达 GPU AI 服务器整机与液冷机柜龙头,以快速上市著称。

news.title: 液冷整机柜出货领先,业绩随 AI 建设波动
news.summary: DLC 液冷方案与快速上市能力保持差异化;经历会计风波后重回增长轨道,与英伟达新平台同步发布。

dell.name: 戴尔
dell.oneLiner: PC 与 AI 服务器巨头。
dell.industry: AI 服务器 / 企业 IT
dell.business: PC、企业存储与 AI 服务器(PowerEdge)，为 xAI 等提供大规模 AI 集群整机。
dell.businessEn: PCs, enterprise storage and AI servers (PowerEdge), supplying large AI clusters to the likes of xAI.
dell.description: 戴尔(Dell)是全球 PC 与企业服务器巨头,在 AI 时代成为「AI 服务器」这一环节最重要的品牌厂之一。它长期是全球最大的服务器和 PC 厂商之一,拥有强大的品牌、销售渠道和企业客户关系。当 AI 数据中心爆发,企业和云厂商疯狂采购搭载英伟达 GPU 的 AI 服务器时,戴尔凭借其 PowerEdge 服务器产品线、集成能力和全球服务网络,拿下大量 AI 服务器订单,积压的 AI 服务器订单(backlog)屡创新高,成为公司增长的核心引擎。相比纯代工厂,戴尔更贴近企业客户、能提供从服务器到部署、服务的整体方案。此外它也受益于 AI PC(内置 NPU 的新一代电脑)带来的换机需求。作为 AI 服务器的核心品牌供应商,戴尔是「AI 算力从云到企业全面铺开」这一趋势里出货规模最大的公司之一。
dell.descriptionEn: Dell is a global PC and enterprise-server giant, becoming one of the most important brand vendors in the "AI server" link in the AI era. Long one of the world's largest server and PC makers, it has a strong brand, sales channels and enterprise customer relationships. When AI data centers boomed and enterprises and cloud providers scrambled to buy NVIDIA-GPU AI servers, Dell, on its PowerEdge server line, integration capability and global service network, won many AI-server orders, with its AI-server backlog repeatedly hitting new highs, becoming the company's core growth engine. Unlike pure ODMs, Dell is closer to enterprise customers and offers full solutions from servers to deployment and service. It also benefits from AI PC (a new generation of computers with built-in NPUs) driving upgrade demand. As a core brand supplier of AI servers, Dell is one of the largest-shipment companies in the trend of "AI compute spreading from cloud to enterprise."
whyItMatters: 全球 PC 与企业服务器巨头,AI 服务器核心品牌厂
PowerEdge 服务器+集成+全球服务,拿下大量 AI 订单
AI 服务器订单积压(backlog)屡创新高,增长核心
贴近企业客户,提供整体方案,也受益 AI PC

products.name: PowerEdge AI 服务器
products.description: 面向企业与云厂的 GPU AI 服务器,订单积压屡创新高。

products.name: AI PC
products.description: 内置 NPU 的新一代商用电脑。

news.title: AI 服务器积压订单屡创新高,企业 AI 落地主力
news.summary: AI 服务器订单积压创纪录,ISG 基础设施部门高增长;与英伟达共推「AI 工厂」方案,AI PC 换机潮蓄势。

hpe.name: 慧与
hpe.oneLiner: 企业服务器与超算厂商。
hpe.oneLinerEn: An enterprise server and supercomputing company.
hpe.taglineEn: Advancing the way people live and work
hpe.industry: AI 服务器 / 企业 IT
hpe.subcategory: 服务器 / 超算 / 网络
hpe.business: 服务器、超算(Cray)与网络(收购 Juniper)，AI 整机与私有云方案。
hpe.businessEn: Servers, supercomputing (Cray) and networking (via the Juniper acquisition), plus AI systems and private-cloud solutions.
hpe.description: 慧与(Hewlett Packard Enterprise,HPE)是面向企业的服务器、存储、网络和超级计算厂商,是从惠普分拆出来专注企业业务的公司。在 AI 时代,它有两大看点:一是 AI 服务器——为企业和云厂商提供搭载 GPU 的 AI 服务器和整体解决方案,承接 AI 算力建设需求;二是超级计算——HPE 收购了超算王者克雷(Cray),是全球顶级超级计算机(包括多台世界最快的超算)的建造者,这套大规模、高互联、液冷的超算技术,和大规模 AI 训练集群高度相通,让 HPE 在超大规模 AI 系统上有独特优势。它还收购了网络厂商瞻博(Juniper)以强化 AI 数据中心网络。作为面向企业与高性能计算的服务器龙头之一,HPE 是 AI 算力从云走向企业、以及超大规模 AI 系统建设这两条主线上的重要玩家。
hpe.descriptionEn: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is an enterprise-focused maker of servers, storage, networking and supercomputing, spun off from HP to focus on enterprise business. In the AI era it has two highlights: first, AI servers — providing GPU-laden AI servers and complete solutions for enterprises and cloud providers, taking on AI-compute build-out; second, supercomputing — HPE acquired supercomputing champion Cray and builds top global supercomputers (including several of the world's fastest), and this large-scale, high-interconnect, liquid-cooled supercomputing technology closely overlaps with large-scale AI training clusters, giving HPE a unique edge in ultra-large AI systems. It also acquired networking maker Juniper to strengthen AI-data-center networking. As one of the server leaders for enterprise and high-performance computing, HPE is an important player on two lines: AI compute moving from cloud to enterprise, and the build-out of ultra-large-scale AI systems.
whyItMatters: 面向企业的服务器/存储/网络/超算厂商,惠普分拆
AI 服务器:为企业与云厂供 GPU 服务器与整体方案
收购超算王者克雷,顶级超算技术与 AI 训练集群相通
收购瞻博强化 AI 数据中心网络

products.name: 企业服务器 / 超算 (Cray)
products.description: 企业 AI 服务器与顶级超级计算机,收购瞻博强化网络。

news.title: 完成收购瞻博网络,AI 网络+超算双线强化
news.summary: 约 140 亿美元收购 Juniper 完成,网络成为利润核心;HPC/Cray 承接主权 AI 与超算大单。

fii.name: 工业富联
fii.oneLiner: 全球最大 AI 服务器代工厂。
fii.oneLinerEn: The world's largest AI-server contract manufacturer.
fii.tagline: 以智能制造赋能数字经济
fii.taglineEn: Powering the digital economy with smart manufacturing
fii.subcategory: 服务器 / 云设备代工
fii.business: 富士康旗下，AI 服务器与云设备代工，英伟达 GB200 机柜主力组装方。
fii.businessEn: A Foxconn subsidiary; contract-manufactures AI servers and cloud gear, a primary assembler of NVIDIA GB200 racks.
fii.description: 工业富联(Foxconn Industrial Internet,FII)是全球最大的 AI 服务器代工厂,是鸿海(富士康)集团旗下在 A 股上市的核心制造平台,也是这轮 AI 算力浪潮里制造端最大的受益者之一。它承接了海量搭载英伟达 GPU 的 AI 服务器、以及最新一代整机柜系统(如英伟达 GB200/GB300 液冷机柜)的设计与量产,是英伟达 AI 服务器最重要的制造伙伴之一。凭借鸿海集团庞大的制造规模、供应链整合和精密制造能力,工业富联能大规模、高质量地把英伟达的芯片组装成云厂商机房里真正运转的算力机器。AI 数据中心爆发式建设,让其 AI 服务器业务收入迅猛增长,成为公司最核心的增长引擎。作为全球 AI 服务器制造的绝对主力,工业富联是「AI 算力落地为实体机器」这一环节体量最大、最关键的中国制造力量。
fii.descriptionEn: Foxconn Industrial Internet (FII) is the world's largest AI-server manufacturer, the core A-share-listed manufacturing platform of the Hon Hai (Foxconn) group, and one of the biggest beneficiaries on the manufacturing side of this AI-compute wave. It takes on the design and mass production of vast NVIDIA-GPU AI servers and the newest rack-scale systems (like NVIDIA's GB200/GB300 liquid-cooled racks), one of NVIDIA's most important AI-server manufacturing partners. On the Hon Hai group's vast manufacturing scale, supply-chain integration and precision manufacturing, FII can assemble NVIDIA's chips into actually running compute machines in cloud data centers at scale and quality. The explosive build-out of AI data centers has driven rapid growth in its AI-server revenue, becoming the company's core growth engine. As the absolute mainstay of global AI-server manufacturing, FII is the largest, most critical Chinese manufacturing force in the link of "AI compute deployed as physical machines."
whyItMatters: 全球最大 AI 服务器代工厂,鸿海 A 股上市制造平台
承接英伟达 GB200/GB300 整机柜系统设计与量产
英伟达 AI 服务器最重要制造伙伴之一
AI 服务器业务收入迅猛增长,制造端最大受益者之一

products.name: AI 服务器代工
products.description: 全球最大 AI 服务器代工厂,英伟达 GB200/GB300 整机柜主力。

news.title: 上半年净利预增93%–101%,首破200亿元
news.summary: 工业富联发布2026年半年度业绩预增公告,预计归母净利润234亿至244亿元,同比增长93%–101%,上半年净利首次突破200亿元创历史新高。

news.title: 云服务商AI服务器营收同比增超230%
news.summary: 2026年上半年工业富联云服务商AI服务器收入同比增长超230%,800G以上数据中心交换机出货量同比增长1.4倍,与大客户联合研发的下一代产品预计下半年量产。

news.title: AI 服务器代工量创纪录,GB300 量产主力
news.summary: 英伟达新一代整机柜主力代工厂,云服务设备收入占比过半;上半年营收、净利均创历史新高。

quantacomputer.name: 广达
quantacomputer.oneLiner: 全球最大笔电代工，AI 服务器主力。
quantacomputer.oneLinerEn: The world's largest laptop ODM and a major AI-server maker.
quantacomputer.tagline: 以制造实力承接 AI 浪潮
quantacomputer.taglineEn: Manufacturing muscle for the AI wave
quantacomputer.subcategory: 笔电 / AI 服务器代工
quantacomputer.business: 笔电与 AI 服务器代工，英伟达 AI 服务器核心组装厂之一。
quantacomputer.businessEn: Contract-manufactures laptops and AI servers; one of the core assemblers of NVIDIA AI servers.
quantacomputer.description: 广达(Quanta)是全球最大的笔记本电脑代工厂,更是这轮 AI 服务器浪潮的核心制造主力之一。它长期为全球各大品牌代工笔电,规模巨大;而真正让它在 AI 时代身价大涨的,是它作为顶级 AI 服务器 ODM 的地位——为英伟达、以及谷歌、Meta、微软、亚马逊等大型云厂商组装、集成搭载 GPU 的 AI 服务器与整机柜系统(如基于英伟达 HGX/GB200 的高端 AI 服务器)。AI 数据中心爆发式建设,让广达的 AI 服务器业务收入迅猛增长,一举成为它最重要、利润更好的增长引擎。凭借顶尖的制造、系统集成与供应链能力,广达与鸿海、纬创等台厂一起,把英伟达的芯片变成云厂商机房里真正运转的算力机器。作为 AI 硬件制造的关键一环,广达是 AI 算力落地的核心代工力量。
quantacomputer.descriptionEn: Quanta is the world's largest notebook-computer ODM and a core manufacturing force in this AI-server wave. It has long manufactured laptops for global brands at huge scale, but what truly boosted its standing in the AI era is its position as a top AI-server ODM — assembling and integrating GPU-laden AI servers and rack-scale systems (like high-end AI servers based on NVIDIA HGX/GB200) for NVIDIA and large cloud providers including Google, Meta, Microsoft and Amazon. The explosive build-out of AI data centers has driven rapid growth in Quanta's AI-server revenue, making it its most important, higher-margin growth engine. On top-tier manufacturing, system-integration and supply-chain strength, Quanta, alongside Foxconn and Wistron, turns NVIDIA's chips into actually running compute machines in cloud providers' data centers. As a key link in AI hardware manufacturing, Quanta is a core ODM force in the deployment of AI compute.
whyItMatters: 全球最大笔电代工厂,AI 服务器核心制造主力
顶级 AI 服务器 ODM:为英伟达/谷歌/Meta 等组装整机柜
AI 服务器成最重要、利润更好的增长引擎
把英伟达芯片变成机房里真正运转的算力机器

products.name: AI 服务器代工
products.description: 为英伟达与各大云厂组装 HGX/GB200 整机柜 AI 服务器。

news.title: AI 服务器营收占比过半,业绩创历史新高
news.summary: 为北美四大云厂代工 AI 服务器,GB200/GB300 出货爬坡;笔电代工龙头完成向 AI 硬件的重心转移。

wiwynn.name: 纬颖
wiwynn.oneLiner: 云服务器 ODM，绑定大型云厂。
wiwynn.oneLinerEn: A cloud-server ODM tightly tied to hyperscalers.
wiwynn.tagline: 为超大规模云定制服务器
wiwynn.business: 为超大规模云厂定制 AI/云服务器与机柜，纬创集团旗下。
wiwynn.businessEn: Designs and builds custom AI/cloud servers and racks for hyperscalers; part of the Wistron group.
wiwynn.description: 纬颖(Wiwynn)是专注云端服务器的 ODM 大厂,由台湾纬创分拆而来,深度绑定全球大型云厂商(超大规模数据中心客户),是 AI 服务器制造的核心力量之一。与面向品牌的服务器不同,纬颖主要为微软、Meta 等超大规模云厂商「量身定制」数据中心服务器——这些巨头不买标准品,而是按自己的数据中心需求定制设计、由纬颖这类 ODM 大规模生产。AI 数据中心爆发式扩张、云厂商疯狂采购搭载 GPU 的 AI 服务器,让纬颖的订单和营收大幅增长,AI 服务器成为其最重要的增长引擎。凭借与顶级云厂商的深度绑定和大规模定制制造能力,纬颖是把云巨头的 AI 算力需求变成实体服务器的关键代工厂之一。作为云服务器 ODM 龙头,纬颖是 AI 基建浪潮里业绩弹性很大的台湾受益标的。
wiwynn.descriptionEn: Wiwynn is a large ODM focused on cloud servers, spun off from Taiwan's Wistron, deeply tied to the world's large cloud providers (hyperscale data-center customers) and a core force in AI-server manufacturing. Unlike brand-oriented servers, Wiwynn mainly "tailor-makes" data-center servers for hyperscalers like Microsoft and Meta — these giants don't buy standard products but design to their own data-center needs, mass-produced by ODMs like Wiwynn. The explosive expansion of AI data centers and cloud providers' frenzied buying of GPU-laden AI servers have driven strong growth in Wiwynn's orders and revenue, with AI servers becoming its most important growth engine. On deep ties to top cloud providers and large-scale custom manufacturing, Wiwynn is a key ODM turning cloud giants' AI-compute demand into physical servers. As a cloud-server ODM leader, Wiwynn is a high-beta Taiwanese beneficiary of the AI-infrastructure wave.
whyItMatters: 专注云端服务器的 ODM 大厂,纬创分拆
深度绑定微软/Meta 等超大规模云厂商
为云巨头量身定制数据中心服务器,大规模生产
AI 服务器成最重要增长引擎,业绩弹性大

products.name: 云服务器 ODM
products.description: 为微软/Meta 等超大规模云厂量身定制数据中心服务器。

news.title: 超大规模云厂 AI 订单爆发,营收翻倍增长
news.summary: 深度绑定微软/Meta 的 AI 服务器定制需求,整机柜(rack-level)交付能力成核心竞争力,业绩连创新高。

amphenol.name: 安费诺
amphenol.oneLiner: 高速连接器与铜缆龙头，AI 机柜受益。
amphenol.oneLinerEn: A leader in high-speed connectors and copper cabling, benefiting from AI racks.
amphenol.business: 连接器、高速铜缆与互连方案，GB200 机柜内铜缆互联的最大受益者之一。
amphenol.businessEn: Connectors, high-speed copper cabling and interconnect solutions — one of the biggest beneficiaries of in-rack copper interconnect in GB200 systems.
amphenol.description: 安费诺(Amphenol)是全球连接器与互连产品的巨头,做各种连接器、线缆组件、以及高速铜缆等,是让电子系统里信号和电力可靠连接的核心供应商,业务遍及通信、数据中心、汽车、工业、国防等众多领域。它和 AI 的连接点在数据中心:AI 服务器和机柜里,GPU、交换机、网卡之间需要海量高速信号连接,而在机柜内部的短距离高速互联上,高速铜缆(如 DAC、有源铜缆)因为便宜、低功耗、可靠,是重要方案——安费诺正是高速连接器和铜缆的领先供应商,直接受益于 AI 机柜内部密集的高速互联需求。AI 服务器的高速化、以及英伟达 GB200 等整机柜方案里大量使用铜缆互联,让安费诺的相关业务显著增长。作为高速连接器与铜缆龙头,安费诺是 AI 算力硬件里「把一切高速可靠连起来」这一环节的核心受益者之一。
amphenol.descriptionEn: Amphenol is a global giant in connectors and interconnect products, making various connectors, cable assemblies and high-speed copper cables — a core supplier for reliably connecting signals and power in electronic systems, with business across communications, data centers, automotive, industrial and defense. Its link to AI is data centers: in AI servers and racks, GPUs, switches and NICs need vast high-speed signal connections, and for short-distance high-speed interconnect inside a rack, high-speed copper cables (DAC, active copper cables) are an important solution because they are cheap, low-power and reliable — and Amphenol is a leading supplier of high-speed connectors and copper cables, benefiting directly from dense high-speed interconnect demand inside AI racks. AI servers' higher speeds and the heavy use of copper-cable interconnect in rack-scale solutions like NVIDIA's GB200 have driven notable growth in Amphenol's related business. As a high-speed-connector and copper-cable leader, Amphenol is a core beneficiary of the "connect everything at high speed and reliably" link in AI compute hardware.
whyItMatters: 全球连接器与互连产品巨头,高速连接器/铜缆领先
AI 机柜内 GPU/交换机/网卡需海量高速信号连接
机柜内短距高速互联,高速铜缆便宜低功耗可靠
GB200 等整机柜大量用铜缆,相关业务显著增长

products.name: 高速连接器 / 铜缆
products.description: AI 机柜内高速信号连接与铜缆互联,受益 GB200 等整机柜。

news.title: AI 机柜高速连接需求爆发,业绩持续超预期
news.summary: GB200/GB300 整机柜大量采用其高速铜互联与连接器,IT 数据通信部门增速创纪录;并购整合持续。

te.name: 泰科电子
te.oneLiner: 全球连接器与传感器巨头。
te.oneLinerEn: A global connector and sensor giant.
te.tagline: 连接与传感,构建更安全的世界
te.taglineEn: Connectivity and sensors for a safer, more connected world
te.business: 连接器、传感器与互连，覆盖数据中心、汽车与工业。
te.businessEn: Connectors, sensors and interconnect spanning data centers, automotive and industrial.
te.description: 泰科电子(TE Connectivity)是全球连接器与传感器的巨头,产品是那些看似不起眼、却无处不在的「连接件」——插头、接口、线缆组件、传感器等,负责让电子系统里的电流、信号、数据可靠地流动和被感知。它服务汽车、工业、通信、数据中心等众多行业。它和 AI 的连接点在数据中心:AI 服务器和机柜里,GPU、内存、网卡、电源之间需要海量高速、高可靠的连接——高速数据要通过精密的高速连接器和线缆传输而不失真,大功率供电也需要可靠的电力连接。AI 服务器的高速化、高功率化,直接拉动对高性能连接器的需求,数据中心成为 TE 的高增长领域之一。此外它在汽车(尤其电动车)领域也是核心供应商。作为连接器与传感器全球龙头,TE 是 AI 硬件里「把一切可靠连起来」这一基础环节的关键供应商。
te.descriptionEn: TE Connectivity is a global giant in connectors and sensors, making the seemingly unremarkable but ubiquitous "connection parts" — plugs, interfaces, cable assemblies and sensors — that let current, signals and data flow and be sensed reliably in electronic systems. It serves automotive, industrial, communications, data centers and many industries. Its link to AI is data centers: in AI servers and racks, GPUs, memory, NICs and power supplies need vast high-speed, high-reliability connections — high-speed data must pass through precision high-speed connectors and cables without distortion, and high-power delivery needs reliable electrical connections. AI servers' higher speeds and power directly drive demand for high-performance connectors, making data centers one of TE's high-growth areas. It is also a core supplier in automotive (especially EVs). As the global connector-and-sensor leader, TE is a key supplier of the foundational "reliably connect everything" link in AI hardware.
whyItMatters: 全球连接器与传感器巨头,连接件无处不在
AI 服务器/机柜需海量高速高可靠连接
高速化、高功率化直接拉动高性能连接器需求
数据中心成高增长领域,汽车(电动车)核心供应商

products.name: 连接器 / 传感器
products.description: 无处不在的连接件,AI 服务器高速连接与供电受益。

news.title: AI 数据中心连接业务高增长,工业与汽车稳健
news.summary: 高速连接器与线缆组件受益 AI 服务器放量;汽车电动化与工业自动化提供基本盘。

wus.name: 沪电股份
wus.oneLiner: AI 服务器高多层 PCB 龙头。
wus.business: 企业通信与 AI 服务器高多层/高频 PCB，英伟达产业链核心 PCB 供应商。
wus.oneLinerEn: A leader in high-layer-count PCBs for AI servers.
wus.tagline: 以高多层 PCB 支撑高速算力
wus.businessEn: High-layer-count, high-speed PCBs for AI servers and switches — key hardware for GPU-cluster interconnect.
wus.description: 沪电股份(WUS Printed Circuit)是中国高端印制电路板(PCB)龙头之一,尤其在 AI 服务器和高速网络设备用的高多层、高速 PCB 上处于领先地位。PCB 是承载和连接所有芯片的「电路底板」,而 AI 服务器里的高速数据传输(GPU、网卡、交换芯片之间)对 PCB 提出了极高要求——需要更多层数、更高频高速材料、更精密的制造工艺,才能保证信号在高速下不失真。沪电深耕企业通信与数据中心用高端 PCB,直接受益于 AI 服务器和高速交换机的爆发式需求,业绩显著增长。相比消费类 PCB,它卡位在技术含量高、价值量大的高多层高速 PCB 环节。作为 AI 算力硬件里「电路底板」这一关键配套环节的核心供应商,沪电股份是 AI 基建的重要中国受益标的之一。
wus.descriptionEn: WUS Printed Circuit is one of China's leaders in high-end printed circuit boards (PCBs), especially leading in the high-layer, high-speed PCBs used in AI servers and high-speed networking equipment. A PCB is the "circuit baseboard" that carries and connects all chips, and the high-speed data transmission in AI servers (between GPUs, NICs and switch chips) places extreme demands on PCBs — more layers, higher-frequency high-speed materials and more precise manufacturing to keep signals undistorted at high speed. WUS cultivates high-end PCBs for enterprise communications and data centers, benefiting directly from explosive demand for AI servers and high-speed switches, with strong earnings growth. Unlike consumer PCBs, it is positioned in the high-tech, high-value high-layer high-speed PCB segment. As a core supplier of the key "circuit baseboard" link in AI compute hardware, WUS is an important Chinese beneficiary of AI infrastructure.
whyItMatters: 中国高端 PCB 龙头之一,高多层高速 PCB 领先
PCB 是承载连接所有芯片的「电路底板」
AI 服务器高速传输对 PCB 层数/材料/工艺要求极高
受益 AI 服务器与高速交换机爆发,业绩显著增长

products.name: 高多层高速 PCB
products.description: AI 服务器与高速网络设备用的高多层、高速 PCB。

news.title: AI 服务器 PCB supercycle,业绩连创新高
news.summary: 英伟达平台高多层高速板核心供应商,800G 交换机板同步放量;泰国基地扩产承接海外需求。

victory.name: 胜宏科技
victory.oneLiner: AI 服务器/显卡 PCB 高增长厂。
victory.business: 高多层 PCB 与 HDI，深度绑定英伟达 GPU 板卡与 AI 服务器。
victory.oneLinerEn: A fast-growing PCB maker for AI servers/GPUs.
victory.tagline: 为 AI 算力提供高端电路板
victory.taglineEn: High-end circuit boards for AI compute
victory.businessEn: High-end PCBs for AI servers and GPUs — a high-growth beneficiary of AI hardware demand.
victory.description: 胜宏科技(Victory Giant)是中国印制电路板(PCB)厂商,近年凭借 AI 服务器与高端显卡用 PCB 实现高速增长,是 AI 硬件供应链里备受关注的中国黑马之一。PCB 是承载和连接芯片的电路底板,而 AI 服务器和高端 GPU 显卡对 PCB 要求极高——高层数、高速高频材料、高精度,才能承载 GPU、HBM、供电和高速互联。胜宏切入了英伟达 AI 服务器/显卡相关的高端 PCB 供应,踩中 AI 算力爆发,订单和业绩、股价都大幅增长。相比传统消费类 PCB,它成功卡位到技术和价值量都更高的 AI 高端 PCB 环节。作为 AI 服务器与 GPU「电路底板」的关键供应商之一,胜宏科技是这轮 AI 基建投资中弹性很大的中国 PCB 受益标的。
victory.descriptionEn: Victory Giant is a Chinese printed-circuit-board (PCB) maker that has grown rapidly in recent years on PCBs for AI servers and high-end graphics cards — one of the closely watched Chinese dark horses in the AI-hardware supply chain. A PCB is the circuit baseboard that carries and connects chips, and AI servers and high-end GPU cards place extreme demands on PCBs — high layer counts, high-speed high-frequency materials and high precision to carry GPUs, HBM, power delivery and high-speed interconnect. Victory Giant entered the high-end PCB supply for NVIDIA-related AI servers/cards, catching the AI-compute boom, with orders, earnings and stock all rising sharply. Unlike traditional consumer PCBs, it successfully positioned in the higher-tech, higher-value AI high-end PCB segment. As a key supplier of the "circuit baseboard" for AI servers and GPUs, Victory Giant is a high-beta Chinese PCB beneficiary of this AI-infrastructure investment.
whyItMatters: 中国 PCB 厂商,靠 AI 服务器/高端显卡 PCB 高速增长
AI 服务器/GPU 对 PCB 层数/材料/精度要求极高
切入英伟达 AI 服务器/显卡相关高端 PCB 供应
卡位高价值 AI PCB,业绩股价大幅增长的黑马

products.name: AI 服务器 / 显卡 PCB
products.description: 英伟达 AI 服务器/显卡相关高端 PCB,高增长中国黑马。

news.title: 英伟达链 PCB 黑马,产能满载业绩暴增
news.summary: AI 服务器/显卡高端 PCB 放量,惠州/泰国扩产;股价与业绩随 AI 硬件周期大幅上行。

ttm.name: TTM
ttm.oneLiner: 北美最大 PCB 制造商。
ttm.business: 高端 PCB 与射频组件，服务数据中心、航空与国防。
ttm.tagline: 从航天到数据中心的电路板
ttm.taglineEn: Circuit boards from aerospace to data centers
ttm.businessEn: The largest North American PCB maker, spanning aerospace/defense and high-speed data-center boards.
ttm.description: TTM Technologies 是北美最大的印刷电路板(PCB)制造商。它有两大高价值市场:一是航空航天与国防(高可靠、复杂射频/微波电路板,壁垒高、利润好);二是数据中心与网络(AI 服务器、高速交换机用的高多层、高速 PCB)。AI 数据中心建设让后者需求猛增,TTM 作为少数能做高端复杂 PCB 的美系厂商,同时受益于「国防订单 + AI 数据中心」两条主线。相比亚洲 PCB 厂更偏成本规模,TTM 主打高技术门槛与本土供应(美国国防/关键基建对本土 PCB 有战略需求),是美股 PCB 里最贴近 AI 与国防双主题的公司。
ttm.descriptionEn: TTM Technologies is the largest printed circuit board (PCB) maker in North America. It has two high-value markets: aerospace and defense (high-reliability, complex RF/microwave boards with high barriers and good margins), and data center/networking (high-layer, high-speed PCBs for AI servers and switches). AI-data-center build-out is driving the latter's demand up sharply, and as one of the few U.S. makers of high-end complex PCBs, TTM benefits from both "defense orders + AI data centers." Compared with Asian PCB makers focused on cost and scale, TTM emphasizes high technical barriers and domestic supply (U.S. defense/critical infrastructure has a strategic need for domestic PCBs) — the U.S.-listed PCB name closest to the dual AI-and-defense themes.
whyItMatters: 北美最大 PCB 制造商
航空航天/国防(高可靠复杂射频板)高利润
数据中心/网络高多层高速 PCB 需求猛增
受益「国防订单 + AI 数据中心」双主线,本土战略供应

products.name: PCB (高多层 / HDI)
products.description: 北美最大 PCB 制造商,服务国防、数据中心等高端市场。

news.title: AI 与国防双轮驱动,高端 PCB 订单饱满
news.summary: 北美最大 PCB 厂受益 AI 服务器高多层板需求与国防电子景气,马来西亚/纽约新产能爬坡。

delta.name: 台达电子
delta.oneLiner: 全球电源龙头，AI 服务器供电主力。
delta.oneLinerEn: A global power leader and a mainstay of AI-server power.
delta.tagline: 环保 节能 爱地球
delta.business: 开关电源、电源管理与散热，AI 服务器高功率电源与液冷的核心供应商。
delta.businessEn: Switching power supplies, power management and cooling — a core supplier of AI-server high-power delivery and liquid cooling.
delta.description: 台达电子(Delta Electronics)是全球电源管理与散热的龙头,以电源供应器(PSU)起家,几十年做到全球最大的开关电源供应商之一,产品还涵盖散热、工业自动化、电动车动力电子、数据中心基础设施等。它是 AI 服务器供电与散热的主力供应商之一:AI 服务器功耗极高,需要高效率、高功率密度的服务器电源把电稳定送进机柜,而台达在高效电源上技术领先、规模巨大;同时它也提供数据中心的供配电和散热(含液冷)方案。AI 数据中心爆发式建设,对高效电源和散热的需求激增,直接拉动台达相关业务大幅增长,数据中心成为其核心成长引擎。凭借在电源和散热两大 AI 刚需环节的深厚实力,台达电子是 AI 算力落地必须解决「供电 + 散热」这一硬约束背后最重要的供应商之一。作为全球电源龙头,台达是 AI 基建里确定性很高的受益者。
delta.descriptionEn: Delta Electronics is a global leader in power management and cooling, which began with power supplies (PSUs) and over decades became one of the world's largest switching-power-supply makers, with products also spanning cooling, industrial automation, EV power electronics and data-center infrastructure. It is one of the main suppliers of AI-server power and cooling: AI servers have very high power draw and need high-efficiency, high-power-density server power supplies to deliver power stably into racks, and Delta leads technically and at huge scale in efficient power; it also provides data-center power distribution and cooling (including liquid cooling). The explosive build-out of AI data centers surges demand for efficient power and cooling, directly driving strong growth in Delta's related businesses, making data centers a core growth engine. On deep strength in both power and cooling — two AI essentials — Delta is one of the most important suppliers behind the hard constraint that AI compute must solve "power + cooling." As the global power leader, Delta is a high-certainty beneficiary in AI infrastructure.
whyItMatters: 全球电源管理与散热龙头,最大开关电源供应商之一
AI 服务器需高效率高功率密度电源稳定供电
同时提供数据中心供配电与散热(含液冷)方案
供电+散热两大 AI 刚需,数据中心成核心成长引擎

products.name: 服务器电源 (PSU)
products.description: 高效率、高功率密度的 AI 服务器电源,全球电源龙头。

products.name: 数据中心散热
products.description: 含液冷的数据中心供配电与散热方案。

news.title: Q1营收年增34%,毛利率37%创新高
news.summary: 台达电子2026年第一季合并营收1593.53亿新台币,同比增长34%,毛利率达37%创新高,云服务商资本开支扩大持续拉动电源与数据中心业务。

news.title: 2025年净利601亿新台币,年增70.6%创新高
news.summary: 台达电子2025年全年营收5548.85亿新台币,年增31.75%;税后净利601.08亿新台币,大增70.6%创历史新高,EPS达23.14元,AI数据中心需求为主要驱动力。

news.title: AI 电源与液冷双引擎,数据中心业务爆发
news.summary: 服务器电源、机柜电源架构(含 800V HVDC)与液冷方案全面放量,AI 相关营收占比持续提升,业绩连创新高。

news.title: 市值突破1000亿美元,跃居台股第二
news.summary: 受AI数据中心电力与液冷需求猛增推动,台达电子市值突破1000亿美元(约3.23兆新台币),超越鸿海精密成为仅次于台积电的台股第二大市值企业。

mpwr.name: 芯源系统
mpwr.oneLiner: 电源管理芯片高增长厂，绑定英伟达。
mpwr.business: 电源管理集成电路(PMIC)与电源模块，为 GPU 供电的关键芯片供应商。
mpwr.oneLinerEn: A high-growth power-management chip maker tied to NVIDIA.
mpwr.businessEn: Power-management integrated circuits (PMICs) and modules — critical power-delivery chips for GPUs.
mpwr.description: 芯源系统(Monolithic Power Systems,MPS)是高性能电源管理芯片的高增长厂商,专注把电「精准、高效地」管理和转换,供给芯片和电子系统使用。它和 AI 的连接点非常直接:高性能 AI 芯片(尤其英伟达 GPU)功耗极高、对供电的精度、效率和瞬态响应要求极其苛刻——要在极低电压下提供巨大且瞬息万变的电流,还要尽量少损耗少发热。MPS 提供高效率、高集成度的电源管理方案(如多相电源控制器、电源模块),深度绑定英伟达等 AI 芯片平台,成为 AI 服务器供电环节的关键芯片供应商之一。AI 算力功率飙升,让「如何给 GPU 高效精准供电」成为关键,直接拉动 MPS 的高价值电源芯片需求,业绩持续高增长。作为电源管理芯片的代表厂商,MPS 是 AI 算力「精密供电」这一环节里成长性突出、且与英伟达深度绑定的受益者。
mpwr.descriptionEn: Monolithic Power Systems (MPS) is a high-growth maker of high-performance power-management chips, focused on precisely and efficiently managing and converting power for chips and electronic systems. Its link to AI is very direct: high-performance AI chips (especially NVIDIA GPUs) have very high power draw and extremely stringent demands on power precision, efficiency and transient response — delivering huge, rapidly changing current at very low voltage with minimal loss and heat. MPS provides high-efficiency, highly integrated power-management solutions (multiphase power controllers, power modules), deeply tied to AI-chip platforms like NVIDIA's, becoming a key chip supplier in the AI-server power link. Surging AI compute power makes "how to efficiently and precisely power GPUs" critical, directly driving demand for MPS's high-value power chips with sustained strong earnings growth. As a representative power-management-chip maker, MPS is a standout-growth beneficiary deeply tied to NVIDIA in the "precision power delivery" link of AI compute.
whyItMatters: 高性能电源管理芯片高增长厂商
AI GPU 功耗极高,对供电精度/效率/瞬态要求苛刻
提供高效多相电源控制器/模块,深度绑定英伟达
AI 功率飙升拉动高价值电源芯片需求,业绩高增长

products.name: 电源管理芯片
products.description: 高效多相电源方案,深度绑定英伟达 GPU 供电。

news.title: 英伟达平台电源方案放量,数据中心业务领跑
news.summary: 为 Blackwell/Rubin 平台供多相电源与模块,企业数据业务成第一大板块;800V 直流供电架构打开新空间。

vicor.name: Vicor
vicor.business: 高密度直流电源转换模块，靠近 GPU 的末端供电方案。
vicor.oneLinerEn: A maker of high-density power modules.
vicor.tagline: 以模块化电源逼近芯片
vicor.taglineEn: Modular power, right at the chip
vicor.businessEn: High-density DC power-conversion modules — point-of-load power delivery right next to the GPU.
vicor.description: Vicor 是高密度电源模块的专业厂商,专注把电「高效、紧凑地转换和输送」到芯片。现代高性能芯片(尤其 AI GPU)有个越来越棘手的问题:它们的功耗极高(单颗上千瓦)、工作电压却很低、瞬时电流巨大,如何把电源的电高效地、稳定地、就近地送到芯片的每一处,而损耗和发热又要尽量小,是一门精细的功夫。Vicor 的高密度电源转换模块能实现高效率、小体积的供电,并主张把电源尽量靠近芯片(甚至集成到芯片封装旁),减少长距离输电的损耗——这对功耗爆表的 AI 芯片尤其重要。AI 算力功率飙升,让「如何给芯片高效供电」成为关键瓶颈之一,直接提升 Vicor 这类先进电源方案的价值。作为高密度电源的代表厂商,Vicor 处在 AI 芯片「最后一段供电」这个精密而关键的环节。
vicor.descriptionEn: Vicor is a specialist in high-density power modules, focused on efficiently and compactly converting and delivering power to chips. Modern high-performance chips (especially AI GPUs) have an increasingly tricky problem: very high power draw (over a thousand watts per chip), low operating voltage and huge instantaneous current, and delivering power efficiently, stably and close to every part of the chip while minimizing loss and heat is a fine art. Vicor's high-density power-conversion modules achieve efficient, small-footprint power delivery and advocate placing power as close to the chip as possible (even integrated beside the chip package) to reduce long-distance transmission loss — especially important for AI chips with soaring power. As AI compute power surges, "how to efficiently power the chip" becomes a key bottleneck, directly raising the value of advanced power solutions like Vicor's. As a representative high-density-power maker, Vicor sits in the precise, critical "last stretch of power delivery" to AI chips.
whyItMatters: 高密度电源模块专业厂商,把电高效紧凑送到芯片
AI GPU 功耗上千瓦、电压低、瞬时电流巨大
高效小体积供电,主张电源尽量靠近芯片减损耗
AI 功率飙升让「给芯片高效供电」成关键瓶颈

products.name: 高密度电源模块
products.description: 把电高效紧凑送到芯片,主张电源尽量靠近 AI GPU。

news.title: 高密度电源模块卡位 GPU 供电,专利授权贡献收入
news.summary: 垂直供电(VPD)方案切入 AI 加速器,把电源模块贴到 GPU 封装旁;NBM 模块随 800V 架构迭代。

manus.name: Manus
manus.oneLiner: 现象级通用 AI 智能体，Meta 收购被叫停的焦点。
manus.oneLinerEn: The breakout general AI agent at the center of a blocked Meta acquisition.
manus.tagline: 把想法交给它，替你做完
manus.taglineEn: Hand it your idea, and it gets it done
manus.hq: 新加坡（母公司蝴蝶效应源自北京）
manus.business: 通用自主智能体：给一个目标，它能自己规划、调用工具、操作浏览器/电脑，跑完整条复杂任务(做调研报告、建网站、订行程等)并交付成果。由肖弘的蝴蝶效应(Butterfly Effect)打造，前身是聚合多家大模型的浏览器助手 Monica，2025 年初以「首个通用 Agent」现象级出圈。2026 年营收约 1.25 亿美元。
manus.businessEn: A general autonomous agent: give it a goal and it plans, calls tools, and operates a browser/computer to complete an entire complex task (research reports, building sites, booking trips) and deliver the result. Built by Red Xiao Hong's Butterfly Effect, it evolved from Monica, a browser assistant that aggregated multiple models, and broke out in early 2025 as the "first general agent." Its 2026 revenue was about $125 million.
manus.description: Manus 由肖弘(Red Xiao Hong)创立的蝴蝶效应(Butterfly Effect)打造，团队源自北京、公司设在新加坡。它最早做的是聚合 GPT/Claude 等多家模型的浏览器助手 Monica，2025 年 3 月推出通用自主智能体 Manus——你给一个目标，它就自己拆解、调工具、操作电脑，端到端把任务办完并交付可用成果，被誉为「第一个真正好用的通用 Agent」，一号难求、现象级刷屏。资本层面同样戏剧性：Benchmark、红杉中国(HongShan)、真格、腾讯等入股；2025 年底 Meta 曾计划以 20–30 亿美元收购，但 2026 年 4 月被中国发改委叫停，Meta 于 6 月正式终止交易。2026 年营收约 1.25 亿美元。
manus.descriptionEn: Manus is built by Butterfly Effect, founded by Red Xiao Hong, with a team rooted in Beijing and the company based in Singapore. It began as Monica, a browser assistant aggregating models like GPT and Claude, then in March 2025 launched the general autonomous agent Manus — give it a goal and it decomposes the task, calls tools, operates a computer, and delivers a usable result end to end, hailed as "the first genuinely useful general agent," with invites in scarce demand amid a viral frenzy. The capital story was equally dramatic: Benchmark, HongShan (Sequoia China), ZhenFund and Tencent invested; in late 2025 Meta planned to acquire it for $2–3 billion, but China's NDRC blocked the deal in April 2026 and Meta formally terminated it in June. Its 2026 revenue was about $125 million.
whyItMatters: 被誉为「第一个真正好用的通用 Agent」，现象级出圈
端到端替人跑完复杂任务，定义通用智能体产品形态
Meta 20–30 亿美元收购遭中方叫停，地缘与并购焦点
营收快速增长(2026 约 1.25 亿美元)
